            grid-column: span 1;
        }
    }
</style>

@code {
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private ExecutiveDashboard? dashboard;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadDashboardAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadDashboardAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");
            dashboard = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<ExecutiveDashboard>("api/dashboard/executive");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el dashboard. Valida que la API esté activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private int GetMaxStatus()
    {
        if (dashboard is null || dashboard.ToolsByStatus.Count == 0)
        {
            return 1;
        }

        return Math.Max(1, dashboard.ToolsByStatus.Max(x => x.Count));
    }

    private int GetMaxBranch()
    {
        if (dashboard is null || dashboard.ToolsByBranch.Count == 0)
        {
            return 1;
        }

        return Math.Max(1, dashboard.ToolsByBranch.Max(x => x.Total));
    }

    private int GetMaxMonthMaintenance()
    {
        if (dashboard is null || dashboard.MaintenanceByMonth.Count == 0)
        {
            return 1;
        }

        return Math.Max(1, dashboard.MaintenanceByMonth.Max(x => x.Count));
    }

    private static int GetPercent(int value, int max)
    {
        if (value <= 0 || max <= 0)
        {
            return 0;
        }

        return Math.Max(5, (int)Math.Round((decimal)value / max * 100));
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;
    }

    private static string ShowDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";
    }

    private static string ShowDateTime(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "—";
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "Disponible",
        "Assigned" => "Asignada",
        "Loaned" => "Prestada",
        "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
        "Damaged" => "Dańada",
        "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
        "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
        "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
        "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente baja",
        "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
        _ => status
    };

    private sealed class ExecutiveDashboard
    {
        public DateTime GeneratedAt { get; set; }
        public DashboardSummary Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public List<StatusItem> ToolsByStatus { get; set; } = new();
        public List<BranchItem> ToolsByBranch { get; set; } = new();
        public List<MaintenancePeriodItem> MaintenanceByMonth { get; set; } = new();
        public List<MaintenancePeriodItem> MaintenanceByDay { get; set; } = new();
        public LifeRecordCoverage LifeRecordCoverage { get; set; } = new();
        public MaintenanceSummary MaintenanceSummary { get; set; } = new();
        public DocumentSummary DocumentSummary { get; set; } = new();
        public PurchaseSummary PurchaseSummary { get; set; } = new();
        public List<RecentActivityItem> RecentActivity { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class DashboardSummary
    {
        public int TotalTools { get; set; }
        public int AvailableTools { get; set; }
        public int PendingValidationTools { get; set; }
        public int AssignedTools { get; set; }
        public int LoanedTools { get; set; }
        public int InMaintenanceTools { get; set; }
        public int DamagedTools { get; set; }
        public int NotLocatedTools { get; set; }
        public int DisposedTools { get; set; }
        public int FixedAssets { get; set; }
        public int ToolsWithoutFixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public int ToolsOnly { get; set; }
        public int NonToolAssets { get; set; }
        public int SpecializedTools { get; set; }
        public int RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public int ActiveResponsibles { get; set; }
        public int InactiveResponsibles { get; set; }
        public int ActiveBranches { get; set; }
        public int InactiveBranches { get; set; }
        public int WithLifeRecord { get; set; }
        public int WithoutLifeRecord { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class StatusItem
    {
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Count { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class BranchItem
    {
        public string BranchCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string BranchName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Total { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenancePeriodItem
    {
        public string Label { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Count { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class LifeRecordCoverage
    {
        public int MissingTechnicalData { get; set; }
        public List<MissingTechnicalItem> MissingTechnicalDataItems { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class MissingTechnicalItem
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? Missing { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceSummary
    {
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public int ThisMonth { get; set; }
        public int Today { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class DocumentSummary
    {
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public List<DocumentItem> Recent { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class DocumentItem
    {
        public string FileName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string DocumentType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime UploadedAt { get; set; }
        public string? UploadedBy { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class PurchaseSummary
    {
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public int Completed { get; set; }
        public int Pending { get; set; }
        public int Rejected { get; set; }
        public string ModuleStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Note { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class RecentActivityItem
    {
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public DateTime RegisteredAt { get; set; }
        public string? User { get; set; }
    }
}




============================================================
FILE: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Components\Pages\Tools.razor

@page "/tools"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Inventario maestro - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="Tools.View" ModuleName="Inventario de AF">

<section class="inventory-hero-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="inventory-hero-pill">ACTIVOS FIJOS</span>
        <h2>Inventario de AF</h2>
        <p>Consulta general de herramientas y activos fijos registrados en NAVI.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="inventory-hero-side">
        <div class="inventory-hero-status">
            <span>Total activos</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count registrados</strong>
        </div>

        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light inventory-hero-refresh" @onclick="LoadToolsAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
            @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")
        </button>
    </div>
</section>
@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}
else if (isLoading && tools.Count == 0)
{
    <div class="alert alert-info">
        Cargando inventario desde la API...
    </div>
}
else
{
    <section class="inventory-kpi-grid">
        <article class="inventory-kpi-card total">
            <span>Total AF</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count</strong>
        </article>

        <article class="inventory-kpi-card success">
            <span>Disponibles</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == "Available")</strong>
        </article>

        <article class="inventory-kpi-card warning">
            <span>Pendientes validación</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == "PendingValidation")</strong>
        </article>

        <article class="inventory-kpi-card danger">
            <span>Bloqueadas</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count(IsBlocked)</strong>
        </article>
    </section>

    <section class="inventory-status-filters inventory-status-filters-modern">
        <button type="button"
                class="@GetStatusFilterChipClass(string.Empty)"
                @onclick="@(() => SelectStatus(string.Empty))">
            Todos
            <span>@tools.Count</span>
        </button>

        @foreach (var option in StatusFilterOptions)
        {
            <button type="button"
                    class="@GetStatusFilterChipClass(option.Value)"
                    @onclick="@(() => SelectStatus(option.Value))">
                @option.Label
                <span>@option.Count</span>
            </button>
        }
    </section>

    <section class="inventory-panel">
        <div class="inventory-toolbar">
            <input class="form-control"
                   placeholder="Buscar por código, nombre, serial, sede, tipo o categoría..."
                   @bind="searchText"
                   @bind:event="oninput" />

            <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedStatus">
                <option value="">Todos los estados</option>
                @foreach (var status in tools.Select(x => x.OperationalStatus).Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)).Distinct().OrderBy(x => x))
                {
                    <option value="@status">@GetStatusLabel(status)</option>
                }
            </select>

            <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedBranch">
                <option value="">Todas las sedes</option>
                @foreach (var branch in tools.Select(x => x.BranchCode).Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)).Distinct().OrderBy(x => x))
                {
                    <option value="@branch">@branch</option>
                }
            </select>
        </div>

        <div class="inventory-count">
            Mostrando <strong>@FilteredTools.Count()</strong> de <strong>@tools.Count</strong> herramientas.
        </div>

        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle inventory-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Código</th>
                        <th>HERRAMIENTA / ACTIVO</th>
                        <th>Sede</th>
                        <th>Tipo</th>
                        <th>Categoría</th>
                        <th>Serial</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th>Clase</th>
                        <th>Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var tool in FilteredTools)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <strong>@tool.InternalCode</strong>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <strong>@tool.Name</strong>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tool.Description))
                                {
                                    <br />
                                    <small class="text-muted">@tool.Description</small>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span>@tool.BranchCode</span>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tool.BranchName))
                                {
                                    <br />
                                    <small class="text-muted">@tool.BranchName</small>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>@ShowValue(tool.ToolTypeName)</td>
                            <td>@ShowValue(tool.ToolCategoryName)</td>
                            <td>@ShowValue(tool.SerialNumber)</td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="@GetInventoryStatusClass(tool.OperationalStatus)">
                                    <span class="inventory-status-dot"></span>
                                    @GetStatusLabel(tool.OperationalStatus)
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (tool.IsSpecialized)
                                {
                                    <span class="inventory-class-badge specialized">Especializada</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="inventory-class-badge normal">No especializada</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <a class="btn-inventory-detail" href="@($"/tools/{tool.Id}")">Detalle</a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </section>
}

@code {
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string selectedBranch = string.Empty;

    private List<ToolListItem> tools = new();

    private IEnumerable<StatusFilterOption> StatusFilterOptions =>
        tools
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.OperationalStatus))
            .GroupBy(x => x.OperationalStatus)
            .Select(x => new StatusFilterOption
            {
                Value = x.Key,
                Label = GetStatusLabel(x.Key),
                Count = x.Count()
            })
            .OrderBy(x => x.Label);

    private IEnumerable<ToolListItem> FilteredTools =>
        tools
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.OperationalStatus == selectedStatus)
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedBranch) || x.BranchCode == selectedBranch)
            .OrderBy(x => x.BranchCode)
            .ThenBy(x => x.InternalCode);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadToolsAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadToolsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            tools = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolListItem>>("api/tools") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el inventario. Valida que la API esté activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void SelectStatus(string status)
    {
        selectedStatus = status;
    }

    private string GetStatusFilterChipClass(string status)
    {
        var isActive = string.Equals(
            selectedStatus ?? string.Empty,
            status ?? string.Empty,
            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        return isActive
            ? $"{GetInventoryStatusClass(status)} inventory-status-filter-chip active"
            : $"{GetInventoryStatusClass(status)} inventory-status-filter-chip";
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(ToolListItem tool)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var value = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(tool.InternalCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.Name, value)
            || Contains(tool.Description, value)
            || Contains(tool.SerialNumber, value)
            || Contains(tool.FixedAssetCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.FenixCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.BranchCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.BranchName, value)
            || Contains(tool.ToolTypeName, value)
            || Contains(tool.ToolCategoryName, value)
            || Contains(tool.OperationalStatus, value);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? source, string value)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(source)
            && source.Contains(value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static bool IsBlocked(ToolListItem tool)
    {
        return tool.OperationalStatus is "Damaged"
            or "NotSuitable"
            or "InMaintenance"
            or "PendingDisposal"
            or "Disposed"
            or "NotLocated"
            or "Inconsistent";
    }

    private static string ShowValue(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "Disponible",
            "Assigned" => "Asignada",
            "Loaned" => "Prestada",
            "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
            "Damaged" => "Dańada",
            "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
            "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
            "Inconsistent" => "Inconsistente",
            "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
            "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente de baja",
            "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Sin estado" : status
        };
    }

    private static string GetInventoryStatusClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "inventory-status-pill status-success",
            "Assigned" => "inventory-status-pill status-success",
            "Loaned" => "inventory-status-pill status-info",
            "InMaintenance" => "inventory-status-pill status-warning",
            "PendingValidation" => "inventory-status-pill status-warning",
            "Damaged" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "Inconsistent" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "PendingDisposal" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "Disposed" => "inventory-status-pill status-neutral",
            _ => "inventory-status-pill status-neutral"
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusBadgeClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "badge bg-success",
            "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
            "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
            "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
            "Inconsistent" => "badge bg-danger",
            "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }

    private sealed class StatusFilterOption
    {
        public string Value { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Label { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Count { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolListItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string SyncStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
    }
}






</PermissionGuard>

    }

<div class="tool-detail-grid">
        <section class="tool-detail-panel">
            <h2>Acciones rápidas</h2>

            <div class="quick-actions">
                <div>
                    <label class="form-label">Cambiar estado operativo</label>
                    <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedOperationalStatus">
                        <option value="Available">Disponible</option>
                        <option value="PendingValidation">Pendiente validación</option>
                        <option value="Assigned">Asignada</option>
                        <option value="Loaned">Prestada</option>
                        <option value="InMaintenance">En mantenimiento</option>
                        <option value="Damaged">Dańada</option>
                        <option value="NotSuitable">No apta</option>

                        @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar estado")

                        @(tool?.IsSpecialized == true ? "Marcar no especializada" : "Marcar especializada")

                        Ver hoja vida técnica
                    </a>

                        @actionMessage

                </div>

        @if (lifeCycleEvents.Count == 0)
        {
            <p class="text-muted">Esta herramienta aún no tiene eventos registrados.</p>
        }
        else
        {

                {

                        <div class="timeline-content">
                            <div class="timeline-header">

                                <span>@item.EventDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm")</span>
                            </div>

                            <small class="text-muted">@item.EventType</small>

                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Description))
                            {
                                <p>@item.Description</p>
                            }

                            <div class="timeline-values">
                                <span>Anterior: @ShowValue(item.PreviousValue)</span>
                                <span>Nuevo: @ShowValue(item.NewValue)</span>
                                <span>Usuario: @ShowValue(item.PerformedBy)</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </section>
}

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? actionMessage;
    private string selectedOperationalStatus = "PendingValidation";
    private string actionObservation = string.Empty;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private ToolDetailItem? tool;
    private List<LifeCycleEventItem> lifeCycleEvents = new();
    private ToolReportedSourceModel? reportedSource;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            tool = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<ToolDetailItem>($"api/tools/{ToolId}");

            if (tool is not null)
            {
                selectedOperationalStatus = tool!.OperationalStatus;
            }
            lifeCycleEvents = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<LifeCycleEventItem>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/life-cycle-events") ?? new();
                reportedSource = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<ToolReportedSourceModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/reported-source");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el detalle. Valida que la API esté activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task ChangeOperationalStatusAsync()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            actionMessage = null;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var payload = new
            {
                operationalStatus = selectedOperationalStatus,
                changedBy = "yquinto",
                updatedBy = "yquinto",
                reason = actionObservation,
                observation = actionObservation
            };

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{tool.Id}/operational-status", payload);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar el estado. Código: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            actionMessage = "Estado operativo actualizado correctamente.";
            actionObservation = string.Empty;

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar el estado. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task ToggleSpecializedAsync()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            actionMessage = null;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var payload = new
            {
                isSpecialized = !tool.IsSpecialized,
                changedBy = "yquinto",
                updatedBy = "yquinto",
                reason = "Cambio de clasificación desde Admin."
            };

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{tool.Id}/classification", payload);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar la clasificación. Código: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            actionMessage = "Clasificación actualizada correctamente.";

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar la clasificación. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }
    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo("/tools");
    }

    private static string ShowValue(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string BoolLabel(bool value)
    {
        return value ? "Sí" : "No";
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "-";
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "Disponible",
            "Assigned" => "Asignada",
            "Loaned" => "Prestada",
            "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
            "Damaged" => "Dańada",
            "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
            "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
            "Inconsistent" => "Inconsistente",
            "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
            "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente de baja",
            "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Sin estado" : status
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusBadgeClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "badge bg-success",
            "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
            "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
            "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
            "Inconsistent" => "badge bg-danger",
            "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }

    private sealed class ToolDetailItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public string? UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string SyncStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class LifeCycleEventItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PreviousValue { get; set; }
        public string? NewValue { get; set; }
        public DateTime EventDate { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
    }

    private string? successMessage;
    private bool isEditingMasterData;
    private ToolMasterEditModel editModel = new();

    private void StartMasterDataEdit()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;

        editModel = new ToolMasterEditModel
        {
            InternalCode = tool.InternalCode,
            Name = tool.Name,
            Description = tool.Description,
            SerialNumber = tool.SerialNumber,
            FixedAssetCode = tool.FixedAssetCode,
            FenixCode = tool.FenixCode,
            Brand = tool.Brand,
            Model = tool.Model,
            OperationalStatus = tool.OperationalStatus,
            PhysicalStatus = tool.PhysicalStatus,
            IsSpecialized = tool.IsSpecialized,
            RequiresMaintenance = tool.RequiresMaintenance,
            RequiresPreOperationalCheck = tool.RequiresPreOperationalCheck,
            RequiresCertification = tool.RequiresCertification,
            CertificationExpirationDate = tool.CertificationExpirationDate,
            MaintenancePeriodMonths = null
        };

        isEditingMasterData = true;
    }

    private void CancelMasterDataEdit()
    {
        isEditingMasterData = false;
        editModel = new ToolMasterEditModel();
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;
    }

    private async Task SaveMasterDataAsync()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/master-data", new
            {
                editModel.InternalCode,
                editModel.Name,
                editModel.Description,
                editModel.SerialNumber,
                editModel.FixedAssetCode,
                editModel.FenixCode,
                editModel.Brand,
                editModel.Model,
                editModel.OperationalStatus,
                editModel.PhysicalStatus,
                editModel.IsSpecialized,
                editModel.RequiresMaintenance,
                editModel.RequiresPreOperationalCheck,
                editModel.RequiresCertification,
                editModel.CertificationExpirationDate,
                ClearCertificationExpirationDate = !editModel.CertificationExpirationDate.HasValue,
                editModel.MaintenancePeriodMonths,
                ValidateAndAssignReporter = true,
                UpdatedBy = "admin"
            });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar el activo. {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "Activo actualizado correctamente.";
            isEditingMasterData = false;

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error guardando activo: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private async Task VoidCurrentToolAsync()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/void", new
            {
                ActionBy = "admin",
                Reason = "Activo anulado desde pantalla de detalle de Inventario de AF."
            });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo anular el activo. {detail}";
                return;
            }

            NavigationManager.NavigateTo("/tools");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error anulando activo: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private sealed class ToolMasterEditModel
    {
        public string? InternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
    
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
}
    private static string DisplaySourceValue(string? value) =>
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;

    private sealed class ToolReportedSourceModel
    {
        public bool HasSource { get; set; }
        public Guid? ReportedItemId { get; set; }
        public Guid? PhysicalCountId { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalCountNumber { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalCountStatus { get; set; }
        public Guid? ParticipantId { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantName { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantUserName { get; set; }
        public string? ReportType { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedCode { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedName { get; set; }
        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReportedAt { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciliationStatus { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciliationObservation { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReconciledAt { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciledBy { get; set; }
        public bool ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ApprovedForCreationAt { get; set; }
        public string? ApprovedForCreationBy { get; set; }
    }
}

============================================================
FILE: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Components\Pages\TechnicalLifeRecord.razor
============================================================

@page "/tools/{ToolId:guid}/technical-life-record"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager
@inject IJSRuntime JsRuntime
@inject IConfiguration Configuration

<PageTitle>Hoja de vida técnica - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>



@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}
else if (isLoading && record is null)
{
    <div class="alert alert-info">
        Cargando hoja de vida técnica...
    </div>
}
else if (record is not null)
{
        <section class="life-hero-banner">
        <div class="life-hero-main">
            <div class="life-hero-top-actions">
                <button class="btn-life-back" @onclick="GoBack">
                    @BackButtonText
                </button>
            </div>

            <span class="life-hero-pill">HOJA DE VIDA TÉCNICA</span>

            <h2>@record.Summary.Name</h2>

            <div class="life-hero-code">
                @record.Summary.InternalCode
            </div>

            <p>Formato técnico del activo fijo con datos generales, accesorios, documentos, mantenimiento, evidencias, prácticas seguras y trazabilidad.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="life-hero-side">
            <div class="life-hero-status-card">
                <span>Estado operativo</span>
                <strong>@GetStatusLabel(record.Summary.OperationalStatus)</strong>
            </div>

            <div class="life-hero-badges">
                <span class="@GetStatusBadgeClass(record.Summary.OperationalStatus)">
                    @GetStatusLabel(record.Summary.OperationalStatus)
                </span>

                <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">
                    @(record.Summary.IsSpecialized ? "Especializada" : "No especializada")
                </span>
            </div>

            <div class="life-hero-buttons">
                <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light life-hero-edit"
                   href="@($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record/edit")">
                    Editar datos técnicos
                </a>

                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light life-hero-refresh"
                        @onclick="LoadAsync"
                        disabled="@isLoading">
                    @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

        </div>

            <span>Días restantes</span>
            <strong>@GetMaintenanceDaysText()</strong>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

@code {
    private string GetMaintenanceAlertClass()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-neutral";
        }

        if (days.Value < 0)
        {
            return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-danger";
        }

        if (days.Value <= 30)
        {
            return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-warning";
        }

        return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-success";
    }

    private string GetMaintenanceAlertTitle()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "Sin fecha programada";
        }

        if (days.Value < 0)
        {
            return "Mantenimiento vencido";
        }

        if (days.Value <= 30)
        {
            return "Mantenimiento próximo";
        }

        return "Mantenimiento al día";
    }

    private string GetMaintenanceAlertDescription()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "La herramienta no tiene una fecha de próximo mantenimiento registrada.";
        }

        if (days.Value < 0)
        {
            return $"El mantenimiento está vencido hace {Math.Abs(days.Value)} día(s).";
        }

        if (days.Value == 0)
        {
            return "El mantenimiento está programado para hoy.";
        }

        if (days.Value <= 30)
        {
            return $"El mantenimiento está próximo. Faltan {days.Value} día(s).";
        }

        return $"La herramienta se encuentra al día. Faltan {days.Value} día(s) para el próximo mantenimiento.";
    }

    private string GetMaintenanceDaysText()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "-";
        }

        return days.Value < 0
            ? $"Vencido {Math.Abs(days.Value)} día(s)"
            : $"{days.Value} día(s)";
    }

    private int? GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance()
    {
        if (record?.MaintenancePlan?.NextMaintenanceDate is null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        var next = record.MaintenancePlan.NextMaintenanceDate.Value.Date;
        var today = DateTime.Today;

        return (next - today).Days;
    }

    private static string ShowDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue
            ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy")
            : "-";
    }

    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string BackButtonText { get; set; } = "? Volver al inventario";
    private string BackUrl { get; set; } = "/tools";
    private TechnicalLifeRecordModel? record;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        ConfigureBackNavigation();
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar la hoja de vida técnica. Valida que la API esté activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }


    private void ConfigureBackNavigation()
    {
        var uri = NavigationManager.ToAbsoluteUri(NavigationManager.Uri);
        var query = uri.Query ?? string.Empty;

        if (query.Contains("from=life-records", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            BackButtonText = "? Volver a hoja de vidas del AF";
            BackUrl = "/technical-life-records";
            return;
        }

        BackButtonText = "? Volver al inventario";
        BackUrl = "/tools";
    }
    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo(BackUrl);
    }

    private string BuildApiUrl(string? relativeUrl)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(relativeUrl))
        {
            return "#";
        }

        if (relativeUrl.StartsWith("http", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return relativeUrl;
        }

        var baseUrl = Configuration["NaviApi:BaseUrl"] ?? "http://localhost:5218";

        return $"{baseUrl.TrimEnd('/')}/{relativeUrl.TrimStart('/')}";
    }

    private async Task PrintLifeRecord()
    {
        await JsRuntime.InvokeVoidAsync("window.print");
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string NumberText(int? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString() : "-";
    }

    private static string BoolText(bool? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? BoolText(value.Value) : "-";
    }

    private static string BoolText(bool value)
    {
        return value ? "Sí" : "No";
    }

    private static string DateText(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "-";
    }

    private static string DateTimeText(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "-";
    }

    private static int GetPercent(int? value)
    {
        return Math.Clamp(value ?? 0, 0, 100);
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "Disponible",
            "Assigned" => "Asignada",
            "Loaned" => "Prestada",
            "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
            "Damaged" => "Dańada",
            "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
            "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
            "Inconsistent" => "Inconsistente",
            "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
            "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente de baja",
            "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Sin estado" : status
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusBadgeClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "badge bg-success",
            "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
            "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
            "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
            "Inconsistent" => "badge bg-danger",
            "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public EquipmentInfo EquipmentInformation { get; set; } = new();
        public TechnicalInfo TechnicalSpecifications { get; set; } = new();
        public WarrantyInfo Warranty { get; set; } = new();
        public UsefulLifeInfo UsefulLife { get; set; } = new();
        public MaintenancePlanInfo MaintenancePlan { get; set; } = new();
        public List<AccessoryInfo> Accessories { get; set; } = new();
        public List<SafePracticeInfo> SafePractices { get; set; } = new();
        public DocumentGroupInfo Documents { get; set; } = new();
        public List<MaintenanceScheduleInfo> MaintenanceSchedule { get; set; } = new();
        public List<LifeCycleEventInfo> LifeCycleEvents { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string SyncStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class EquipmentInfo
    {
        public string? InternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AcquisitionDate { get; set; }
        public string? UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        public string? ZoneCode { get; set; }
        public string? ZoneName { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalInfo
    {
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class WarrantyInfo
    {
        public bool HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class UsefulLifeInfo
    {
        public DateTime? StartDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? EndDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
        public int? ElapsedDays { get; set; }
        public int? RemainingDays { get; set; }
        public int? UsedPercentage { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenancePlanInfo
    {
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public int TotalMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
        public int CompletedMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
        public int PendingMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class AccessoryInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Quantity { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool IsMeasurementEquipment { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class SafePracticeInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string PracticeName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Description { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int SortOrder { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class DocumentGroupInfo
    {
        public List<DocumentInfo> PhotoRecords { get; set; } = new();
        public List<DocumentInfo> TechnicalDocuments { get; set; } = new();
        public List<DocumentInfo> MaintenanceEvidences { get; set; } = new();
        public List<DocumentInfo> AllDocuments { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class DocumentInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string DocumentType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string FileName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ContentType { get; set; }
        public long SizeBytes { get; set; }
        public string? UploadedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime UploadedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? DownloadUrl { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceScheduleInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string MaintenanceNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Type { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime? ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public string? Technician { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? MaintenanceActivities { get; set; }
        public string? ExecutionNotes { get; set; }
        public string? InvoiceNumber { get; set; }
        public Guid? EvidenceDocumentId { get; set; }
        public string? EvidenceFileName { get; set; }
        public string? EvidenceDownloadUrl { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePosition { get; set; }
        public bool? IsToolOperational { get; set; }
        public decimal? Cost { get; set; }
        public string? Result { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class LifeCycleEventInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PreviousValue { get; set; }
        public string? NewValue { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? EventDate { get; set; }
    }
}

============================================================
FILE: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Components\Pages\TechnicalLifeRecordEdit.razor

@page "/tools/{ToolId:guid}/technical-life-record/edit"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>Editar datos técnicos - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="TechnicalLifeRecord.Edit" ModuleName="Editar hoja de vida">

<div class="page-header">
    <div>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm mb-2" @onclick="GoBack">
            ? Volver a hoja de vida
        </button>

        <h1>Editar datos técnicos</h1>
        <p>Actualiza la información técnica, garantía, vida útil y plan de mantenimiento de la herramienta.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Cargando..." : "Recargar")
    </button>
</div>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(successMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-success">
        @successMessage
    </div>
}

@if (isLoading && editModel is null)
{
    <div class="alert alert-info">
        Cargando datos técnicos...
    </div>
}
else if (editModel is not null)
{
    <section class="life-record-cover">
        <div>
            <span class="life-record-label">Edición técnica</span>
            <h2>@toolName</h2>
            <p>@internalCode</p>
        </div>

        <div class="life-record-cover-status">
            <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">Formulario Admin</span>
        </div>
    </section>

    <EditForm Model="editModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
        <div class="technical-edit-grid">
            <section class="life-record-section">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <span>1</span>
                    <h2>Información del equipo</h2>
                </div>

                <div class="edit-form-grid">
                    <div>
                        <label>Marca</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.Brand" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Modelo</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.Model" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Serial</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.SerialNumber" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Activo fijo</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.FixedAssetCode" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Código Fenix365</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.FenixCode" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Fecha adquisición</label>
                        <InputDate class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.AcquisitionDate" />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <section class="life-record-section">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <span>2</span>
                    <h2>Especificaciones técnicas</h2>
                </div>

                <div class="edit-form-grid">
                    <div>
                        <label>Voltaje</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.Voltage" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Capacidad de carga</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.LoadCapacity" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Proveedor</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.Provider" />
                    </div>

                    <div class="form-check-row">
                        <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="editModel.RequiresMaintenance" />
                        <label>Requiere mantenimiento</label>
                    </div>

                    <div class="form-check-row">
                        <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="editModel.RequiresPreOperationalCheck" />
                        <label>Requiere preoperacional</label>
                    </div>

                    <div class="form-check-row">
                        <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="editModel.RequiresCertification" />
                        <label>Requiere certificación</label>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Fecha vencimiento certificación</label>
                        <InputDate class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.CertificationExpirationDate" />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>

        <div class="technical-edit-grid">
            <section class="life-record-section">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <span>3</span>
                    <h2>Garantía</h2>
                </div>

                <div class="edit-form-grid">
                    <div class="form-check-row">
                        <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="editModel.HasWarranty" />
                        <label>Tiene garantía</label>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Tipo de garantía</label>
                        <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.WarrantyType" />
                    </div>
                </div>

            <section class="life-record-section">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <span>4</span>
                    <h2>Vida útil</h2>
                </div>

                <div class="edit-form-grid">
                    <div>
                        <label>Fecha inicial vida útil</label>
                        <InputDate class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.UsefulLifeStartDate" />
                    </div>

                        <label>Vida útil meses</label>
                        <InputNumber class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.UsefulLifeMonths" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label>Vida útil días</label>
                        <InputNumber class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.UsefulLifeDays" />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>

        <section class="life-record-section">
            <div class="section-title">
                <span>5</span>
                <h2>Plan de mantenimiento</h2>
            </div>

            <div class="edit-form-grid three-columns">
                <div>
                    <label>Último mantenimiento</label>
                    <InputDate class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.LastMaintenanceDate" />
                </div>

                <div>
                    <label>Próximo mantenimiento</label>
                    <InputDate class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.NextMaintenanceDate" />
                </div>

                <div>
                    <label>Periodicidad meses</label>
                    <InputNumber class="form-control" @bind-Value="editModel.MaintenancePeriodMonths" />
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="life-record-section">
            <div class="section-title">
                <span>6</span>
                <h2>Observación del cambio</h2>
            </div>

            <InputTextArea class="form-control technical-observation"
                           @bind-Value="editModel.Observation"
                           placeholder="Describe el motivo de la actualización..." />
        </section>

        <div class="technical-edit-actions">
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="GoBack">
                Cancelar
            </button>

            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" disabled="@isSaving">
                @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar datos técnicos")
            </button>
        </div>
    </EditForm>
}

</PermissionGuard>

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string internalCode = string.Empty;
    private string toolName = string.Empty;
    private TechnicalEditModel? editModel;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordForEditModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            if (record is null)
            {
                errorMessage = "No se encontró información técnica para la herramienta.";
                return;
            }

            internalCode = record.Summary.InternalCode;
            toolName = record.Summary.Name;

            editModel = new TechnicalEditModel
            {
                Brand = record.EquipmentInformation.Brand,
                Model = record.EquipmentInformation.Model,
                SerialNumber = record.EquipmentInformation.SerialNumber,
                FixedAssetCode = record.EquipmentInformation.FixedAssetCode,
                FenixCode = record.EquipmentInformation.FenixCode,
                AcquisitionDate = record.EquipmentInformation.AcquisitionDate?.Date,

                Voltage = record.TechnicalSpecifications.Voltage,
                LoadCapacity = record.TechnicalSpecifications.LoadCapacity,
                Provider = record.TechnicalSpecifications.Provider,
                RequiresMaintenance = record.TechnicalSpecifications.RequiresMaintenance,
                RequiresPreOperationalCheck = record.TechnicalSpecifications.RequiresPreOperationalCheck,
                RequiresCertification = record.TechnicalSpecifications.RequiresCertification,
                CertificationExpirationDate = record.TechnicalSpecifications.CertificationExpirationDate?.Date,

                HasWarranty = record.Warranty.HasWarranty,
                WarrantyType = record.Warranty.WarrantyType,

                UsefulLifeStartDate = record.UsefulLife.StartDate?.Date,
                UsefulLifeMonths = record.UsefulLife.UsefulLifeMonths,
                UsefulLifeDays = record.UsefulLife.UsefulLifeDays,

                LastMaintenanceDate = record.MaintenancePlan.LastMaintenanceDate?.Date,
                NextMaintenanceDate = record.MaintenancePlan.NextMaintenanceDate?.Date,
                MaintenancePeriodMonths = record.MaintenancePlan.MaintenancePeriodMonths,

                UpdatedBy = "yquinto",
                Observation = "Actualización de datos técnicos desde Admin."
            };
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar la información técnica. Valida que la API esté activa. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (editModel is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-data", editModel);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudieron actualizar los datos técnicos. Código: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "Datos técnicos actualizados correctamente.";
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron actualizar los datos técnicos. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalEditModel
    {
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AcquisitionDate { get; set; }
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UsefulLifeStartDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
        public string? UpdatedBy { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordForEditModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public EquipmentInfo EquipmentInformation { get; set; } = new();
        public TechnicalInfo TechnicalSpecifications { get; set; } = new();
        public WarrantyInfo Warranty { get; set; } = new();
        public UsefulLifeInfo UsefulLife { get; set; } = new();
        public MaintenancePlanInfo MaintenancePlan { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class EquipmentInfo
    {
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AcquisitionDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalInfo
    {
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class WarrantyInfo
    {
        public bool HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class UsefulLifeInfo
    {
        public DateTime? StartDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenancePlanInfo
    {
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/tools/{ToolId:guid}/accessories"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>Accesorios - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="TechnicalLifeRecord.Edit" ModuleName="Accesorios">

<div class="page-header">
    <div>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm mb-2" @onclick="GoBack">
            ? Volver a hoja de vida
        </button>

        <h1>Gestión de accesorios</h1>
        <p>Agrega, edita o desactiva accesorios asociados a la herramienta.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Cargando..." : "Recargar")
    </button>
</div>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(successMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-success">
        @successMessage
    </div>
}

<section class="life-record-cover">
    <div>
        <span class="life-record-label">Accesorios</span>
        <h2>@toolName</h2>
        <p>@internalCode</p>
    </div>

    <div class="life-record-cover-status">
        <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">@accessories.Count accesorio(s)</span>
    </div>
</section>

<div class="accessories-manage-grid">
    <section class="life-record-section">
        <div class="section-title">
            <span>1</span>
            <h2>@(editingAccessoryId.HasValue ? "Editar accesorio" : "Nuevo accesorio")</h2>
        </div>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <div class="edit-form-grid">
                <div>
                    <label>Nombre del accesorio</label>
                    <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Name" placeholder="Ej: CARGADOR" />
                </div>

                <div>
                    <label>Cantidad</label>
                    <InputNumber class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Quantity" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-check-row">
                    <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.RequiresMaintenance" />
                    <label>Requiere mantenimiento</label>
                </div>

                <div class="form-check-row">
                    <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsMeasurementEquipment" />
                    <label>Equipo de medición</label>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="mt-3">
                <label>Observación</label>
                <InputTextArea class="form-control technical-observation"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.Observation"
                               placeholder="Observación del accesorio..." />
            </div>

            <div class="technical-edit-actions static-actions mt-3">
                @if (editingAccessoryId.HasValue)
                {
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="CancelEdit">
                        Cancelar edición
                    </button>
                }

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" disabled="@isSaving">
                    @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : editingAccessoryId.HasValue ? "Actualizar accesorio" : "Crear accesorio")
                </button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </section>

    <section class="life-record-section">
        <div class="section-title">
            <span>2</span>
            <h2>Accesorios registrados</h2>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-info mb-0">Cargando accesorios...</div>
        }
        else if (accessories.Count == 0)
        {
            <p class="text-muted mb-0">No hay accesorios registrados para esta herramienta.</p>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-sm table-bordered excel-table align-middle">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Accesorio</th>
                            <th>Cantidad</th>
                            <th>Mantenimiento</th>
                            <th>Medición</th>
                            <th>Observación</th>
                            <th style="width: 170px;">Acciones</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in accessories)
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td><strong>@item.Name</strong></td>

                                <td>@BoolText(item.IsMeasurementEquipment)</td>
                                <td>@Show(item.Observation)</td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="d-flex gap-1 flex-wrap">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => StartEdit(item)">
                                            Editar
                                        </button>

                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(item)">
                                            Desactivar
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </section>
