@code {
    private bool CanAssignAsset => AuthSession.HasPermission("AssetAssignment.Assign");
    private bool CanReturnAsset => AuthSession.HasPermission("AssetAssignment.Return");
    private bool CanCurrentMovement => form.AssignmentType == "Warehouse" ? CanReturnAsset : CanAssignAsset;

    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<ToolItem> tools = new();
    private List<ResponsibleItem> responsibles = new();
    private List<BranchItem> branches = new();
    private List<LocationItem> locations = new();

    private AssignmentForm form = new();

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string search = string.Empty;
    private string selectedResponsibleId = string.Empty;
    private string historyResponsibleId = string.Empty;
    private string historySearch = string.Empty;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    private IEnumerable<LocationItem> AvailableLocations =>
        form.BranchId is null
            ? locations
            : locations.Where(x => x.BranchId == form.BranchId);

    private IEnumerable<ToolItem> FilteredTools =>
        tools
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search) ||
                        x.InternalCode.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        x.Name.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.SerialNumber ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            .Where(x =>
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedResponsibleId) ||
                (selectedResponsibleId == "SIN_RESPONSABLE" && x.ResponsiblePersonId is null) ||
                (x.ResponsiblePersonId.HasValue && x.ResponsiblePersonId.Value.ToString() == selectedResponsibleId))
            .OrderBy(x => x.InternalCode);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    
        private static bool IsToolOnly(ToolItem item)
    {
        var typeName = item.ToolTypeName ?? string.Empty;
        var typeCode = item.ToolTypeCode ?? string.Empty;

        if (typeName.Equals("Activo fijo", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            typeName.Equals("HERRAMIENTA", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            typeCode.Equals("HERRAMIENTA", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            typeCode.Equals("HERR", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            typeCode.Equals("TOOL", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var code = item.InternalCode ?? string.Empty;
        var name = item.Name ?? string.Empty;

        var isCellPhone =
            code.Contains("-CEL-", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            name.Contains("Celular corporativo", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            name.Contains("Celular", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        var isLaptop =
            code.Contains("-PORTATIL-", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            code.Contains("-COMPUTADOR-", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && name.Contains("portátil", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            name.Contains("Computador portátil", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        if (isCellPhone || isLaptop)
        {
            return false;
        }

        // Fallback para assignment-board:
        // ese endpoint no siempre trae ToolTypeName/ToolTypeCode.
        // Si no es celular ni portátil, se considera activo fijo para esta vista.
        return true;
    }
    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;

        try
        {
            tools = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolItem>>("api/tools/assignment-board") ?? new();
            responsibles = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ResponsibleItem>>("api/settings/responsibles") ?? new();
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchItem>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
            locations = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<LocationItem>>("api/settings/warehouses") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudo cargar la información: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void OpenHistory()
    {
        var query = new List<string>();

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(historyResponsibleId))
        {
            query.Add($"responsiblePersonId={Uri.EscapeDataString(historyResponsibleId)}");
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(historySearch))
        {
            query.Add($"q={Uri.EscapeDataString(historySearch)}");
        }

        var url = query.Any()
            ? $"/asset-assignment-history?{string.Join("&", query)}"
            : "/asset-assignment-history";

        NavigationManager.NavigateTo(url);
    }

    private void LoadSelectedTool()
    {
        var tool = tools.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == form.ToolId);

        if (tool is not null)
        {
            form.BranchId = tool.BranchId;
            form.LocationId = tool.LocationId;
            form.ResponsiblePersonId = tool.ResponsiblePersonId;
        }
    }

    private void SelectForAssignment(ToolItem tool)
    {
        form.ToolId = tool.Id;
        form.AssignmentType = "Responsible";
        form.BranchId = tool.BranchId;
        form.LocationId = tool.LocationId;
        form.ResponsiblePersonId = tool.ResponsiblePersonId;
        form.AssignmentDate = DateTime.Today;
        form.Observation = $"Asignación del activo {tool.InternalCode}.";
    }

    private void SelectForReturn(ToolItem tool)
    {
        form.ToolId = tool.Id;
        form.AssignmentType = "Warehouse";
        form.BranchId = tool.BranchId;
        form.LocationId = tool.LocationId;
        form.ResponsiblePersonId = null;
        form.AssignmentDate = DateTime.Today;
        form.Observation = $"Regreso de activo fijo {tool.InternalCode} a almacén/taller.";
    }

    private void OnBranchChanged()
    {
        if (form.LocationId.HasValue &&
            !locations.Any(x => x.Id == form.LocationId && x.BranchId == form.BranchId))
        {
            form.LocationId = null;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (form.ToolId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Debe seleccionar un activo fijo.");
            return;
        }

        if (form.AssignmentType == "Responsible" && form.ResponsiblePersonId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Debe seleccionar un responsable.");
            return;
        }

        if (form.AssignmentType == "Warehouse" && (form.BranchId is null || form.LocationId is null))
        {
            ShowError("Debe seleccionar sede y almacén/taller destino.");
            return;
        }

        isSaving = true;

        var request = new
        {
            assignmentType = form.AssignmentType,
            responsiblePersonId = form.ResponsiblePersonId,
            branchId = form.BranchId,
            locationId = form.LocationId,
            assignmentDate = form.AssignmentDate,
            observation = form.Observation,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            var response = await Api.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{form.ToolId}/assign-fixed-asset", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(form.AssignmentType == "Warehouse"
                ? "Activo fijo regresada correctamente."
                : "Asignación registrada correctamente.");

            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando movimiento: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        form = new AssignmentForm();
    }

    private static string Show(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;

    private static string ShowDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "Disponible",
        "Assigned" => "Asignada",
        "Loaned" => "Prestada",
        "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
        "Damaged" => "Dańada",
        "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
        "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
        _ => status
    };

    private static string GetStatusBadge(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "badge bg-success",
        "Assigned" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
        "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
        "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
        "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
        "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
        "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-secondary",
        _ => "badge bg-secondary"
    };

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class AssignmentForm
    {
        public Guid? ToolId { get; set; }
        public string AssignmentType { get; set; } = "Responsible";
        public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public Guid? LocationId { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AssignmentDate { get; set; } = DateTime.Today;
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolItem
    {
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public Guid? LocationId { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePosition { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime? LastAssignmentDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? LastReturnDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ResponsibleItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string FullName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Position { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class BranchItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class LocationItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
    }
}

@code {
    [SupplyParameterFromQuery(Name = "responsiblePersonId")]
    public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }

    [SupplyParameterFromQuery(Name = "q")]
    public string? Query { get; set; }

    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<ResponsibleItem> responsibles = new();
    private List<AssignmentHistoryItem> historyItems = new();

    private bool isLoading;
    private string selectedResponsibleId = string.Empty;
    private string search = string.Empty;

    private IEnumerable<AssignmentHistoryItem> FilteredHistory =>
        historyItems
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search) ||
                        x.ToolInternalCode.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        x.ToolName.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.ToolSerialNumber ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.Detail ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.ReturnDetail ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.CurrentResponsibleName ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.AssignedAt);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        selectedResponsibleId = ResponsiblePersonId?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
        search = Query ?? string.Empty;

        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        responsibles = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ResponsibleItem>>("api/settings/responsibles") ?? new();
        await LoadHistoryAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadHistoryAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;

        try
        {
            var endpoint = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedResponsibleId)
                ? "api/tools/assignment-history"
                : $"api/tools/assignment-history?responsiblePersonId={selectedResponsibleId}";

            historyItems = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<AssignmentHistoryItem>>(endpoint) ?? new();
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task ClearFilters()
    {
        selectedResponsibleId = string.Empty;
        search = string.Empty;
        await LoadHistoryAsync();
    }

    private static string Show(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;

    private static string ShowDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "Disponible",
        "Assigned" => "Asignada",
        "Loaned" => "Prestada",
        "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
        "Damaged" => "Dańada",
        "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
        "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
        _ => status
    };

    private static string GetStatusBadge(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "badge bg-success",
        "Assigned" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
        "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
        "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
        "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
        "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
        "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-secondary",
        _ => "badge bg-secondary"
    };

    private sealed class ResponsibleItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string FullName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class AssignmentHistoryItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string ToolInternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ToolName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ToolSerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? CurrentBranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? CurrentLocationName { get; set; }
        public Guid? CurrentResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public string? CurrentResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? CurrentStatus { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AssignedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReturnedAt { get; set; }
        public string? ReturnDetail { get; set; }
        public string? Detail { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/asset-availability"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Disponible y Ubicación de Herramientas - NAVI</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="AssetAvailability.View" ModuleName="Disponible y Ubicación de Herramientas">

<section class="af-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="af-pill">ACTIVOS FIJOS</span>
        <h2>Disponible y Ubicación de Herramientas</h2>
        <p>Gestiona disponibilidad, sede, almacén, taller o ubicación interna de las herramientas.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="af-banner-side">
        <div class="af-status-box">
            <span>Herramientas</span>
            <strong>@FilteredTools.Count() visibles</strong>
        </div>

        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" @onclick="LoadAsync">
            Actualizar
        </button>
    </div>
</section>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
{
    <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
}

<section class="af-grid">
    <aside class="af-card">
        <h3>Gestionar ubicación</h3>

        <div class="mb-2">
            <label class="form-label">Herramienta</label>
            <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.ToolId" @bind-Value:after="LoadSelectedTool">
                <option value="">Seleccione activo</option>
                @foreach (var tool in tools.OrderBy(x => x.InternalCode))
                {
                    <option value="@tool.Id">@tool.InternalCode - @tool.Name</option>
                }
            </InputSelect>
        </div>

        <div class="mb-2">
            <label class="form-label">Sede</label>
            <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.BranchId" @bind-Value:after="OnBranchChanged">
                <option value="">Seleccione sede</option>
                @foreach (var branch in branches)
                {
                    <option value="@branch.Id">@branch.Code - @branch.Name</option>
                }
            </InputSelect>
        </div>

        <div class="mb-2">
            <label class="form-label">Almacén / Taller / Ubicación</label>
            <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.LocationId">
                <option value="">Sin ubicación</option>
                @foreach (var location in AvailableLocations)
                {
                    <option value="@location.Id">@location.Code - @location.Name</option>
                }
            </InputSelect>
        </div>

        <div class="mb-2">
            <label class="form-label">Estado operativo</label>
            <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.OperationalStatus">
                <option value="Available">Disponible</option>
                <option value="Assigned">Asignada</option>
                <option value="Loaned">Prestada</option>
                <option value="InMaintenance">En mantenimiento</option>
                <option value="Damaged">Dańada</option>
                <option value="NotSuitable">No apta</option>
                <option value="PendingValidation">Pendiente validación</option>
                <option value="NotLocated">No localizada</option>
                <option value="PendingDisposal">Pendiente baja</option>
                <option value="Disposed">Dada de baja</option>
            </InputSelect>
        </div>

        <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Observación</label>
            <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.Observation" rows="3" />
        </div>

        <div class="d-grid gap-2">
            <button class="btn btn-primary" @onclick="SaveAsync" disabled="@isSaving">
                @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar cambios")
            </button>

            <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="ClearForm">
                Limpiar
            </button>
        </div>
    </aside>

    <section class="af-card">
        <div class="af-table-header">
            <div>
                <h3>Herramientas por disponibilidad</h3>
                <p>Selecciona una herramienta para modificar su ubicación.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="af-filters">
                <input class="form-control form-control-sm" placeholder="Buscar código, nombre, serial..." @bind="search" @bind:event="oninput" />

                <select class="form-select form-select-sm" @bind="selectedBranchCode">
                    <option value="">Todas las sedes</option>
                    @foreach (var branch in branches)
                    {
                        <option value="@branch.Code">@branch.Code</option>
                    }
                </select>

                <select class="form-select form-select-sm" @bind="selectedStatus">
                    <option value="">Todos los estados</option>
                    <option value="Available">Disponible</option>
                    <option value="Assigned">Asignada</option>
                    <option value="Loaned">Prestada</option>
                    <option value="InMaintenance">En mantenimiento</option>
                    <option value="Damaged">Dańada</option>
                    <option value="NotLocated">No localizada</option>
                </select>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <p>Cargando herramientas...</p>
        }
        else
        {
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle af-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Código</th>
                        <th>Activo</th>
                        <th>Sede</th>
                        <th>Ubicación</th>
                        <th>Responsable</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Acción</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var tool in FilteredTools)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td><strong>@tool.InternalCode</strong></td>
                            <td>
                                <div>@tool.Name</div>
                                <small class="text-muted">@tool.SerialNumber</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>@Show(tool.BranchCode)</td>
                            <td>@Show(tool.LocationName)</td>
                            <td>@Show(tool.ResponsiblePersonName)</td>
                            <td><span class="@GetStatusBadge(tool.OperationalStatus)">@GetStatusLabel(tool.OperationalStatus)</span></td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <button class="avail-action avail-action-primary" @onclick="() => SelectTool(tool)">
                                    Gestionar
                                </button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        }
    </section>
</section>

</PermissionGuard>

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<ToolItem> tools = new();
    private List<BranchItem> branches = new();
    private List<LocationItem> locations = new();

    private AvailabilityForm form = new();

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string search = string.Empty;
    private string selectedBranchCode = string.Empty;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    private IEnumerable<LocationItem> AvailableLocations =>
        form.BranchId is null
            ? locations
            : locations.Where(x => x.BranchId == form.BranchId);

    private IEnumerable<ToolItem> FilteredTools =>
        tools
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search) ||
                        x.InternalCode.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        x.Name.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.SerialNumber ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedBranchCode) || x.BranchCode == selectedBranchCode)
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.OperationalStatus == selectedStatus)
            .OrderBy(x => x.BranchCode)
            .ThenBy(x => x.InternalCode);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    
    private static bool IsToolOnly(ToolItem item)
    {
        var typeName = item.ToolTypeName ?? string.Empty;
        var typeCode = item.ToolTypeCode ?? string.Empty;

        return typeName.Equals("Herramienta", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            || typeName.Equals("HERRAMIENTA", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            || typeCode.Equals("HERRAMIENTA", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            || typeCode.Equals("TOOL", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }
    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;

        try
        {
                        tools = (await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolItem>>("api/tools") ?? new())
                .Where(IsToolOnly)
                .ToList();
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchItem>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
            locations = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<LocationItem>>("api/settings/warehouses") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudo cargar la información: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void SelectTool(ToolItem tool)
    {
        form = new AvailabilityForm
        {
            ToolId = tool.Id,
            BranchId = tool.BranchId,
            LocationId = tool.LocationId,
            OperationalStatus = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tool.OperationalStatus) ? "Available" : tool.OperationalStatus
        };
    }

    private void LoadSelectedTool()
    {
        var tool = tools.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == form.ToolId);

        if (tool is not null)
        {
            SelectTool(tool);
        }
    }

    private void OnBranchChanged()
    {
        if (form.LocationId.HasValue &&
            !locations.Any(x => x.Id == form.LocationId && x.BranchId == form.BranchId))
        {
            form.LocationId = null;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (form.ToolId is null || form.BranchId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Debe seleccionar activo y sede.");
            return;
        }

        isSaving = true;

        var request = new
        {
            branchId = form.BranchId.Value,
            locationId = form.LocationId,
            operationalStatus = form.OperationalStatus,
            observation = form.Observation,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            var response = await Api.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{form.ToolId}/availability-location", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Disponibilidad y ubicación actualizadas correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando cambios: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        form = new AvailabilityForm();
    }

    private static string Show(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "Disponible",
        "Assigned" => "Asignada",
        "Loaned" => "Prestada",
        "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
        "Damaged" => "Dańada",
        "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
        "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
        "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
        "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente baja",
        "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
        _ => status
    };

    private static string GetStatusBadge(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "badge bg-success",
        "Assigned" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
        "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
        "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
        "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
        "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
        "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
        "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
        _ => "badge bg-secondary"
    };

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class AvailabilityForm
    {
        public Guid? ToolId { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public Guid? LocationId { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = "Available";
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolItem
    {
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public Guid? LocationId { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class BranchItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class LocationItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/integrations/fenix365"

<PageTitle>Integración Fenix365 / Dynamics</PageTitle>

<div class="page-header">
    <div>
        <h1>Integración Fenix365 / Dynamics</h1>
        <p>Estado de sincronización, logs, errores, reintentos y comparación contra ERP.</p>
    </div>

@page "/maintenance"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components.Security
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Services.Auth
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject WebAuthSessionService AuthSession

<PageTitle>Consultar Mantenimientos</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="Maintenance.View" ModuleName="Consultar Mantenimientos">

<section class="consult-hero">
    <div>
        <span class="consult-pill">OPERACIONES · CONTROL DE MANTENIMIENTO</span>
        <h2>Consultar mantenimientos</h2>
        <p>Gestiona solicitudes en revisión, aprobadas, programadas, en ejecución y cerradas.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="consult-side">
        <div class="consult-status-box">
            <span>Solicitudes</span>
            <strong>@requests.Count visibles</strong>
        </div>

        <button class="consult-outline-btn" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync">
            Actualizar
        </button>
    </div>
</section>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(successMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-success">@successMessage</div>
}

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">@errorMessage</div>
}

<section class="consult-kpi-grid">
    <article class="consult-kpi-card">
        <span>Total</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count</strong>
        <small>Solicitudes</small>
    </article>

    <article class="consult-kpi-card warning">
        <span>En revisión</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count(x => x.Status == "InReview")</strong>
        <small>Por aprobar</small>
    </article>

    <article class="consult-kpi-card success">
        <span>Aprobadas</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count(x => x.Status == "Approved")</strong>
        <small>Por programar</small>
    </article>

    <article class="consult-kpi-card info">
        <span>Programadas</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count(x => x.Status == "Scheduled")</strong>
        <small>Con fecha</small>
    </article>

    <article class="consult-kpi-card purple">
        <span>En ejecución</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count(x => x.Status == "InExecution")</strong>
        <small>En proceso</small>
    </article>

    <article class="consult-kpi-card danger">
        <span>Críticas</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count(x => x.Priority == "Crítica" || x.IsSafetyRisk)</strong>
        <small>Riesgo operativo/SSTA</small>
    </article>

    <article class="consult-kpi-card">
        <span>Cerradas</span>
        <strong>@requests.Count(x => x.Status == "Closed")</strong>
        <small>Finalizadas</small>
    </article>
</section>

<section class="consult-card">
    <div class="consult-card-title">
        <div>
            <h3>Listado operativo</h3>
            <p>Filtra, revisa y ejecuta acciones sobre las solicitudes de mantenimiento.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="consult-filters">
            <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedStatus">
                <option value="">Todos los estados</option>
                <option value="Draft">Borrador</option>
                <option value="InReview">En revisión</option>
                <option value="Approved">Aprobado</option>
                <option value="Scheduled">Programado</option>
                <option value="InExecution">En ejecución</option>
                <option value="Closed">Cerrado</option>
                <option value="Rejected">Rechazado</option>
                <option value="Canceled">Cancelado</option>
            </select>

            <input class="form-control"
                   placeholder="Buscar solicitud, activo, problema, técnico..."
                   @bind="searchText"
                   @bind:event="oninput" />

            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync">
                Filtrar
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (isLoading)
    {
        <div class="consult-empty">Cargando mantenimientos...</div>
    }
    else if (!FilteredRequests.Any())
    {
        <div class="consult-empty">No hay mantenimientos con los filtros aplicados.</div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="consult-table-wrapper">
            <table class="consult-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Solicitud</th>
                        <th>Activo / Título</th>
                        <th>Tipo</th>
                        <th>Prioridad</th>
                        <th>Preparador</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th>Fechas</th>
                        <th>Responsables</th>
                        <th>Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var item in FilteredRequests)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <strong>@item.RequestNumber</strong>
                                <small>@item.ToolInternalCode</small>
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                <strong>@item.Title</strong>
                                <small>@(item.ToolName ?? item.ProblemDescription)</small>
                            </td>

                            <td>@item.RequestType</td>
                            <td>@item.Priority</td>
                            <td>@item.PreparedBy</td>

                            <td>
                                <span class="@GetStatusClass(item.Status)">
                                    @GetStatusLabel(item.Status)
                                </span>
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                <small>Creada: @FormatDate(item.CreatedAt)</small>
                                <small>Programada: @FormatDate(item.ScheduledAt)</small>
                                <small>Cerrada: @FormatDate(item.ClosedAt)</small>
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                <small>Aprobó: @(item.ApprovedBy ?? "—")</small>
                                <small>Técnico: @(item.AssignedTechnician ?? "—")</small>
                                <small>Cerró: @(item.ClosedBy ?? "—")</small>
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                <div class="row-actions">
                                    @if (item.ToolAssetId.HasValue)
                                    {
                                        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="@($"/tools/{item.ToolAssetId}/technical-life-record")">
                                            Hoja vida
                                        </a>

                                        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="@($"/tools/{item.ToolAssetId}/maintenance-schedule")">
                                            Cronograma
                                        </a>
                                    }

                                    @if (item.Status == "Draft" && CanRequest)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => SubmitAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Enviar
                                        </button>
                                    }

                                    @if (item.Status == "InReview" && CanApprove)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-success" @onclick="() => ApproveAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Aprobar
                                        </button>

                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => RejectAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Rechazar
                                        </button>
                                    }

                                    @if (item.Status == "Approved" && CanExecute)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => ScheduleAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Programar
                                        </button>

                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" @onclick="() => StartAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Ejecutar
                                        </button>
                                    }

                                    @if ((item.Status == "Scheduled" || item.Status == "InExecution" || item.Status == "Approved") && CanClose)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark" @onclick="() => CloseAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Cerrar
                                        </button>
                                    }

                                    @if (item.Status != "Closed" && item.Status != "Canceled" && CanClose)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="() => CancelAsync(item.Id)">
                                            Cancelar
                                        </button>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    }
</section>

</PermissionGuard>

@code {
    private List<MaintenanceRequestItem> requests = new();
    private bool isLoading;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private bool CanRequest => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Request");
    private bool CanApprove => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Close") || AuthSession.HasPermission("Purchases.Approve");
    private bool CanExecute => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Execute") || AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Close");
    private bool CanClose => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Close");

    private IEnumerable<MaintenanceRequestItem> FilteredRequests =>
        requests
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.Status == selectedStatus)
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.CreatedAt);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador" : AuthSession.RoleName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleCode) ? "ADMIN" : AuthSession.RoleCode);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Permissions", string.Join(";", AuthSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>()));

        return api;
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            requests = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<MaintenanceRequestItem>>("api/maintenance-requests") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar los mantenimientos: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SubmitAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/submit", "Solicitud enviada a revisión.");
    private async Task ApproveAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/approve", "Solicitud aprobada.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Aprobada desde consulta de mantenimientos." });
    private async Task RejectAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/reject", "Solicitud rechazada.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Rechazada desde consulta de mantenimientos." });
    private async Task ScheduleAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/schedule", "Mantenimiento programado.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Programado desde consulta.", AssignedTechnician = "tecnico", ScheduledAt = DateTime.Now.AddDays(1) });
    private async Task StartAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/start", "Mantenimiento iniciado.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Ejecución iniciada desde consulta." });
    private async Task CloseAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/close", "Mantenimiento cerrado y vinculado al cronograma si tenía activo.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Mantenimiento cerrado desde consulta." });
    private async Task CancelAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/cancel", "Solicitud cancelada.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Cancelada desde consulta de mantenimientos." });

    private async Task ExecuteActionAsync(string endpoint, string success, object? body = null)
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(endpoint, body ?? new { });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiError>();
                errorMessage = error?.Message ?? "No se pudo ejecutar la acción.";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = success;
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error ejecutando acción: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(MaintenanceRequestItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText)) return true;

        var value = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(item.RequestNumber, value) ||
               Contains(item.Title, value) ||
               Contains(item.ProblemDescription, value) ||
               Contains(item.ToolName, value) ||
               Contains(item.PreparedBy, value) ||
               Contains(item.AssignedTechnician, value);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? source, string value) =>
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(source) && source.Contains(value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value) => value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";

    private static string GetStatusClass(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Draft" => "status-pill draft",
        "InReview" => "status-pill review",
        "Approved" => "status-pill approved",
        "Scheduled" => "status-pill scheduled",
        "InExecution" => "status-pill execution",
        "Closed" => "status-pill closed",
        "Rejected" => "status-pill rejected",
        "Canceled" => "status-pill canceled",
        _ => "status-pill"
    };

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Draft" => "Borrador",
        "InReview" => "En revisión",
        "Approved" => "Aprobado",
        "Scheduled" => "Programado",
        "InExecution" => "En ejecución",
        "Closed" => "Cerrado",
        "Rejected" => "Rechazado",
        "Canceled" => "Cancelado",
        _ => status
    };

    private sealed class MaintenanceActionRequest
    {
        public string? Comment { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public string? AssignedTechnician { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceRequestItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string RequestNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }
        public string RequestType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Priority { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ProblemDescription { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PreparedBy { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ApprovedBy { get; set; }
        public string? AssignedTechnician { get; set; }
        public string? ClosedBy { get; set; }
        public bool IsSafetyRisk { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ClosedAt { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ApiError
    {
        public string? Message { get; set; }
    }
}

@code {
    private List<MaintenancePlanItem> plans = new();
    private bool isLoading;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private IEnumerable<MaintenancePlanItem> FilteredPlans =>
        plans
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.PlanStatus == selectedStatus)
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .OrderBy(x => x.DaysRemaining);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador" : AuthSession.RoleName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleCode) ? "ADMIN" : AuthSession.RoleCode);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Permissions", string.Join(";", AuthSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>()));

        return api;
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            plans = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<MaintenancePlanItem>>("api/maintenance-requests/plans-board") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar los planes: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(MaintenancePlanItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText)) return true;

        var value = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(item.InternalCode, value) ||
               Contains(item.Name, value) ||
               Contains(item.BranchCode, value) ||
               Contains(item.BranchName, value) ||
               Contains(item.LocationName, value) ||
               Contains(item.ResponsibleName, value);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? source, string value) =>
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(source) && source.Contains(value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value) => value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";

    private static string GetDaysText(int days)
    {
        if (days < 0) return $"Vencido hace {Math.Abs(days)} día(s)";
        if (days == 0) return "Vence hoy";
        return $"Faltan {days} día(s)";
    }

    private static string GetPlanClass(string status) => status switch
    {
        "OnTime" => "plan-pill ontime",
        "DueSoon" => "plan-pill duesoon",
        "Overdue" => "plan-pill overdue",
        _ => "plan-pill"
    };

    private static string GetPlanLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "OnTime" => "Al día",
        "DueSoon" => "Por vencer",
        "Overdue" => "Vencido",
        _ => status
    };

    private sealed class MaintenancePlanItem
    {
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public int PeriodMonths { get; set; }
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime NextMaintenanceAt { get; set; }
        public int DaysRemaining { get; set; }
        public string PlanStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int TotalMaintenances { get; set; }
        public int CompletedMaintenances { get; set; }
        public int ScheduledMaintenances { get; set; }
        public int PendingRequests { get; set; }
        public string? LastMaintenanceNumber { get; set; }
        public string? LastTechnician { get; set; }
        public string? LastProvider { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/maintenance-request"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations
@using System.Net.Http.Json

@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject WebAuthSessionService AuthSession

<PageTitle>Solicitar Mantenimiento</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="Maintenance.View" ModuleName="Solicitar Mantenimiento">

<section class="maintenance-hero">
    <div>
        <span class="maintenance-pill">OPERACIONES · MANTENIMIENTO</span>

}

    <article class="maintenance-kpi-card">
        <span>Total</span>

        <small>Solicitudes creadas</small>

    <article class="maintenance-card maintenance-form-card">
        <div class="maintenance-card-title">
            <div>
                <h3>Nueva solicitud</h3>

        @if (!CanRequest)

        }

        <EditForm Model="form" OnValidSubmit="CreateAsync">
            <DataAnnotationsValidator />

            <div class="form-grid">
                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Herramienta / activo</label>
                    <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.ToolAssetIdText" disabled="@(!CanRequest)">
                        <option value="">Solicitud sin activo existente</option>
                        @foreach (var tool in tools)
                        {
                            <option value="@tool.Id">@tool.InternalCode - @tool.Name</option>
                        }

                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Tipo</label>
                    <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.RequestType" disabled="@(!CanRequest)">
                        <option value="Correctivo">Correctivo</option>
                        <option value="Preventivo">Preventivo</option>
                        <option value="Calibración">Calibración</option>
                        <option value="Garantía">Garantía</option>
                        <option value="Seguridad/SSTA">Seguridad/SSTA</option>
                    </InputSelect>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Prioridad</label>
                    <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="form.Priority" disabled="@(!CanRequest)">
                        <option value="Baja">Baja</option>
                        <option value="Media">Media</option>
                        <option value="Alta">Alta</option>
                        <option value="Crítica">Crítica</option>
                    </InputSelect>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Título</label>
                    <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.Title" placeholder="Ej: Falla en compresor de aire" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                    <ValidationMessage For="@(() => form.Title)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Descripción del problema</label>
                    <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.ProblemDescription" rows="3" placeholder="Describe la falla, síntoma o necesidad." disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                    <ValidationMessage For="@(() => form.ProblemDescription)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Causa probable</label>
                    <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.FailureCause" placeholder="Ej: desgaste, golpe, fuga, eléctrico..." disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Valor estimado</label>
                    <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.EstimatedCostText" placeholder="$0" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Proveedor sugerido</label>
                    <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.VendorSuggestion" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-check-row full">
                    <label>
                        <InputCheckbox @bind-Value="form.RequiresStop" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                        Requiere detener uso del activo
                    </label>

                    <label>
                        <InputCheckbox @bind-Value="form.IsSafetyRisk" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                        Riesgo de seguridad / SSTA
                    </label>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Notas internas</label>
                    <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.Notes" rows="2" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-actions">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" disabled="@(!CanRequest || isSaving)">
                    @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : "Crear borrador")
                </button>

                <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" disabled="@(!CanRequest || isSaving)" @onclick="CreateAndSubmitAsync">
                    Crear y enviar a revisión
                </button>

                <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="ClearForm">
                    Limpiar
                </button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </article>

    <article class="maintenance-card maintenance-list-card">
        <div class="maintenance-card-title">
            <div>
                <h3>Solicitudes registradas</h3>
                <p>Consulta el flujo de mantenimiento por estado, tipo, prioridad y preparador.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="maintenance-filters">
                <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedStatus">
                    <option value="">Todos los estados</option>
                    <option value="Draft">Borrador</option>
                    <option value="InReview">En revisión</option>
                    <option value="Approved">Aprobado</option>
                    <option value="Scheduled">Programado</option>
                    <option value="InExecution">En ejecución</option>
                    <option value="Closed">Cerrado</option>
                    <option value="Rejected">Rechazado</option>
                    <option value="Canceled">Cancelado</option>
                </select>

                <input class="form-control" placeholder="Buscar solicitud, activo, problema..."
                       @bind="searchText" @bind:event="oninput" />

                <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync">
                    Filtrar
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <div class="loading-box">Cargando solicitudes...</div>
        }
        else if (!FilteredRequests.Any())
        {
            <div class="empty-box">No hay solicitudes con los filtros aplicados.</div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="maintenance-table-wrapper">
                <table class="maintenance-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Solicitud</th>
                            <th>Activo / título</th>
                            <th>Tipo</th>
                            <th>Prioridad</th>
                            <th>Preparador</th>
                            <th>Estado</th>
                            <th>Fecha creación</th>
                            <th>Acciones</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in FilteredRequests)
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    <strong>@item.RequestNumber</strong>
                                    <small>@item.ToolInternalCode</small>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <strong>@item.Title</strong>
                                    <small>@(item.ToolName ?? item.ProblemDescription)</small>
                                </td>
                                <td>@item.RequestType</td>
                                <td>@item.Priority</td>
                                <td>@item.PreparedBy</td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="@GetStatusClass(item.Status)">
                                        @GetStatusLabel(item.Status)
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>@FormatDate(item.CreatedAt)</td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="row-actions">
                                        @if (item.ToolAssetId.HasValue)
                                        {
                                            <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="@($"/tools/{item.ToolAssetId}/technical-life-record")">
                                                Ver hoja vida
                                            </a>

                                            <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="@($"/tools/{item.ToolAssetId}/maintenance-schedule")">
                                                Cronograma
                                            </a>
                                        }
                                        @if (item.Status == "Draft" && CanRequest)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => SubmitAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Enviar
                                            </button>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.Status == "InReview" && CanApprove)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-success" @onclick="() => ApproveAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Aprobar
                                            </button>

                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => RejectAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Rechazar
                                            </button>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.Status == "Approved" && CanExecute)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => ScheduleAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Programar
                                            </button>

                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" @onclick="() => StartAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Ejecutar
                                            </button>
                                        }

                                        @if ((item.Status == "Scheduled" || item.Status == "InExecution" || item.Status == "Approved") && CanClose)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark" @onclick="() => CloseAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Cerrar
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </article>
</section>

</PermissionGuard>


<style>

@code {
    private readonly MaintenanceForm form = new();
    private List<MaintenanceRequestItem> requests = new();
    private List<ToolOption> tools = new();

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private bool CanRequest => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Request");
    private bool CanApprove => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Close") || AuthSession.HasPermission("Purchases.Approve");
    private bool CanExecute => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Execute") || AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Close");
    private bool CanClose => AuthSession.HasPermission("Maintenance.Close");

    private IEnumerable<MaintenanceRequestItem> FilteredRequests =>
        requests
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.Status == selectedStatus)
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.CreatedAt);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadToolsAsync();
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador" : AuthSession.RoleName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleCode) ? "ADMIN" : AuthSession.RoleCode);

        var permissions = AuthSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>();

        if (!permissions.Any())
        {
            permissions = new List<string>
            {
                "Maintenance.View",
                "Maintenance.Request",
                "Maintenance.Execute",
                "Maintenance.Close"
            };
        }

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Permissions", string.Join(";", permissions));

        return api;
    }

    private async Task LoadToolsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            tools = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolOption>>("api/tools") ?? new();
        }
        catch
        {
            tools = new();
        }
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            requests = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<MaintenanceRequestItem>>("api/maintenance-requests") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar las solicitudes: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task CreateAsync()
    {
        await SaveAsync(false);
    }

    private async Task CreateAndSubmitAsync()
    {
        await SaveAsync(true);
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync(bool sendToReview)
    {
        isSaving = true;
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var request = new CreateMaintenanceRequestRequest
            {
                ToolAssetId = TryGuid(form.ToolAssetIdText),
                RequestType = form.RequestType,
                Priority = form.Priority,
                Title = form.Title,
                ProblemDescription = form.ProblemDescription,
                FailureCause = form.FailureCause,
                RequiresStop = form.RequiresStop,
                IsSafetyRisk = form.IsSafetyRisk,
                EstimatedCostText = form.EstimatedCostText,
                VendorSuggestion = form.VendorSuggestion,
                Notes = form.Notes,
                SendToReview = sendToReview
            };

            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/maintenance-requests", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiError>();
                errorMessage = error?.Message ?? "No se pudo crear la solicitud.";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = sendToReview
                ? "Solicitud creada y enviada a revisión."
                : "Solicitud creada en borrador.";

            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error creando solicitud: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SubmitAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/submit", "Solicitud enviada a revisión.");

    private async Task ApproveAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/approve", "Solicitud aprobada.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Aprobada desde NAVI." });

    private async Task RejectAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/reject", "Solicitud rechazada.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Rechazada desde NAVI." });

    private async Task ScheduleAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/schedule", "Mantenimiento programado.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Programado desde NAVI.", AssignedTechnician = "tecnico", ScheduledAt = DateTime.Now.AddDays(1) });

    private async Task StartAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/start", "Mantenimiento iniciado.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Ejecución iniciada desde NAVI." });

    private async Task CloseAsync(Guid id) => await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/maintenance-requests/{id}/close", "Mantenimiento cerrado.", new MaintenanceActionRequest { Comment = "Mantenimiento cerrado desde NAVI." });

    private async Task ExecuteActionAsync(string endpoint, string success, object? body = null)
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(endpoint, body ?? new { });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiError>();
                errorMessage = error?.Message ?? "No se pudo ejecutar la acción.";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = success;
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error ejecutando acción: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        form.ToolAssetIdText = string.Empty;
        form.RequestType = "Correctivo";
        form.Priority = "Media";
        form.Title = string.Empty;
        form.ProblemDescription = string.Empty;
        form.FailureCause = string.Empty;
        form.RequiresStop = false;
        form.IsSafetyRisk = false;
        form.EstimatedCostText = string.Empty;
        form.VendorSuggestion = string.Empty;
        form.Notes = string.Empty;
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(MaintenanceRequestItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText)) return true;

        var value = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(item.RequestNumber, value) ||
               Contains(item.Title, value) ||
               Contains(item.ProblemDescription, value) ||
               Contains(item.ToolName, value) ||
               Contains(item.PreparedBy, value);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? source, string value) =>
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(source) && source.Contains(value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static Guid? TryGuid(string? value) => Guid.TryParse(value, out var id) ? id : null;

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value) => value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";

    private static string GetStatusClass(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Draft" => "status-pill draft",
        "InReview" => "status-pill review",
        "Approved" => "status-pill approved",
        "Scheduled" => "status-pill scheduled",
        "InExecution" => "status-pill execution",
        "Closed" => "status-pill closed",
        "Rejected" => "status-pill rejected",
        "Canceled" => "status-pill canceled",
        _ => "status-pill"
    };

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Draft" => "Borrador",
        "InReview" => "En revisión",
        "Approved" => "Aprobado",
        "Scheduled" => "Programado",
        "InExecution" => "En ejecución",
        "Closed" => "Cerrado",
        "Rejected" => "Rechazado",
        "Canceled" => "Cancelado",
        _ => status
    };

    private sealed class MaintenanceForm
    {
        public string ToolAssetIdText { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string RequestType { get; set; } = "Correctivo";
        public string Priority { get; set; } = "Media";

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "El título es obligatorio.")]
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "La descripción es obligatoria.")]
        public string ProblemDescription { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string? FailureCause { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresStop { get; set; }
        public bool IsSafetyRisk { get; set; }
        public string? EstimatedCostText { get; set; }
        public string? VendorSuggestion { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class CreateMaintenanceRequestRequest
    {
        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? RequestType { get; set; }
        public string? Priority { get; set; }
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ProblemDescription { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? FailureCause { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresStop { get; set; }
        public bool IsSafetyRisk { get; set; }
        public string? EstimatedCostText { get; set; }
        public string? VendorSuggestion { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public bool SendToReview { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceActionRequest
    {
        public string? Comment { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public string? AssignedTechnician { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceRequestItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string RequestNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }
        public string RequestType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Priority { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ProblemDescription { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PreparedBy { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public bool IsSafetyRisk { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolOption
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class ApiError
    {
        public string? Message { get; set; }
    }
}

                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Descripción</label>
                    <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.ItemDescription" rows="2" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Justificación</label>
                    <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.Justification" rows="3" placeholder="Explica por qué se requiere la compra." disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                    <ValidationMessage For="@(() => form.Justification)" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group full">
                    <label>Notas internas</label>
                    <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="form.Notes" rows="2" disabled="@(!CanRequest)" />
                </div>
