            <div class="form-actions">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" disabled="@(!CanRequest || isSaving)">
                    @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : "Crear borrador")
                </button>

                <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" disabled="@(!CanRequest || isSaving)" @onclick="CreateAndSubmitAsync">
                    Crear y enviar a revisión
                </button>

                <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="ClearForm">
                    Limpiar
                </button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </article>

    <article class="purchase-card purchase-list-card">
        <div class="purchase-card-title">
            <div>
                <h3>Solicitudes registradas</h3>
                <p>Vista tipo ERP con estado, preparador, fechas y propósito de pedido.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="purchase-filters">
                <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedStatus">
                    <option value="">Todos los estados</option>
                    <option value="Draft">Borrador</option>
                    <option value="InReview">En revisión</option>
                    <option value="Approved">Aprobado</option>
                    <option value="Rejected">Rechazado</option>
                    <option value="Closed">Cerrado</option>
                </select>

                <input class="form-control" placeholder="Buscar solicitud, activo, solicitante..."
                       @bind="searchText" @bind:event="oninput" />

                <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync">
                    Filtrar
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <div class="loading-box">Cargando solicitudes...</div>
        }
        else if (!FilteredRequests.Any())
        {
            <div class="empty-box">No hay solicitudes con los filtros aplicados.</div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="purchase-table-wrapper">
                <table class="purchase-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Solicitud</th>
                            <th>Nombre</th>
                            <th>Preparador</th>
                            <th>Estado</th>
                            <th>Fecha creación</th>
                            <th>Fecha envío</th>
                            <th>Propósito</th>
                            <th>Dynamics</th>
                            <th>Acciones</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in FilteredRequests)
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    <strong>@item.RequestNumber</strong>
                                    <small>@item.ItemCode</small>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <strong>@item.ItemName</strong>
                                    <small>@item.Justification</small>
                                </td>
                                <td>@item.PreparedBy</td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="@GetStatusClass(item.Status)">
                                        @GetStatusLabel(item.Status)
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>@FormatDate(item.CreatedAt)</td>
                                <td>@FormatDate(item.SubmittedAt)</td>
                                <td>@item.PurchasePurpose</td>
                                <td>
                                    @if (item.SentToDynamics)
                                    {
                                        <span class="status-pill sent">Enviado</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="status-pill pending">Pendiente</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="row-actions">
                                        @if (item.Status == "Draft" && CanRequest)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => SubmitAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Enviar
                                            </button>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.Status == "InReview" && CanApprove)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-success" @onclick="() => ApproveAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Aprobar
                                            </button>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.Status == "InReview" && CanReject)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => RejectAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Rechazar
                                            </button>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.Status == "Approved" && CanApprove)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="() => MarkSentDynamicsAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Marcar Dynamics
                                            </button>

                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark" @onclick="() => CloseAsync(item.Id)">
                                                Cerrar
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </article>
</section>

</PermissionGuard>

<style>
    .purchase-hero {
        margin-bottom: .9rem;
        padding: 1.05rem 1.15rem;
        border-radius: 1rem;
        background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(255,255,255,.16), transparent 34%),
            linear-gradient(135deg, #100015 0%, #4b005c 58%, #7b0d8e 100%);
        color: white;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 1rem;
        box-shadow: 0 .65rem 1.5rem rgba(75,0,92,.22);
    }

    .purchase-pill {
        display: inline-flex;
        padding: .18rem .6rem;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);

@code {
    private readonly PurchaseForm form = new();
    private List<PurchaseRequestItem> requests = new();
    private List<ToolOption> tools = new();

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private bool CanRequest => AuthSession.HasPermission("Purchases.Request");
    private bool CanApprove => AuthSession.HasPermission("Purchases.Approve");
    private bool CanReject => AuthSession.HasPermission("Purchases.Reject");

    private IEnumerable<PurchaseRequestItem> FilteredRequests =>
        requests
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.Status == selectedStatus)
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.CreatedAt);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadToolsAsync();
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadToolsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            tools = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolOption>>("api/tools") ?? new();
        }
        catch
        {
            tools = new();
        }
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            requests = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<PurchaseRequestItem>>("api/purchase-requests") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar las solicitudes: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task CreateAsync()
    {
        await SaveAsync(false);
    }

    private async Task CreateAndSubmitAsync()
    {
        await SaveAsync(true);
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync(bool sendToReview)
    {
        if (!CanRequest)
        {
            errorMessage = "No tienes permiso para crear solicitudes de compra.";
            return;
        }

        isSaving = true;
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var request = new CreatePurchaseRequestRequest
            {
                ToolAssetId = TryGuid(form.ToolAssetIdText),
                ItemCode = form.ItemCode,
                ItemName = form.ItemName,
                ItemDescription = form.ItemDescription,
                Quantity = form.Quantity,
                Unit = form.Unit,
                PurchasePurpose = form.PurchasePurpose,
                Justification = form.Justification,
                Priority = form.Priority,
                RequiredAt = form.RequiredAt,
                VendorSuggestion = form.VendorSuggestion,
                EstimatedCostText = form.EstimatedCostText,
                Notes = form.Notes,
                SendToReview = sendToReview
            };

            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/purchase-requests", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiError>();
                errorMessage = error?.Message ?? "No se pudo crear la solicitud.";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = sendToReview
                ? "Solicitud creada y enviada a revisión."
                : "Solicitud creada en borrador.";

            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error creando solicitud: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SubmitAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/purchase-requests/{id}/submit", "Solicitud enviada a revisión.");
    }

    private async Task ApproveAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/purchase-requests/{id}/approve", "Solicitud aprobada.", new ApprovalRequest
        {
            Comment = "Aprobada desde NAVI Herramientas."
        });
    }

    private async Task RejectAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/purchase-requests/{id}/reject", "Solicitud rechazada.", new ApprovalRequest
        {
            Comment = "Rechazada desde NAVI Herramientas."
        });
    }

    private async Task CloseAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/purchase-requests/{id}/close", "Solicitud cerrada.", new ApprovalRequest
        {
            Comment = "Cerrada desde NAVI Herramientas."
        });
    }

    private async Task MarkSentDynamicsAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await ExecuteActionAsync($"api/purchase-requests/{id}/mark-sent-dynamics", "Solicitud marcada como enviada a Dynamics.", new
        {
            DynamicsPurchaseRequisitionNumber = "Pendiente número ERP",
            DynamicsStatus = "Marcada para integración"
        });
    }

    private async Task ExecuteActionAsync(string endpoint, string success, object? body = null)
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(endpoint, body ?? new { });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiError>();
                errorMessage = error?.Message ?? "No se pudo ejecutar la acción.";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = success;
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error ejecutando acción: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        form.ToolAssetIdText = string.Empty;
        form.ItemCode = string.Empty;
        form.ItemName = string.Empty;
        form.ItemDescription = string.Empty;
        form.Quantity = 1;
        form.Unit = "Und";
        form.PurchasePurpose = "Consumo";
        form.Justification = string.Empty;
        form.Priority = "Media";
        form.RequiredAt = null;
        form.VendorSuggestion = string.Empty;
        form.EstimatedCostText = string.Empty;
        form.Notes = string.Empty;
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(PurchaseRequestItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var value = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(item.RequestNumber, value) ||
               Contains(item.ItemCode, value) ||
               Contains(item.ItemName, value) ||
               Contains(item.PreparedBy, value) ||
               Contains(item.RequestedByUserName, value);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? source, string value)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(source) &&
               source.Contains(value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static Guid? TryGuid(string? value)
    {
        return Guid.TryParse(value, out var id) ? id : null;
    }


    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-BranchId");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonId");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonName");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador" : AuthSession.RoleName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleCode) ? "ADMIN" : AuthSession.RoleCode);

        var permissions = AuthSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>();

        if (!permissions.Any())
        {
            permissions = new List<string>
            {
                "Purchases.View",
                "Purchases.Request",
                "Purchases.Approve",
                "Purchases.Reject"
            };
        }

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add(
            "X-Navi-Permissions",
            string.Join(";", permissions.Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)).Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)));

        if (AuthSession.BranchId.HasValue)
        {
            api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-BranchId", AuthSession.BranchId.Value.ToString());
        }

        if (AuthSession.ResponsiblePersonId.HasValue)
        {
            api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonId", AuthSession.ResponsiblePersonId.Value.ToString());
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.ResponsiblePersonName))
        {
            api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonName", AuthSession.ResponsiblePersonName);
        }

        return api;
    }

    private static string GetStatusClass(string status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Draft" => "status-pill draft",
            "InReview" => "status-pill review",
            "Approved" => "status-pill approved",
            "Rejected" => "status-pill rejected",
            "Closed" => "status-pill closed",
            _ => "status-pill"
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Draft" => "Borrador",
            "InReview" => "En revisión",
            "Approved" => "Aprobado",
            "Rejected" => "Rechazado",
            "Closed" => "Cerrado",
            _ => status
        };
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";
    }

    private sealed class PurchaseForm
    {
        public string ToolAssetIdText { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ItemCode { get; set; }

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "El nombre solicitado es obligatorio.")]
        public string ItemName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string? ItemDescription { get; set; }
        public int Quantity { get; set; } = 1;
        public string Unit { get; set; } = "Und";
        public string PurchasePurpose { get; set; } = "Consumo";

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "La justificación es obligatoria.")]
        public string Justification { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string Priority { get; set; } = "Media";
        public DateTime? RequiredAt { get; set; }
        public string? VendorSuggestion { get; set; }
        public string? EstimatedCostText { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class CreatePurchaseRequestRequest
    {
        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ItemCode { get; set; }
        public string ItemName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ItemDescription { get; set; }
        public int Quantity { get; set; } = 1;
        public string? Unit { get; set; }
        public string? PurchasePurpose { get; set; }
        public string Justification { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Priority { get; set; }
        public DateTime? RequiredAt { get; set; }
        public string? VendorSuggestion { get; set; }
        public string? EstimatedCostText { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public bool SendToReview { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class PurchaseRequestItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string RequestNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }
        public string ItemCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ItemName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ItemDescription { get; set; }
        public int Quantity { get; set; }
        public string Unit { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PurchasePurpose { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Justification { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Priority { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string RequestedByUserName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PreparedBy { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime RequestedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? SubmittedAt { get; set; }
        public string? SubmittedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? RequiredAt { get; set; }
        public string? VendorSuggestion { get; set; }
        public string? EstimatedCostText { get; set; }
        public string? ApprovalComment { get; set; }
        public string? ApprovedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ApprovedAt { get; set; }
        public string? RejectedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? RejectedAt { get; set; }
        public string? RejectionReason { get; set; }
        public bool SentToDynamics { get; set; }
        public string? DynamicsPurchaseRequisitionNumber { get; set; }
        public string? DynamicsStatus { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolOption
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class ApprovalRequest
    {
        public string? Comment { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ApiError
    {
        public string? Message { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/physical-counts/{Id:guid}"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components.Security
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Services.Auth
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject WebAuthSessionService AuthSession
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>Detalle Toma Física</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="PhysicalCounts.View" ModuleName="Detalle de Toma Física">

<section class="pc-hero">
    <div>
        <span class="pc-pill">TOMA FÍSICA · CONTROL POR USUARIO</span>
        <h2>@(board?.CountNumber ?? "Toma física")</h2>
        <p>
            Controla quién realizó inventario, quién no lo realizó, herramientas pendientes, diferencias y cierre de la toma.
        </p>
    </div>

    <div class="pc-side">
        <div class="pc-status-box">
            <span>Estado</span>
            <strong>@(board?.StatusLabel ?? "Cargando")</strong>
        </div>

        <button class="pc-outline-btn" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync">
            Actualizar
        </button>
    </div>
</section>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(successMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-success">@successMessage</div>
}

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">@errorMessage</div>
}

@if (isLoading && board is null)
{
    <div class="pc-empty">Cargando toma física...</div>
}
else if (board is not null)
{
    <section class="pc-kpi-grid">
        <article class="pc-kpi">
            <span>Participantes</span>
            <strong>@board.Summary.TotalParticipants</strong>
            <small>Usuarios / responsables</small>
        </article>

        <article class="pc-kpi info">
            <span>En proceso</span>
            <strong>@board.Summary.InProgress</strong>
            <small>Inventario iniciado</small>
        </article>

        <article class="pc-kpi success">
            <span>Finalizados</span>
            <strong>@board.Summary.Finished</strong>
            <small>Sin pendientes</small>
        </article>

        <article class="pc-kpi warning">
            <span>Pendientes</span>
            <strong>@board.Summary.TotalPending</strong>
            <small>Herramientas por validar</small>
        </article>

        <article class="pc-kpi danger">
            <span>Diferencias</span>
            <strong>@(board.Summary.DifferentItems + board.Summary.MissingItems + board.Summary.DamagedItems + board.Summary.ExtraItems)</strong>
            <small>Conciliación</small>
        </article>

        <article class="pc-kpi purple">
            <span>Avance</span>
            <strong>@board.Summary.Progress%</strong>
            <small>@board.Summary.TotalCounted de @board.Summary.TotalExpected</small>
        </article>
    </section>

    <section class="pc-actions-card">
        <div>
            <h3>Acciones de la toma física</h3>
            <p>Genera participantes según los responsables de activos, activa la toma y ciérrala cuando todos terminen.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="pc-actions">
            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" type="button" @onclick="GenerateParticipantsAsync">
                Generar participantes
            </button>

            <button class="btn btn-success" type="button" @onclick="ActivateAsync">
                Activar toma
            </button>

            <button class="btn btn-dark" type="button" @onclick="CloseAsync">
                Cerrar toma
            </button>

            <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="GoBack">
                Volver
            </button>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="pc-card">
        <div class="pc-card-title">
            <div>
                <h3>Participantes de la toma</h3>
                <p>Estado individual: no iniciada, en proceso, finalizada, finalizada con diferencias o vencida.</p>
            </div>

            <input class="form-control pc-search"
                   placeholder="Buscar usuario, área, cargo..."
                   @bind="searchText"
                   @bind:event="oninput" />
        </div>

        @if (!FilteredParticipants.Any())
        {
            <div class="pc-empty">
                No hay participantes generados. Usa el botón <strong>Generar participantes</strong>.
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="pc-table-wrapper">
                <table class="pc-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Usuario / responsable</th>
                            <th>Estado</th>
                            <th>Asignadas</th>
                            <th>Validadas</th>
                            <th>Pendientes</th>
                            <th>Diferencias</th>
                            <th>Avance</th>
                            <th>Fechas</th>
                            <th>Acciones</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>

                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var participant in FilteredParticipants)
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    <strong>@participant.DisplayName</strong>
                                    <small>@participant.UserName</small>
                                    <small>@participant.Area @participant.Position</small>
                                </td>

                                <td>
                                    <span class="@GetParticipantStatusClass(participant.Status)">
                                        @participant.StatusLabel
                                    </span>
                                </td>

                                <td>@participant.ExpectedItems</td>
                                <td>@GetParticipantReportedCount(participant)</td>
                                <td>@GetParticipantPendingCount(participant)</td>

                                <td>
    @foreach (var diffLine in GetParticipantDifferenceLines(participant))
    {
        <small>@diffLine</small>
    }
</td>

                                <td>
                                    <div class="pc-progress">
                                        <div style="width:@GetParticipantProgress(participant)%"></div>
                                    </div>
                                    <small>@GetParticipantProgress(participant)%</small>
                                </td>

                                <td>
                                    <small>Inicio: @FormatDate(participant.StartedAt)</small>
                                    <small>Finalizó: @FormatDate(participant.FinishedAt)</small>
                                    <small>Última: @FormatDate(participant.LastActivityAt)</small>
                                </td>

                                <td>
    <div class="row-actions">
        <button class="pc-action pc-action-success"
                type="button"
                @onclick="() => StartParticipantAsync(participant.Id)">
            Iniciar
        </button>

        <button class="pc-action pc-action-neutral"
                type="button"
                @onclick="() => FinishParticipantAsync(participant.Id)">
            Finalizar
        </button>

        <button class="pc-action pc-action-primary"
                type="button"
                @onclick="() => LoadPendingToolsAsync(participant.Id)">
            Pendientes
        </button>
    </div>
</td>

                                
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </section>

    @if (selectedPending is not null)
    {
        <section class="pc-card">
            <div class="pc-card-title">
                <div>
                    <h3>Pendientes de @(selectedPending?.DisplayName ?? "Usuario seleccionado")</h3>
                    <p>Herramientas o activos que aún no han sido validados por este participante.</p>
                </div>

                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="() => selectedPending = null">
                    Cerrar
                </button>
            </div>

            @if (!selectedPending.Tools.Any())
            {
                <div class="pc-empty">Este participante no tiene herramientas pendientes.</div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="pc-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="pc-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Código</th>
                                <th>Activo / herramienta</th>
                                <th>Sede</th>
                                <th>Ubicación</th>
                                <th>Responsable</th>
                                <th>Estado operativo</th>
                                <th>Estado físico</th>
                                <th>Acciones</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var tool in selectedPending.Tools)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td><strong>@tool.InternalCode</strong></td>
                                    <td>@tool.Name</td>
                                    <td>@tool.BranchCode</td>
                                    <td>@tool.LocationName</td>
                                    <td>@tool.ResponsibleName</td>
                                    <td>@tool.OperationalStatus</td>
                                    <td>@tool.PhysicalStatus</td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="pc-pending-actions">
                                        <a class="pc-action pc-action-primary"
                                           href="@($"/physical-counts/{Id}/participants/{GetSelectedPendingParticipantId()}/pending-tools/{GetPendingToolId(tool)}")">
                                            Detalle / Reportar
                                        </a>

                                        <a class="pc-action pc-action-danger"
                                           href="@($"/physical-counts/{Id}/participants/{GetSelectedPendingParticipantId()}/pending-tools/{GetPendingToolId(tool)}?mode=reject")">
                                            Rechazar
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            }
        </section>
    }

                <section class="pc-card pc-reported-user-card">
        <div class="pc-card-title">
            <div>
                <h3>
                    @if (selectedPending is null)
                    {
                        <span>Registros reportados por usuario</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span>Registros reportados de @(selectedPending?.DisplayName ?? "Usuario seleccionado")</span>
                    }
                </h3>
                <p>
                    @if (selectedPending is null)
                    {
                        <span>Seleccione un participante y presione <strong>Pendientes</strong> para ver sus registros y agregar herramientas no listadas.</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span>Solo se muestran los registros de este usuario: herramientas validadas, rechazadas, no encontradas o no listadas.</span>
                    }
                </p>
            </div>

            <div class="pc-actions">
                @if (selectedPending is not null)
                {
                    <button type="button"
                            class="pc-action pc-action-primary"
                            @onclick="ToggleQuickReportForm">
                        @(showQuickReportForm ? "Ocultar formulario" : "Agregar no listada")
                    </button>
                }

                <a class="pc-action pc-action-primary" href="@GetReportedItemsUrl()">
                    Ir a conciliación global
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (selectedPending is null)
        {
            <div class="pc-empty">
                Seleccione un participante en la tabla superior y presione <strong>Pendientes</strong>.
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="pc-user-progress">
                <article>
                    <span>Usuario</span>
                    <strong>@(selectedPending?.DisplayName ?? "Usuario seleccionado")</strong>
                    <small>Participante seleccionado</small>
                </article>

                <article>
                    <span>Esperados</span>
                    <strong>@(selectedPending?.ExpectedItems ?? 0)</strong>
                    <small>Asignados en sistema</small>
                </article>

                <article>
                    <span>Pendientes</span>
                    <strong>@GetSelectedPendingVisualCount()</strong>
                    <small>Sin validar</small>
                </article>

                <article>
                    <span>Reportados</span>
                    <strong>@SelectedParticipantReportedItems.Count()</strong>
                    <small>Registros del usuario</small>
                </article>
            </div>

            @if (showQuickReportForm)
            {
                <div class="pc-selected-user-banner">
                    <strong>Usuario que reporta:</strong>
                    <span>@(selectedPending?.DisplayName ?? "Usuario seleccionado")</span>
                </div>

                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportError))
                {
                    <div class="pc-alert pc-alert-danger">@quickReportError</div>
                }

                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportSuccess))
                {
                    <div class="pc-alert pc-alert-success">@quickReportSuccess</div>
                }

                <EditForm Model="quickReportedItem" OnSubmit="SaveQuickReportedItemAsync">
                    <div class="pc-report-form-grid">
                        <label>
                            Tipo de reporte *
                            <select @bind="quickReportedItem.ReportType">
                                <option value="ExtraNotListed">Herramienta / activo no listado</option>
                                <option value="Damaged">Activo dańado</option>
                                <option value="ReturnedOrDelivered">Activo devuelto / entregado</option>
                            </select>
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Tipo de activo *
                            <select @bind="quickReportedItem.AssetTypeName">
                                <option value="Herramienta">Herramienta</option>
                                <option value="Activo fijo">Activo fijo</option>
                                <option value="Equipo tecnológico">Equipo tecnológico</option>
                                <option value="Equipo de medición">Equipo de medición</option>
                            </select>
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Código / placa visible *
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.ReportedCode"
                                   placeholder="Ej: AGU-NO-SIS-001..." />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Nombre del activo / herramienta *
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.ReportedName"
                                   placeholder="Ej: Taladro, gato, escáner..." />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Categoría *
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.CategoryName"
                                   placeholder="Ej: Eléctrica, hidráulica, cómputo..." />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Sede *
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.BranchCode" />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Ubicación encontrada *
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.FoundLocation" />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Estado físico *
                            <select @bind="quickReportedItem.PhysicalStatus">
                                <option value="Bueno">Bueno</option>
                                <option value="Regular">Regular</option>
                                <option value="Dańado">Dańado</option>
                                <option value="No encontrado">No encontrado</option>
                            </select>
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Serial
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.SerialNumber" />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Marca
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.Brand" />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Modelo
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.Model" />
                        </label>

                        <label>
                            Estado operativo
                            <input @bind="quickReportedItem.OperationalStatus" />
                        </label>
                    </div>

                    <label class="pc-report-full">
                        Observación *
                        <textarea rows="3"
                                  @bind="quickReportedItem.Observation"
                                  placeholder="Describa lo que reportó el usuario y cualquier detalle para conciliación."></textarea>
                    </label>

                    <label class="pc-check-row">
                        <input type="checkbox" @bind="quickReportedItem.RequiresUserClarification" />
                        Requiere llamar/contactar al usuario para aclaración
                    </label>

                    <div class="pc-form-actions">
                        <button type="submit"
                                class="pc-primary-btn"
                                disabled="@isSavingQuickReport">
                            @(isSavingQuickReport ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar registro reportado")
                        </button>

                        <button type="button"
                                class="pc-secondary-btn"
                                disabled="@isSavingQuickReport"
                                @onclick="ResetQuickReportedItemForm">
                            Limpiar
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </EditForm>
            }

            @if (!SelectedParticipantReportedItems.Any())
            {
                <div class="pc-empty">
                    Este usuario aún no tiene registros reportados. Cuando use <strong>Detalle / Reportar</strong>, <strong>Rechazar</strong> o <strong>Agregar no listada</strong>, aparecerán aquí.
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="pc-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="pc-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Código</th>
                                <th>Activo / reporte</th>
                                <th>Tipo</th>
                                <th>Proceso</th>
                                <th>Ubicación encontrada</th>
                                <th>Observación</th>
                                <th>Fecha</th>
                                <th>Registró</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>

                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in SelectedParticipantReportedItems)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td>
                                        <strong>@Display(item.ToolInternalCode ?? item.ReportedCode)</strong>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <strong>@Display(item.ToolName ?? item.ReportedName)</strong>

                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SerialNumber))
                                        {
                                            <small>Serial: @item.SerialNumber</small>
                                        }

                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Brand) || !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Model))
                                        {
                                            <small>@Display(item.Brand) @Display(item.Model)</small>
                                        }
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span class="@GetReconciliationStatusClass(item.ReconciliationStatus)">
                                            @Display(item.ReportTypeLabel ?? item.ReportType)
                                        </span>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span class="@GetReconciliationStatusClass(item.ReconciliationStatus)">
                                            @GetUserProcessLabel(item)
                                        </span>
                                        <small>@Display(item.ReconciliationStatusLabel)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>@Display(item.FoundLocation)</td>

                                    <td>@Display(item.Observation)</td>

                                    <td>@FormatDate(item.ReportedAt)</td>

                                    <td>@Display(item.ReportedBy ?? item.ParticipantName)</td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            }
        }
    </section>
}

</PermissionGuard>

@code {
    [Parameter] public Guid Id { get; set; }

    private PhysicalCountBoard? board;
    private ExtraItemsResponse? extraItems;
    private ReportedItemsBoard? reportedItemsBoard;
    private QuickReportedItemForm quickReportedItem = new();
    private bool isSavingQuickReport;
    private bool showQuickReportForm;
    private string? quickReportError;
    private string? quickReportSuccess;
    private PendingToolsResponse? selectedPending;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string? errorMessage;

    
    private IEnumerable<ReportedItem> SelectedParticipantReportedItems =>
        (reportedItemsBoard?.Items ?? new())
            .Where(IsReportForSelectedParticipant)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt);

    private bool IsReportForSelectedParticipant(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (selectedPending is null)
        {
            return false;
        }

        if (item.PhysicalCountParticipantId.HasValue &&
            item.PhysicalCountParticipantId.Value == selectedPending.Id)
        {
            return true;
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ParticipantName) &&
            item.ParticipantName.Equals(selectedPending.DisplayName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return true;
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ParticipantUserName) &&
            !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedPending.UserName) &&
            item.ParticipantUserName.Equals(selectedPending.UserName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }
    
    private List<ReportedItem> GetReportsForParticipant(ParticipantItem participant)
    {
        return (reportedItemsBoard?.Items ?? new())
            .Where(item =>
                item.PhysicalCountParticipantId == participant.Id ||
                (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ParticipantName) &&
                    item.ParticipantName.Equals(participant.DisplayName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) ||
                (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ParticipantUserName) &&
                    item.ParticipantUserName.Equals(participant.UserName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
            .ToList();
    }

    private int GetParticipantReportedCount(ParticipantItem participant)
    {
        var reports = GetReportsForParticipant(participant);
        return reports.Count;
    }

    private int GetParticipantPendingCount(ParticipantItem participant)
    {
        var reported = GetParticipantReportedCount(participant);
        var expected = participant.ExpectedItems;

        if (expected <= 0)
        {
            return participant.PendingItems;
        }

        var pending = expected - reported;
        return pending < 0 ? 0 : pending;
    }

    private int GetParticipantProgress(ParticipantItem participant)
    {
        var expected = participant.ExpectedItems;

        if (expected <= 0)
        {
            return Convert.ToInt32(Math.Round(participant.Progress, 0, MidpointRounding.AwayFromZero));
        }

        var reported = GetParticipantReportedCount(participant);
        var progress = (int)Math.Round((reported * 100.0) / expected);

        if (progress < 0)
        {
            return 0;
        }

        if (progress > 100)
        {
            return 100;
        }

        return progress;
    }

    private IReadOnlyList<string> GetParticipantDifferenceLines(ParticipantItem participant)
    {
        var reports = GetReportsForParticipant(participant);

        var missing = reports.Count(x => IsReportType(x, "NotFound"));
        var extra = reports.Count(x => IsReportType(x, "ExtraNotListed"));
        var damaged = reports.Count(x => IsReportType(x, "Damaged"));
        var returned = reports.Count(x => IsReportType(x, "ReturnedOrDelivered"));

        return new[]
        {
            $"Faltantes: {missing}",
            $"No listadas: {extra}",
            $"Dańadas: {damaged}",
            $"Devueltas: {returned}"
        };
    }

    private int GetSelectedPendingVisualCount()
    {
        if (selectedPending is null)
        {
            return 0;
        }

        var expected = selectedPending.ExpectedItems;
        var reported = SelectedParticipantReportedItems.Count();

        if (expected <= 0)
        {
            return selectedPending.PendingItems;
        }

        var pending = expected - reported;
        return pending < 0 ? 0 : pending;
    }

    private static bool IsReportType(ReportedItem item, string reportType)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ReportType) &&
               item.ReportType.Equals(reportType, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }
    private IEnumerable<ParticipantItem> FilteredParticipants =>
        (board?.Participants ?? new())
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText) ||
                        Contains(x.DisplayName, searchText) ||
                        Contains(x.UserName, searchText) ||
                        Contains(x.Area, searchText) ||
                        Contains(x.Position, searchText))
            .OrderBy(x => x.DisplayName);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador" : AuthSession.RoleName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleCode) ? "ADMIN" : AuthSession.RoleCode);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Permissions", string.Join(";", AuthSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>()));

        return api;
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            board = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<PhysicalCountBoard>($"api/physical-counts/{Id}/participants-board");
            await LoadExtraItemsAsync();
            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el tablero de toma física: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task GenerateParticipantsAsync()
    {
        await ExecuteAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/{Id}/generate-participants",
            new
            {
                ScopeMode = "Branch",
                IncludeToolsWithoutResponsible = true,
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin"
            },
            "Participantes generados correctamente.");
    }

    private async Task ActivateAsync()
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/{Id}/activate",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Notes = "Toma física activada desde el módulo de control."
            },
            "Toma física activada.");
    }

    private async Task CloseAsync()
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/{Id}/close-with-participants",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Notes = "Toma física cerrada desde el módulo de control.",
                ForceClose = true
            },
            "Toma física cerrada correctamente.");
    }

    private async Task StartParticipantAsync(Guid participantId)
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/participants/{participantId}/start",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin"
            },
            "Participante iniciado.");
    }

    private async Task FinishParticipantAsync(Guid participantId)
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/participants/{participantId}/finish",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Observation = "Finalizado desde administración."
            },
            "Participante finalizado.");
    }

    
    private string GetReportedItemsUrl()
    {
        if (selectedPending is not null)
        {
            return $"/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items?participantId={selectedPending.Id}";
        }

        return $"/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items";
    }
    private async Task LoadPendingToolsAsync(Guid participantId)
    {
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            selectedPending = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<PendingToolsResponse>($"api/physical-counts/participants/{participantId}/pending-tools");
            showQuickReportForm = false;
            quickReportError = null;
            quickReportSuccess = null;
            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar los pendientes: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private async Task ExecuteAsync(string endpoint, object body, string message)
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(endpoint, body);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                errorMessage = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                return;
            }

            successMessage = message;
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = ex.Message;
        }
    }

    private async Task PatchAsync(string endpoint, object body, string message)
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PatchAsJsonAsync(endpoint, body);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                errorMessage = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                return;
            }

            successMessage = message;
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = ex.Message;
        }
    }

    
    private string GetReportedItemsReadOnlyUrl()
    {
        if (selectedPending is not null)
        {
            return $"/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items?participantId={selectedPending.Id}";
        }

        return $"/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items";
    }
    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo("/physical-counts");
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? value, string search) =>
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) &&
        value.Contains(search.Trim(), StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value) =>
        value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "—";

    private static string GetParticipantStatusClass(string status) => status switch
    {
        "NotStarted" => "pc-status pending",
        "InProgress" => "pc-status progress",
        "Finished" => "pc-status done",
        "FinishedWithDifferences" => "pc-status diff",
        "Expired" => "pc-status expired",
        _ => "pc-status pending"
    };

    private sealed class PhysicalCountBoard
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string CountNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string StatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleBy { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public List<ParticipantItem> Participants { get; set; } = new();
        public List<PhysicalCountReportedItem> Items { get; set; } = new();
        public PhysicalCountSummary Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class PhysicalCountSummary
    {
        public int TotalParticipants { get; set; }
        public int NotStarted { get; set; }
        public int InProgress { get; set; }
        public int Finished { get; set; }
        public int FinishedWithDifferences { get; set; }
        public int Expired { get; set; }
        public int TotalExpected { get; set; }
        public int TotalCounted { get; set; }
        public int TotalPending { get; set; }
        public int FoundItems { get; set; }
        public int MissingItems { get; set; }
        public int DifferentItems { get; set; }
        public int DamagedItems { get; set; }
        public int ExtraItems { get; set; }
        public decimal Progress { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ParticipantItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid PhysicalCountId { get; set; }
        public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public string? UserId { get; set; }
        public string UserName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string DisplayName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Area { get; set; }
        public string? Position { get; set; }
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string StatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int ExpectedItems { get; set; }
        public int CountedItems { get; set; }
        public int PendingItems { get; set; }
        public int FoundItems { get; set; }
        public int MissingItems { get; set; }
        public int DifferentItems { get; set; }
        public int DamagedItems { get; set; }
        public int ExtraItems { get; set; }
        public decimal Progress { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? LastActivityAt { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class PhysicalCountReportedItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }
        public bool WasFound { get; set; }
        public string? ExpectedLocation { get; set; }
        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
        public DateTime CountedAt { get; set; }
        public string? CreatedBy { get; set; }
        public string? UpdatedBy { get; set; }
    }

    
    
    private sealed class QuickReportedItemForm
    {
        public string ReportType { get; set; } = "ExtraNotListed";
        public string AssetTypeName { get; set; } = "Herramienta";
        public string? ReportedCode { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedName { get; set; }
        public string? CategoryName { get; set; }
        public string BranchCode { get; set; } = "AGU";
        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; } = "AGU-BOD-HERR - Bodega de herramientas";
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = "Bueno";
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; } = "Pendiente validación";
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
    }
    private sealed class ReportedItemsBoard
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string CountNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string StatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public List<ReportedItem> Items { get; set; } = new();
        public ReportedItemsSummary Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItemsSummary
    {
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public int Found { get; set; }
        public int NotFound { get; set; }
        public int ReturnedOrDelivered { get; set; }
        public int Damaged { get; set; }
        public int DifferentLocation { get; set; }
        public int DifferentResponsible { get; set; }
        public int ExtraNotListed { get; set; }
        public int PendingReview { get; set; }
        public int RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public int ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public int Reconciled { get; set; }
        public int Rejected { get; set; }
        public int MissingMinimumData { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid PhysicalCountId { get; set; }
        public Guid? PhysicalCountParticipantId { get; set; }

        public string? ParticipantName { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantUserName { get; set; }

        public string? ReportType { get; set; }
        public string? ReportTypeLabel { get; set; }

        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }

        public Guid? MatchedToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolName { get; set; }

        public Guid? CreatedToolAssetId { get; set; }

        public string? ReportedCode { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedName { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }

        public string? AssetTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? CategoryName { get; set; }

        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; }

        public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }

        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }

        public string? ReportedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReportedAt { get; set; }

        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ReconciliationObservation { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public bool MinimumDataCompleted { get; set; }
        public string? MissingRequiredData { get; set; }

        public bool ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public bool Rejected { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReconciledAt { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciledBy { get; set; }
    }
    private sealed class PendingToolsResponse
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string DisplayName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public string? UserName { get; set; }
        public int ExpectedItems { get; set; }
        public int CountedItems { get; set; }
        public int PendingItems { get; set; }
        public List<PendingToolItem> Tools { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class PendingToolItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
    }

    
    
    
    private void ToggleQuickReportForm()
    {
        showQuickReportForm = !showQuickReportForm;

        if (showQuickReportForm)
        {
            quickReportError = null;
            quickReportSuccess = null;
        }
    }
    private async Task SaveQuickReportedItemAsync()
    {
        quickReportError = null;
        quickReportSuccess = null;

        if (selectedPending is null)
        {
            quickReportError = "Debe seleccionar un participante antes de crear el registro.";
            return;
        }

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.ReportedCode) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.ReportedName) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.AssetTypeName) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.CategoryName) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.BranchCode) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.FoundLocation) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.PhysicalStatus) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(quickReportedItem.Observation))
        {
            quickReportError = "Complete los campos obligatorios marcados con *.";
            return;
        }

        isSavingQuickReport = true;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();

            var body = new
            {
                reportType = quickReportedItem.ReportType,
                reportedCode = quickReportedItem.ReportedCode?.Trim(),
                reportedName = quickReportedItem.ReportedName?.Trim(),
                serialNumber = quickReportedItem.SerialNumber?.Trim(),
                brand = quickReportedItem.Brand?.Trim(),
                model = quickReportedItem.Model?.Trim(),
                assetTypeName = quickReportedItem.AssetTypeName?.Trim(),
                categoryName = quickReportedItem.CategoryName?.Trim(),
                branchCode = quickReportedItem.BranchCode?.Trim(),
                foundLocation = quickReportedItem.FoundLocation?.Trim(),
                responsiblePersonId = selectedPending?.ResponsiblePersonId,
                responsibleName = selectedPending?.DisplayName,
                physicalStatus = quickReportedItem.PhysicalStatus?.Trim(),
                operationalStatus = quickReportedItem.OperationalStatus?.Trim(),
                observation = quickReportedItem.Observation?.Trim(),
                reportedBy = selectedPending?.DisplayName,
                requiresUserClarification = quickReportedItem.RequiresUserClarification
            };

            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(
                $"api/physical-counts/participants/{selectedPending.Id}/reported-items",
                body);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                quickReportError = $"No se pudo guardar el registro reportado: {(int)response.StatusCode} {error}";
                return;
            }

            quickReportSuccess = "Registro reportado guardado correctamente. Ahora aparece en los registros del usuario y en conciliación global.";

            ResetQuickReportedItemForm(keepMessages: true);

            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            quickReportError = $"Error guardando registro reportado: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSavingQuickReport = false;
        }
    }

    private void ResetQuickReportedItemForm()
    {
        ResetQuickReportedItemForm(keepMessages: false);
    }

    private void ResetQuickReportedItemForm(bool keepMessages)
    {
        quickReportedItem = new QuickReportedItemForm();

        if (!keepMessages)
        {
            quickReportError = null;
            quickReportSuccess = null;
        }
    }
    private async Task LoadReportedItemsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            reportedItemsBoard = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<ReportedItemsBoard>($"api/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items-board")
                ?? new ReportedItemsBoard();
        }
        catch
        {
            reportedItemsBoard = new ReportedItemsBoard();
        }
    }
    private async Task LoadExtraItemsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            extraItems = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<ExtraItemsResponse>($"api/physical-counts/{Id}/extra-items");
        }
        catch
        {
            extraItems = new ExtraItemsResponse();
        }
    }

    private async Task RequestClarificationAsync(Guid extraItemId)
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/extra-items/{extraItemId}/request-clarification",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Observation = "Se requiere contactar al usuario para ampliar información de la herramienta reportada."
            },
            "Se marcó como requiere aclaración del usuario.");

        await LoadExtraItemsAsync();
            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
    }

    private async Task ApproveCreationAsync(Guid extraItemId)
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/extra-items/{extraItemId}/approve-creation",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Observation = "Herramienta aprobada para creación en inventario después de conciliación."
            },
            "Herramienta aprobada para creación.");

        await LoadExtraItemsAsync();
            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
    }

    private async Task ReconcileExtraAsync(Guid extraItemId)
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/extra-items/{extraItemId}/reconcile",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Observation = "Herramienta conciliada manualmente desde administración."
            },
            "Herramienta conciliada.");

        await LoadExtraItemsAsync();
            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
    }

    private async Task RejectExtraAsync(Guid extraItemId)
    {
        await PatchAsync(
            $"api/physical-counts/extra-items/{extraItemId}/reject",
            new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Observation = "Reporte rechazado en conciliación."
            },
            "Reporte rechazado.");

        await LoadExtraItemsAsync();
            await LoadReportedItemsAsync();
    }

    
    private static string GetUserProcessLabel(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (item.Rejected || item.ReconciliationStatus == "Rejected")
        {
            return "Rechazado";
        }

        if (item.ReportType == "Found" && item.ReconciliationStatus == "Reconciled")
        {
            return "Completo";
        }

        if (item.ReportType == "NotFound")
        {
            return "No encontrado / pendiente conciliación";
        }

        if (item.ReportType == "ExtraNotListed")
        {
            return item.ReconciliationStatus switch
            {
                "ApprovedForCreation" => "Nuevo aprobado para creación",
                "RequiresUserClarification" => "Requiere aclaración",
                "Reconciled" => "Conciliado",
                "Rejected" => "Rechazado",
                _ => "No existe en sistema / por conciliar"
            };
        }

        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || item.ReconciliationStatus == "RequiresUserClarification")
        {
            return "Requiere aclaración";
        }

        if (item.ReconciliationStatus == "Reconciled")
        {
            return "Completo";
        }

        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ReconciliationStatusLabel)
            ? "Pendiente revisión"
            : item.ReconciliationStatusLabel;
    }
    private static string Display(string? value) =>
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;

    private static string GetReconciliationStatusClass(string status) => status switch
    {
        "PendingReview" => "pc-status pending",
        "NotFoundInSystem" => "pc-status expired",
        "MatchedInSystem" => "pc-status progress",
        "RequiresUserClarification" => "pc-status diff",
        "ApprovedForCreation" => "pc-status done",
        "Rejected" => "pc-status expired",
        "Reconciled" => "pc-status done",
        _ => "pc-status pending"
    };

    private sealed class ExtraItemsResponse
    {
        public Guid PhysicalCountId { get; set; }
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public int PendingReview { get; set; }
        public int MatchedInSystem { get; set; }
        public int RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public int ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public int Reconciled { get; set; }
        public int Rejected { get; set; }
        public List<ExtraItem> Items { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class ExtraItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid PhysicalCountId { get; set; }
        public Guid? PhysicalCountParticipantId { get; set; }

        public string? ParticipantName { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantUserName { get; set; }

        public Guid? MatchedToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolName { get; set; }

        public string? ReportedCode { get; set; }
        public string ReportedName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ReportedSerial { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedBrand { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedModel { get; set; }

        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }

        public string? ReportedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReportedAt { get; set; }

        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ReconciliationObservation { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ClarificationRequestedAt { get; set; }
        public string? ClarificationRequestedBy { get; set; }

        public string? SuggestedAction { get; set; }

        public bool ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ApprovedForCreationAt { get; set; }
        public string? ApprovedForCreationBy { get; set; }

        public bool Rejected { get; set; }
        public DateTime? RejectedAt { get; set; }
        public string? RejectedBy { get; set; }
        public string? RejectionReason { get; set; }

        public DateTime? ReconciledAt { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciledBy { get; set; }
    }

    private void GoToReportedItems()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items");
    }

    
    
    private Guid GetSelectedPendingParticipantId()
    {
        return selectedPending?.Id ?? Guid.Empty;
    }
    private static Guid GetPendingToolId(object? item)
    {
        if (item is null)
        {
            return Guid.Empty;
        }

        var type = item.GetType();

        var toolAssetIdProperty = type.GetProperty("ToolAssetId");
        if (toolAssetIdProperty?.GetValue(item) is Guid toolAssetId && toolAssetId != Guid.Empty)
        {
            return toolAssetId;
        }

        var idProperty = type.GetProperty("Id");
        if (idProperty?.GetValue(item) is Guid id && id != Guid.Empty)
        {
            return id;
        }

        return Guid.Empty;
    }
}
