@page "/physical-counts/{CountId:guid}/participants/{ParticipantId:guid}/pending-tools/{ToolAssetId:guid}"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@using System.Text.Json
@using System.Net.Http.Headers
@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components
@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components.Security
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>Validar herramienta asignada</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="PhysicalCounts.View" ModuleName="Validar herramienta asignada">

<section class="validation-hero @(IsRejectMode ? "reject-mode" : "confirm-mode")">
    <div>
        <span>@(IsRejectMode ? "RECHAZAR HERRAMIENTA ASIGNADA" : "VALIDAR HERRAMIENTA ASIGNADA")</span>
        <h1>@Display(tool?.Name)</h1>
        <p>
            @if (IsRejectMode)
            {
                <text>La herramienta aparece asignada al usuario, pero el usuario indica que no la tiene físicamente. Este caso queda para conciliación.</text>
            }
            else
            {
                <text>El usuario valida su inventario físico: confirma ubicación, estado, comentario, evidencia y accesorios encontrados.</text>
            }
        </p>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-light" @onclick="GoBack">Volver a la toma</button>
        <a class="btn btn-outline-light" href="@($"/tools/{ToolAssetId}")">Ver activo</a>
        <a class="btn btn-outline-light" href="@($"/tools/{ToolAssetId}/technical-life-record")">Hoja de vida</a>
    </div>
</section>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(successMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-success">@successMessage</div>
}

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">@errorMessage</div>
}

@if (isLoading)
{
    <div class="validation-card">Cargando información del activo y hoja de vida.</div>
}
else if (tool is null)
{
    <div class="alert alert-warning">
        No se encontró la herramienta pendiente. Vuelve a la toma física y abre nuevamente el detalle.
    </div>
}
else
{
    <section class="validation-two-columns">

        <section class="validation-left-column">

            <article class="validation-card edit-zone">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge green">MODIFICABLE</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Validación permitida por el usuario</h2>
                        <p>Solo estos campos pueden cambiar durante la toma física.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <label class="form-label">Ubicación encontrada</label>
                <select class="form-select" @bind="form.LocationId" disabled="@IsRejectMode">
                    <option value="">Seleccione ubicación...</option>
                    @foreach (var location in locations)
                    {
                        <option value="@location.Id">@location.DisplayName</option>
                    }
                </select>

                <label class="form-label mt-2">Estado físico observado</label>
                <select class="form-select" @bind="form.PhysicalStatus" disabled="@IsRejectMode">
                    <option value="Good">Bueno</option>
                    <option value="Damaged">Dańado</option>
                    <option value="Lost">No localizado</option>
                    <option value="NotSuitable">No apto</option>
                </select>

                <label class="form-label mt-2">Estado operativo observado</label>
                <select class="form-select" @bind="form.OperationalStatus" disabled="@IsRejectMode">
                    <option value="Available">Disponible</option>
                    <option value="Assigned">Asignado</option>
                    <option value="InUse">En uso</option>
                    <option value="Maintenance">En mantenimiento</option>
                    <option value="OutOfService">Fuera de servicio</option>
                    <option value="PendingValidation">Pendiente validación</option>
                </select>

                <label class="form-label mt-2">
                    @(IsRejectMode ? "Comentario del rechazo" : "Comentario de validación")
                </label>
                <textarea class="form-control"
                          rows="6"
                          @bind="form.Observation"
                          placeholder="@ObservationPlaceholder"></textarea>

                @if (IsRejectMode)
                {
                    <div class="reject-warning">
                        Esta acción no elimina el activo. Lo deja como <strong>Pendiente conciliación</strong> para revisar trazabilidad, reasignación, bodega, baja o corrección administrativa.
                    </div>
                }
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card evidence-zone">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge blue">EVIDENCIA</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Evidencia de toma física</h2>
                        <p>El usuario puede agregar evidencias nuevas, pero no eliminar documentos existentes.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <label class="form-label">Agregar evidencia nueva</label>
                <InputFile OnChange="OnEvidenceSelected" multiple />

                <small class="evidence-help">
                    Puedes seleccionar hasta @MaxEvidenceFiles archivos. Las evidencias existentes solo se pueden ver o descargar, no eliminar desde esta vista.
                </small>

                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(evidenceSelectionError))
                {
                    <div class="alert alert-warning mt-2 mb-0">
                        @evidenceSelectionError
                    </div>
                }

                @if (selectedEvidences.Count > 0)
                {
                    <div class="selected-evidence-list">
                        <div class="selected-evidence-header">
                            <strong>Evidencias seleccionadas</strong>
                            <span>@selectedEvidences.Count archivo(s)</span>
                        </div>

                        @for (var i = 0; i < selectedEvidences.Count; i++)
                        {
                            var index = i;
                            var evidence = selectedEvidences[i];

                            <div class="selected-evidence-item">
                                <div>
                                    <strong>@evidence.Name</strong>
                                    <span>@FormatFileSize(evidence.Size)</span>
                                </div>

                                <button type="button"
                                        class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger"
                                        @onclick="() => RemoveSelectedEvidence(index)">
                                    Quitar
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }

                <label class="form-label mt-2">Descripción de las evidencias</label>
                <input class="form-control"
                       @bind="form.EvidenceDescription"
                       placeholder="Ej: Fotos tomadas durante la validación física de la herramienta y sus accesorios." />

                <hr />

                <h3>Evidencias y documentos existentes</h3>

                @if (documents.Count == 0)
                {
                    <div class="empty-box">No hay evidencias o documentos cargados para este activo.</div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="documents-list">
                        @foreach (var document in documents)
                        {
                            <div class="document-item">
                                <div>
                                    <strong>@Display(document.FileName)</strong>
                                    <span>@Display(document.DocumentType) · @Display(document.UploadedBy) · @FormatDate(document.UploadedAt)</span>
                                    <small>@Display(document.Description)</small>
                                </div>

                                <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="@GetDocumentUrl(document)" target="_blank">
                                    Ver / Descargar
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card accessories-user-zone">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge blue">ACCESORIOS</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Accesorios del equipo</h2>
                        <p>Agrega accesorios encontrados durante la toma física. Solo se agregan y se listan debajo.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="accessory-capture-box">
                    <div class="accessory-form-header">
                        <div class="accessory-form-number">@NextAccessoryNumber</div>
                        <h3>Nuevo accesorio</h3>
                    </div>

                    <div class="accessory-form-grid">
                        <div>
                            <label>Nombre del accesorio</label>
                            <input class="form-control"
                                   placeholder="Ej: CARGADOR"
                                   @bind="newAccessory.Name" />
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label>Cantidad</label>
                            <input type="number"
                                   min="1"
                                   step="1"
                                   class="form-control"
                                   @bind="newAccessory.Quantity" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="check-box-like">
                            <label class="checkbox-inline">
                                <input type="checkbox" @bind="newAccessory.RequiresMaintenance" />
                                Requiere mantenimiento
                            </label>
                        </div>

                        <div class="check-box-like">
                            <label class="checkbox-inline">
                                <input type="checkbox" @bind="newAccessory.IsMeasurementEquipment" />
                                Equipo de medición
                            </label>
                        </div>

                        <div class="full-width">
                            <label>Observación</label>
                            <textarea class="form-control"
                                      rows="3"
                                      placeholder="Observación del accesorio..."
                                      @bind="newAccessory.Observation"></textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(accessoryCreateError))
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-warning mt-2 mb-0">
                            @accessoryCreateError
                        </div>
                    }

                    <div class="accessory-action-row">
                        <button type="button"
                                class="btn btn-primary"
                                @onclick="AddAccessoryFromValidation">
                            Crear accesorio
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="accessory-list-section">
                    <h3>Accesorios agregados</h3>

                    @if (reportedAccessories.Count == 0)
                    {
                        <div class="empty-box">
                            Todavía no has agregado accesorios en esta validación.
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="accessory-added-list">
                            @foreach (var accessory in reportedAccessories)
                            {
                                <div class="accessory-added-card">
                                    <div class="accessory-added-top">
                                        <strong>@Display(accessory.Name)</strong>
                                        <span class="accessory-added-qty">Cantidad: @accessory.Quantity</span>
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="accessory-added-flags">
                                        <span class="mini-pill @(accessory.RequiresMaintenance ? "yes" : "no")">
                                            Mantenimiento: @(accessory.RequiresMaintenance ? "Sí" : "No")
                                        </span>
                                        <span class="mini-pill @(accessory.IsMeasurementEquipment ? "yes" : "no")">
                                            Equipo de medición: @(accessory.IsMeasurementEquipment ? "Sí" : "No")
                                        </span>
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="accessory-added-observation">
                                        <strong>Observación:</strong>
                                        <span>@Display(accessory.Observation)</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card actions-zone">
                <div>
                    <h2>Finalizar validación</h2>
                    <p>
                        @if (IsRejectMode)
                        {
                            <text>Rechazar enviará este activo a pendiente de conciliación.</text>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <text>Confirmar guardará la validación, actualizará los campos permitidos y registrará evidencia y accesorios agregados.</text>
                        }
                    </p>
                </div>

                <div class="final-actions">
                    @if (IsRejectMode)
                    {
                        <button class="btn btn-danger" disabled="@isSaving" @onclick="RejectToolAsync">
                            Rechazar / No es mía
                        </button>

                        <a class="btn btn-outline-primary"
                           href="@($"/physical-counts/{CountId}/participants/{ParticipantId}/pending-tools/{ToolAssetId}")">
                            Cambiar a confirmar
                        </a>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <button class="btn btn-success" disabled="@isSaving" @onclick="ConfirmToolAsync">
                            Confirmar / Reportar correcto
                        </button>

                        <a class="btn btn-outline-danger"
                           href="@($"/physical-counts/{CountId}/participants/{ParticipantId}/pending-tools/{ToolAssetId}?mode=reject")">
                            Cambiar a rechazar
                        </a>
                    }

                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" disabled="@isSaving" @onclick="GoBack">
                        Cancelar
                    </button>
                </div>
            </article>

        </section>

        <section class="validation-right-column">

            <article class="validation-card info-zone compact-card">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge red">INFORMATIVO</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Información base del activo</h2>
                        <p>Solo lectura para el usuario.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="info-grid compact">
                    <div><span>Código interno</span><strong>@Display(tool.InternalCode)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Nombre</span><strong>@Display(tool.Name)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Serial</span><strong>@Display(tool.SerialNumber)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Activo fijo</span><strong>@Display(tool.FixedAssetCode)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Código Fenix365</span><strong>@Display(tool.FenixCode)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Marca</span><strong>@Display(tool.Brand)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Modelo</span><strong>@Display(tool.Model)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Tipo</span><strong>@Display(tool.ToolTypeName)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Categoría</span><strong>@Display(tool.ToolCategoryName)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Responsable actual</span><strong>@Display(tool.ResponsiblePersonName)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Sede actual</span><strong>@Display(tool.BranchCode)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Ubicación actual</span><strong>@Display(tool.LocationName)</strong></div>
                </div>
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card info-zone compact-card">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge red">INFORMATIVO</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Datos técnicos y reglas</h2>
                        <p>Información de hoja de vida técnica.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="info-grid compact">
                    <div><span>Voltaje</span><strong>@Display(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.Voltage)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Capacidad</span><strong>@Display(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.LoadCapacity)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Proveedor</span><strong>@Display(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.Provider)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Mantenimiento</span><strong>@YesNo(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.RequiresMaintenance)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Preoperacional</span><strong>@YesNo(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.RequiresPreOperationalCheck)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Certificación</span><strong>@YesNo(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.RequiresCertification)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Vence certificación</span><strong>@FormatDate(lifeRecord?.TechnicalSpecifications?.CertificationExpirationDate)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Garantía</span><strong>@YesNo(lifeRecord?.Warranty?.HasWarranty)</strong></div>
                </div>
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card info-zone compact-card">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge red">INFORMATIVO</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Vida útil y mantenimiento</h2>
                        <p>Información de planeación.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="info-grid compact">
                    <div><span>Inicio vida útil</span><strong>@FormatDate(lifeRecord?.UsefulLife?.StartDate)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Fin vida útil</span><strong>@FormatDate(lifeRecord?.UsefulLife?.EndDate)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Vida útil meses</span><strong>@DisplayNumber(lifeRecord?.UsefulLife?.UsefulLifeMonths)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Días restantes</span><strong>@DisplayNumber(lifeRecord?.UsefulLife?.RemainingDays)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Último mantenimiento</span><strong>@FormatDate(lifeRecord?.MaintenancePlan?.LastMaintenanceDate)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Próximo mantenimiento</span><strong>@FormatDate(lifeRecord?.MaintenancePlan?.NextMaintenanceDate)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Periodicidad</span><strong>@DisplayNumber(lifeRecord?.MaintenancePlan?.MaintenancePeriodMonths)</strong></div>
                    <div><span>Pendientes</span><strong>@DisplayNumber(lifeRecord?.MaintenancePlan?.PendingMaintenanceRecords)</strong></div>
                </div>
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card info-zone compact-card">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge red">INFORMATIVO</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Cronograma de mantenimiento</h2>
                        <p>Historial y programación.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                @if (lifeRecord?.MaintenanceSchedule?.Count > 0)
                {
                    <div class="mini-list">
                        @foreach (var maintenance in lifeRecord.MaintenanceSchedule.Take(6))
                        {
                            <div class="mini-item">
                                <strong>@Display(maintenance.MaintenanceNumber)</strong>
                                <span>@Display(maintenance.Type) · @Display(maintenance.Status) · @FormatDate(maintenance.ScheduledAt)</span>
                                <small>@Display(maintenance.Technician) / @Display(maintenance.ResponsibleName)</small>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="empty-box">No hay cronograma registrado.</div>
                }
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card info-zone compact-card">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge red">INFORMATIVO</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Prácticas seguras</h2>
                        <p>Indicaciones asociadas al activo.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                @if (lifeRecord?.SafePractices?.Count > 0)
                {
                    <div class="mini-list">
                        @foreach (var practice in lifeRecord.SafePractices.OrderBy(x => x.SortOrder).Take(6))
                        {
                            <div class="mini-item">
                                <strong>@Display(practice.PracticeName)</strong>
                                <span>@Display(practice.Description)</span>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="empty-box">No hay prácticas seguras registradas.</div>
                }
            </article>

            <article class="validation-card info-zone compact-card">
                <div class="zone-title">
                    <span class="zone-badge red">INFORMATIVO</span>
                    <div>
                        <h2>Eventos de hoja de vida</h2>
                        <p>Trazabilidad reciente.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                @if (lifeRecord?.LifeCycleEvents?.Count > 0)
                {
                    <div class="mini-list">
                        @foreach (var evt in lifeRecord.LifeCycleEvents.Take(8))
                        {
                            <div class="mini-item">
                                <strong>@Display(evt.Title)</strong>
                                <span>@Display(evt.EventType) · @Display(evt.PerformedBy) · @FormatDate(evt.EventDate)</span>
                                <small>@Display(evt.Description)</small>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="empty-box">No hay eventos registrados.</div>
                }
            </article>

        </section>
    </section>
}

</PermissionGuard>

@code {
    [Parameter] public Guid CountId { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public Guid ParticipantId { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }

    [SupplyParameterFromQuery(Name = "mode")]
    public string? Mode { get; set; }

    private PendingToolDto? tool;
    private TechnicalLifeRecordDto? lifeRecord;
    private List<DocumentDto> documents = new();
    private List<LocationOption> locations = new();
    private ReportForm form = new();
    private List<IBrowserFile> selectedEvidences = new();
    private string? evidenceSelectionError;
    private const int MaxEvidenceFiles = 10;
    private const long MaxEvidenceFileBytes = 50_000_000;

    private PendingAccessoryInput newAccessory = new();
    private List<ReportedAccessoryInput> reportedAccessories = new();
    private string? accessoryCreateError;

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private bool IsRejectMode =>
        string.Equals(Mode, "reject", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private int NextAccessoryNumber => reportedAccessories.Count + 1;

    private string ObservationPlaceholder =>
        IsRejectMode
            ? "Ej: Esta herramienta no está en mi poder. Fue entregada, está en bodega o pertenece a otro usuario."
            : "Ej: La herramienta está conmigo, se encuentra en buen estado y fue validada físicamente.";

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            await LoadLocationsAsync(api);

            var pending = await LoadPendingToolsAsync(api);
            var pendingTool = pending.FirstOrDefault(x =>
                x.Id == ToolAssetId ||
                x.ToolAssetId == ToolAssetId);

            var fullTool = await LoadFullToolAsync(api);

            tool = MergeToolData(pendingTool, fullTool);

            lifeRecord = await SafeGetAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordDto>(api, $"api/tools/{ToolAssetId}/technical-life-record");
            documents = await LoadDocumentsAsync(api);

            form.LocationId = tool?.LocationId;
            form.PhysicalStatus = IsRejectMode ? "Lost" : NormalizePhysicalStatus(tool?.PhysicalStatus);
            form.OperationalStatus = NormalizeOperationalStatus(tool?.OperationalStatus);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(form.Observation))
            {
                form.Observation = IsRejectMode
                    ? "El usuario indica que esta herramienta no está en su poder y requiere conciliación."
                    : "Herramienta validada físicamente por el usuario durante la toma física.";
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(form.EvidenceDescription))
            {
                form.EvidenceDescription = $"Evidencia de toma física para {tool?.InternalCode}.";
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar la información: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void AddAccessoryFromValidation()
    {
        accessoryCreateError = null;

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(newAccessory.Name))
        {
            accessoryCreateError = "Debes ingresar el nombre del accesorio.";
            return;
        }

        if (newAccessory.Quantity <= 0)
        {
            accessoryCreateError = "La cantidad debe ser mayor a cero.";
            return;
        }

        reportedAccessories.Add(new ReportedAccessoryInput
        {
            Name = newAccessory.Name.Trim(),
            Quantity = newAccessory.Quantity,
            RequiresMaintenance = newAccessory.RequiresMaintenance,
            IsMeasurementEquipment = newAccessory.IsMeasurementEquipment,
            Observation = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(newAccessory.Observation)
                ? "Accesorio agregado durante la toma física."
                : newAccessory.Observation.Trim()
        });

        newAccessory = new PendingAccessoryInput
        {
            Quantity = 1
        };
    }

    private string BuildAccessoriesReportText()
    {
        if (reportedAccessories.Count == 0)
        {
            return string.Empty;
        }

        var lines = new List<string>
        {
            "ACCESORIOS AGREGADOS EN TOMA FÍSICA:"
        };

        foreach (var accessory in reportedAccessories)
        {
            lines.Add(
                $"- Nombre: {Display(accessory.Name)} | Cantidad: {accessory.Quantity} | Requiere mantenimiento: {(accessory.RequiresMaintenance ? "Sí" : "No")} | Equipo de medición: {(accessory.IsMeasurementEquipment ? "Sí" : "No")} | Observación: {Display(accessory.Observation)}");
        }

        return string.Join(Environment.NewLine, lines);
    }

    private string BuildFinalObservation()
    {
        var baseObservation = form.Observation?.Trim() ?? string.Empty;
        var accessoriesText = BuildAccessoriesReportText();

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(accessoriesText))
        {
            return baseObservation;
        }

        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(baseObservation)
            ? accessoriesText
            : baseObservation + Environment.NewLine + Environment.NewLine + accessoriesText;
    }

    private async Task<List<PendingToolDto>> LoadPendingToolsAsync(HttpClient api)
    {
        var payload = await api.GetStringAsync($"api/physical-counts/participants/{ParticipantId}/pending-tools");
        return ParsePendingToolsPayload(payload);
    }

    private async Task<PendingToolDto?> LoadFullToolAsync(HttpClient api)
    {
        return await SafeGetAsync<PendingToolDto>(api, $"api/tools/{ToolAssetId}");
    }

    private static PendingToolDto? MergeToolData(PendingToolDto? pendingTool, PendingToolDto? fullTool)
    {
        if (pendingTool is null)
        {
            return fullTool;
        }

        if (fullTool is null)
        {
            return pendingTool;
        }

        return new PendingToolDto
        {
            Id = fullTool.Id != Guid.Empty ? fullTool.Id : pendingTool.Id,
            ToolAssetId = fullTool.ToolAssetId != Guid.Empty ? fullTool.ToolAssetId : pendingTool.ToolAssetId,
            InternalCode = Pick(fullTool.InternalCode, pendingTool.InternalCode),
            Name = Pick(fullTool.Name, pendingTool.Name),
            Description = Pick(fullTool.Description, pendingTool.Description),
            SerialNumber = Pick(fullTool.SerialNumber, pendingTool.SerialNumber),
            FixedAssetCode = Pick(fullTool.FixedAssetCode, pendingTool.FixedAssetCode),
            FenixCode = Pick(fullTool.FenixCode, pendingTool.FenixCode),
            Brand = Pick(fullTool.Brand, pendingTool.Brand),
            Model = Pick(fullTool.Model, pendingTool.Model),
            BranchId = fullTool.BranchId ?? pendingTool.BranchId,
            BranchCode = Pick(fullTool.BranchCode, pendingTool.BranchCode),
            BranchName = Pick(fullTool.BranchName, pendingTool.BranchName),
            LocationId = fullTool.LocationId ?? pendingTool.LocationId,
            LocationName = Pick(fullTool.LocationName, pendingTool.LocationName),
            ResponsiblePersonName = Pick(fullTool.ResponsiblePersonName, pendingTool.ResponsiblePersonName),
            ToolTypeName = Pick(fullTool.ToolTypeName, pendingTool.ToolTypeName),
            ToolCategoryName = Pick(fullTool.ToolCategoryName, pendingTool.ToolCategoryName),
            OperationalStatus = Pick(fullTool.OperationalStatus, pendingTool.OperationalStatus),
            PhysicalStatus = Pick(fullTool.PhysicalStatus, pendingTool.PhysicalStatus)
        };
    }

    private async Task LoadLocationsAsync(HttpClient api)
    {
        locations = new();

        try
        {
            var payload = await api.GetStringAsync("api/settings/locations");
            locations = ParseLocationsPayload(payload);
        }
        catch
        {
            try
            {
                var payload = await api.GetStringAsync("api/settings/warehouses");
                locations = ParseLocationsPayload(payload);
            }
            catch
            {
                locations = new();
            }
        }
    }

    private async Task<List<DocumentDto>> LoadDocumentsAsync(HttpClient api)
    {
        try
        {
            var payload = await api.GetStringAsync($"api/tools/{ToolAssetId}/documents");
            return ParseDocumentsPayload(payload);
        }
        catch
        {
            return new();
        }
    }

    private async Task ConfirmToolAsync()
    {
        await SendReportAsync("Confirmed");
    }

    private async Task RejectToolAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(form.Observation))
        {
            errorMessage = "Debes ingresar un comentario indicando por qué rechazas la herramienta.";
            return;
        }

        await SendReportAsync("Rejected");
    }

    private async Task SendReportAsync(string action)
    {
        isSaving = true;
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            form.Observation = BuildFinalObservation();

            if (action.Equals("Confirmed", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                await UpdateAllowedToolFieldsAsync(api);
            }

            if (selectedEvidences.Count > 0)
            {
                await UploadEvidenceAsync(api);
            }

            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(
                $"api/physical-counts/participants/{ParticipantId}/report-assigned-tool",
                new
                {
                    ToolAssetId,
                    ReportAction = action,
                    form.PhysicalStatus,
                    FoundLocation = GetSelectedLocationName(),
                    form.Observation,
                    ActionBy = "admin"
                });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar el reporte. {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = action == "Confirmed"
                ? "Herramienta reportada correctamente como completa."
                : "Herramienta rechazada y enviada a pendiente de conciliación.";

            await Task.Delay(650);
            GoBack();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error guardando validación: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

        private async Task UpdateAllowedToolFieldsAsync(HttpClient api)
    {
        var masterResponse = await api.PatchAsJsonAsync(
            $"api/tools/{ToolAssetId}/master-data",
            new
            {
                OperationalStatus = form.OperationalStatus,
                PhysicalStatus = form.PhysicalStatus,
                UpdatedBy = "admin"
            });

        if (!masterResponse.IsSuccessStatusCode)
        {
            var detail = await masterResponse.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No se pudieron actualizar los estados permitidos. {detail}");
        }

        // Importante:
        // La ubicación encontrada NO actualiza aquí la ubicación oficial del activo.
        // Se envía en el reporte de toma física por medio de FoundLocation.
        // Luego Conciliación / Admin decide si cambia la ubicación real del activo.
    }

        private async Task UploadEvidenceAsync(HttpClient api)
    {
        if (selectedEvidences.Count == 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        foreach (var evidence in selectedEvidences)
        {
            using var formData = new MultipartFormDataContent();

            using var stream = evidence.OpenReadStream(MaxEvidenceFileBytes);
            using var fileContent = new StreamContent(stream);

            fileContent.Headers.ContentType = new MediaTypeHeaderValue(
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(evidence.ContentType)
                    ? "application/octet-stream"
                    : evidence.ContentType);

            formData.Add(fileContent, "file", evidence.Name);
            formData.Add(new StringContent("PhysicalCountEvidence"), "documentType");
            formData.Add(new StringContent(form.EvidenceDescription ?? "Evidencia de toma física"), "description");
            formData.Add(new StringContent("admin"), "uploadedBy");

            var response = await api.PostAsync($"api/tools/{ToolAssetId}/documents", formData);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"No se pudo cargar la evidencia {evidence.Name}. {detail}");
            }
        }
    }

        private void OnEvidenceSelected(InputFileChangeEventArgs args)
    {
        evidenceSelectionError = null;

        IReadOnlyList<IBrowserFile> files;

        try
        {
            files = args.GetMultipleFiles(MaxEvidenceFiles);
        }
        catch
        {
            evidenceSelectionError = $"Puedes seleccionar máximo {MaxEvidenceFiles} evidencias por validación.";
            return;
        }

        foreach (var file in files)
        {
            if (selectedEvidences.Count >= MaxEvidenceFiles)
            {
                evidenceSelectionError = $"Solo puedes agregar máximo {MaxEvidenceFiles} evidencias.";
                return;
            }

            var alreadyAdded = selectedEvidences.Any(x =>
                string.Equals(x.Name, file.Name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                x.Size == file.Size);

            if (alreadyAdded)
            {
                continue;
            }

            selectedEvidences.Add(file);
        }
    }

    private void RemoveSelectedEvidence(int index)
    {
        if (index < 0 || index >= selectedEvidences.Count)
        {
            return;
        }

        selectedEvidences.RemoveAt(index);
    }

    private static string FormatFileSize(long bytes)
    {
        if (bytes < 1024)
        {
            return $"{bytes} B";
        }

        if (bytes < 1024 * 1024)
        {
            return $"{bytes / 1024m:N1} KB";
        }

        return $"{bytes / 1024m / 1024m:N1} MB";
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/physical-counts/{CountId}");
    }

    private string? GetSelectedLocationName()
    {
        if (!form.LocationId.HasValue)
        {
            return tool?.LocationName;
        }

        return locations.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == form.LocationId.Value)?.Name ?? tool?.LocationName;
    }

    private static async Task<T?> SafeGetAsync<T>(HttpClient api, string url)
    {
        try
        {
            return await api.GetFromJsonAsync<T>(url);
        }
        catch
        {
            return default;
        }
    }

    private static List<PendingToolDto> ParsePendingToolsPayload(string payload)
    {
        return ParseListPayload<PendingToolDto>(payload, "tools", "pendingTools", "items", "data", "results");
    }

    private static List<DocumentDto> ParseDocumentsPayload(string payload)
    {
        return ParseListPayload<DocumentDto>(payload, "documents", "items", "data", "results");
    }

    private static List<T> ParseListPayload<T>(string payload, params string[] arrayNames)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(payload))
        {
            return new();
        }

        var options = new JsonSerializerOptions(JsonSerializerDefaults.Web)
        {
            PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true
        };

        using var document = JsonDocument.Parse(payload);
        var root = document.RootElement;

        if (root.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Array)
        {
            return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<T>>(root.GetRawText(), options) ?? new();
        }

        if (root.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Object)
        {
            foreach (var property in root.EnumerateObject())
            {
                if (arrayNames.Any(name =>
                        string.Equals(name, property.Name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) &&
                    property.Value.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Array)
                {
                    return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<T>>(property.Value.GetRawText(), options) ?? new();
                }
            }

            var single = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<T>(root.GetRawText(), options);

            return single is null ? new() : new List<T> { single };
        }

        return new();
    }

    private static List<LocationOption> ParseLocationsPayload(string payload)
    {
        var locations = ParseListPayload<LocationOption>(payload, "locations", "items", "data", "results");

        return locations
            .Where(x => x.Id != Guid.Empty)
            .OrderBy(x => x.DisplayName)
            .ToList();
    }

    private static string NormalizePhysicalStatus(string? value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            return "Good";
        }

        return value.Trim() switch
        {
            "Bueno" => "Good",
            "Dańado" => "Damaged",
            "No localizado" => "Lost",
            "No apto" => "NotSuitable",
            _ => value.Trim()
        };
    }

    private static string NormalizeOperationalStatus(string? value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            return "Assigned";
        }

        return value.Trim() switch
        {
            "Disponible" => "Available",
            "Asignado" => "Assigned",
            "En uso" => "InUse",
            "Mantenimiento" => "Maintenance",
            "Fuera de servicio" => "OutOfService",
            "Pendiente validación" => "PendingValidation",
            _ => value.Trim()
        };
    }

    private static string Pick(string? primary, string? fallback) =>
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(primary) ? primary : fallback;

    private static string Display(string? value) =>
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;

    private static string DisplayNumber(int? value) =>
        value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("N0") : "—";

    private static string DisplayNumber(decimal? value) =>
        value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("N0") : "—";

    private static string YesNo(bool? value) =>
        value.HasValue ? (value.Value ? "Sí" : "No") : "—";

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value) =>
        value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "—";

    private static string GetDocumentUrl(DocumentDto document) =>
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(document.DownloadUrl)
            ? $"/api/tools/documents/{document.Id}/download"
            : document.DownloadUrl;

    private sealed class ReportForm
    {
        public Guid? LocationId { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = "Good";
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; } = "Assigned";
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
        public string? EvidenceDescription { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class PendingAccessoryInput
    {
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public int Quantity { get; set; } = 1;
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool IsMeasurementEquipment { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ReportedAccessoryInput
    {
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public int Quantity { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool IsMeasurementEquipment { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class PendingToolDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? InternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public Guid? LocationId { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class LocationOption
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? Code { get; set; }
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }

        public string DisplayName =>
            $"{Code} - {Name}".Trim(' ', '-');
    }

    private sealed class DocumentDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string? DocumentType { get; set; }
        public string? FileName { get; set; }
        public string? DownloadUrl { get; set; }
        public string? UploadedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UploadedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordDto
    {
        public TechnicalSpecificationsDto? TechnicalSpecifications { get; set; }
        public WarrantyDto? Warranty { get; set; }
        public UsefulLifeDto? UsefulLife { get; set; }
        public MaintenancePlanDto? MaintenancePlan { get; set; }
        public List<SafePracticeDto> SafePractices { get; set; } = new();
        public List<MaintenanceScheduleDto> MaintenanceSchedule { get; set; } = new();
        public List<LifeCycleEventDto> LifeCycleEvents { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalSpecificationsDto
    {
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool? RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool? RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool? RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class WarrantyDto
    {
        public bool? HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class UsefulLifeDto
    {
        public DateTime? StartDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? EndDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
        public int? ElapsedDays { get; set; }
        public int? RemainingDays { get; set; }
        public decimal? UsedPercentage { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenancePlanDto
    {
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
        public int? TotalMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
        public int? CompletedMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
        public int? PendingMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class SafePracticeDto
    {
        public string? PracticeName { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public int SortOrder { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceScheduleDto
    {
        public string? MaintenanceNumber { get; set; }
        public string? Type { get; set; }
        public string? Status { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public string? Technician { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class LifeCycleEventDto
    {
        public string? EventType { get; set; }
        public string? Title { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? EventDate { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/physical-counts/{Id:guid}/reported-items"
@rendermode InteractiveServer

@using System.Net.Http.Json
@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components.Security

@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>Registros reportados por usuario</PageTitle>

<PermissionGuard Permission="PhysicalCounts.View" ModuleName="Registros reportados">

    <section class="ri-hero">
        <div>
            <span class="ri-pill">TOMA FÍSICA · REGISTROS REPORTADOS</span>
            <h2>Registros reportados</h2>

            @if (SelectedParticipant is not null)
            {
                <p>
                    Vista informativa de los registros reportados por
                    <strong>@SelectedParticipant.DisplayName</strong>.
                    Aquí no se realizan acciones administrativas.
                </p>
            }
            else
            {
                <p>
                    Vista informativa de registros reportados durante la toma física.
                    Para ver solo un usuario, ingrese desde el botón de la toma física.
                </p>
            }
        </div>

        <div class="ri-actions">
            <button class="btn btn-light" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
                @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")
            </button>

            <button class="btn btn-outline-light" type="button" @onclick="GoBack">
                Volver
            </button>
        </div>
    </section>

    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger">@errorMessage</div>
    }

    @if (isLoading && board is null)
    {
        <div class="ri-empty">Cargando registros reportados...</div>
    }
    else if (board is null)
    {
        <div class="ri-empty">No se pudo cargar la información de registros reportados.</div>
    }
    else
    {
        <section class="ri-context-card">
            <div>
                <span>Toma física</span>
                <strong>@Display(board.CountNumber)</strong>
                <small>@Display(board.BranchCode) - @Display(board.BranchName)</small>
            </div>

            <div>
                <span>Responsable / usuario</span>
                <strong>@Display(SelectedParticipant?.DisplayName ?? CurrentResponsibleName)</strong>
                <small>@Display(SelectedParticipant?.UserName)</small>
            </div>

            <div>
                <span>Modo</span>
                <strong>Solo lectura</strong>
                <small>Las decisiones se hacen en el menú Conciliación</small>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="ri-kpis">
            <article>
                <span>Total</span>
                <strong>@VisibleItems.Count()</strong>
                <small>Registros del usuario</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Completos</span>
                <strong>@VisibleItems.Count(IsComplete)</strong>
                <small>Validados o creados</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Pendientes</span>
                <strong>@VisibleItems.Count(IsPending)</strong>
                <small>Por conciliación</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>No listadas</span>
                <strong>@VisibleItems.Count(x => IsReportType(x, "ExtraNotListed"))</strong>
                <small>Reportes nuevos</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>No encontradas</span>
                <strong>@VisibleItems.Count(x => IsReportType(x, "NotFound"))</strong>
                <small>Faltantes</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Aclaración</span>
                <strong>@VisibleItems.Count(x => x.RequiresUserClarification || IsStatus(x, "RequiresUserClarification"))</strong>
                <small>Requieren contacto</small>
            </article>
        </section>

        <section class="ri-card ri-filter-card">
            <div class="ri-card-title">
                <div>
                    <h3>Consulta de registros</h3>
                    <p>
                        Esta vista solo permite consultar la información reportada por el usuario.
                        No incluye acciones de conciliación.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearFilters">
                    Limpiar filtros
                </button>
            </div>

            <div class="ri-filter-grid ri-filter-grid-simple">
                <label>
                    Buscar
                    <input class="form-control"
                           placeholder="Código, nombre, serial, categoría, observación..."
                           @bind="searchText"
                           @bind:event="oninput" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Desde
                    <input class="form-control"
                           placeholder="yyyy-MM-dd"
                           @bind="filterFromDateText" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Hasta
                    <input class="form-control"
                           placeholder="yyyy-MM-dd"
                           @bind="filterToDateText" />
                </label>
            </div>

            <div class="ri-filter-checks">
                <label>
                    <input type="checkbox" @bind="onlyCreatedAssets" />
                    Mostrar solo activos creados en inventario
                </label>

                <label>
                    <input type="checkbox" @bind="onlyExtraNotListed" />
                    Mostrar solo herramientas no listadas
                </label>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="ri-card">
            <div class="ri-card-title">
                <div>
                    <h3>
                        @if (SelectedParticipant is not null)
                        {
                            <span>Registros reportados de @SelectedParticipant.DisplayName</span>
                        }
                        else if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(CurrentResponsibleName))
                        {
                            <span>Registros reportados de @CurrentResponsibleName</span>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <span>Registros reportados</span>
                        }
                    </h3>
                    <p>
                        Se muestran los registros encontrados, rechazados, no encontrados o no listados.
                        Las acciones administrativas se realizan únicamente en el módulo Conciliación.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <div class="ri-result-counter">
                    <span>Filtrados</span>
                    <strong>@FilteredItems.Count()</strong>
                </div>
            </div>

            @if (!FilteredItems.Any())
            {
                <div class="ri-empty">
                    No hay registros reportados para el usuario seleccionado.
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="ri-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ri-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Tipo / usuario</th>
                                <th>Código / activo</th>
                                <th>Clasificación</th>
                                <th>Ubicación / responsable</th>
                                <th>Estado reportado</th>
                                <th>Datos mínimos</th>
                                <th>Estado conciliación</th>
                                <th>Consulta</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>

                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in FilteredItems)
                            {
                                var lifeRecordId = GetLifeRecordId(item);

                                <tr class="@GetRowClass(item)">
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="@GetReportTypeClass(item)">
                                            @GetReportTypeLabel(item)
                                        </span>

                                        <small>@Display(item.ParticipantName)</small>
                                        <small>@Display(item.ParticipantUserName)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <strong>@Display(item.ToolInternalCode ?? item.ReportedCode ?? item.MatchedToolInternalCode)</strong>
                                        <span>@Display(item.ToolName ?? item.ReportedName ?? item.MatchedToolName)</span>

                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SerialNumber))
                                        {
                                            <small>Serial: @item.SerialNumber</small>
                                        }

                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Brand) || !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Model))
                                        {
                                            <small>Marca/Modelo: @Display(item.Brand) @Display(item.Model)</small>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue && item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty)
                                        {
                                            <small class="ri-created-id">Activo creado en inventario: @item.CreatedToolAssetId</small>
                                        }
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <small>Tipo: @Display(item.AssetTypeName)</small>
                                        <small>Categoría: @Display(item.CategoryName)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <small>Sede: @Display(item.BranchCode)</small>
                                        <small>Ubicación: @Display(item.FoundLocation)</small>
                                        <small>Responsable: @Display(item.ResponsibleName)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <small>Físico: @Display(item.PhysicalStatus)</small>
                                        <small>Operativo: @Display(item.OperationalStatus)</small>
                                        <small>Reportó: @Display(item.ReportedBy)</small>
                                        <small>Fecha: @FormatDate(item.ReportedAt)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        @if (item.MinimumDataCompleted)
                                        {
                                            <span class="ri-status ok">Completos</span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="ri-status danger">Sin mínimos</span>
                                            <small>@Display(item.MissingRequiredData)</small>
                                        }
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span class="@GetStatusClass(item)">
                                            @GetVisualReconciliationLabel(item)
                                        </span>

                                        <small>@Display(item.SuggestedAction)</small>
                                        <small>@Display(item.ReconciliationObservation)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <div class="ri-row-actions">
                                            @if (lifeRecordId.HasValue)
                                            {
                                                <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary"
                                                   href="@($"/tools/{lifeRecordId.Value}/technical-life-record")">
                                                    Hoja de vida
                                                </a>
                                            }

                                            @if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue && item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty)
                                            {
                                                <a class="btn btn-sm btn-success"
                                                   href="@($"/tools/{item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value}")">
                                                    Ver activo
                                                </a>
                                            }

                                            @if (!lifeRecordId.HasValue && !item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue)
                                            {
                                                <span class="ri-muted">Pendiente de creación</span>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            }
        </section>
    }

</PermissionGuard>
