@code {
    [Parameter] public Guid Id { get; set; }

    [Parameter]
    [SupplyParameterFromQuery(Name = "participantId")]
    public Guid? ParticipantId { get; set; }

    [Parameter]
    [SupplyParameterFromQuery(Name = "responsible")]
    public string? ResponsibleQuery { get; set; }

    private ReportedItemsBoard? board;
    private ParticipantBoard? participantBoard;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private string? searchText;
    private string? filterFromDateText;
    private string? filterToDateText;
    private bool onlyCreatedAssets;
    private bool onlyExtraNotListed;

    private List<ReportedItemDto> AllItems => board?.Items ?? new();

    private ParticipantItem? SelectedParticipant =>
        ParticipantId.HasValue
            ? (participantBoard?.Participants ?? new()).FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == ParticipantId.Value)
            : null;

    private string? CurrentResponsibleName =>
        SelectedParticipant?.DisplayName ??
        ResponsibleQuery ??
        AllItems
            .Select(x => x.ResponsibleName ?? x.ParticipantName)
            .FirstOrDefault(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x));

    private IEnumerable<ReportedItemDto> VisibleItems =>
        AllItems
            .Where(MatchesSelectedResponsible)
            .OrderBy(GetPriority)
            .ThenByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt);


    private IEnumerable<ReportedItemDto> FilteredItems =>
        VisibleItems
            .Where(MatchesSearch)

            .Where(MatchesDateRange)
            .Where(MatchesOnlyCreated)
            .Where(MatchesOnlyExtraNotListed)
            .OrderBy(GetPriority)
            .ThenByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();

            board = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<ReportedItemsBoard>($"api/physical-counts/{Id}/reported-items-board");

            try
            {
                participantBoard = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<ParticipantBoard>($"api/physical-counts/{Id}/participants-board");
            }
            catch
            {
                participantBoard = new ParticipantBoard();
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error cargando registros reportados: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        if (api.BaseAddress is null)
        {
            api.BaseAddress = new Uri("http://localhost:5218/");
        }

        return api;
    }

    private void ClearFilters()
    {
        searchText = null;
        filterFromDateText = null;
        filterToDateText = null;
        onlyCreatedAssets = false;
        onlyExtraNotListed = false;
    }

    private bool MatchesSelectedResponsible(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (ParticipantId.HasValue)
        {
            if (item.PhysicalCountParticipantId.HasValue &&
                item.PhysicalCountParticipantId.Value == ParticipantId.Value)
            {
                return true;
            }

            var participant = SelectedParticipant;

            if (participant is null)
            {
                return false;
            }

            return MatchesParticipantText(item, participant.DisplayName, participant.UserName);
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(ResponsibleQuery))
        {
            return MatchesParticipantText(item, ResponsibleQuery, ResponsibleQuery);
        }

        return true;
    }


    private static bool MatchesParticipantText(ReportedItemDto item, string? name, string? userName)
    {
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ParticipantName) &&
                item.ParticipantName.Equals(name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return true;
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ResponsibleName) &&
                item.ResponsibleName.Equals(name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return true;
            }
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(userName))
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ParticipantUserName) &&
                item.ParticipantUserName.Equals(userName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var term = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(item.ReportedCode, term) ||
               Contains(item.ReportedName, term) ||
               Contains(item.ToolInternalCode, term) ||
               Contains(item.ToolName, term) ||
               Contains(item.MatchedToolInternalCode, term) ||
               Contains(item.MatchedToolName, term) ||
               Contains(item.SerialNumber, term) ||
               Contains(item.Brand, term) ||
               Contains(item.Model, term) ||
               Contains(item.AssetTypeName, term) ||
               Contains(item.CategoryName, term) ||
               Contains(item.ResponsibleName, term) ||
               Contains(item.ParticipantName, term) ||
               Contains(item.ParticipantUserName, term) ||
               Contains(item.FoundLocation, term) ||
               Contains(item.ReportTypeLabel, term) ||
               Contains(item.ReconciliationStatusLabel, term) ||
               Contains(item.ReconciliationObservation, term) ||
               Contains(item.Observation, term);
    }



    private bool MatchesDateRange(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (!item.ReportedAt.HasValue)
        {
            return true;
        }

        var date = item.ReportedAt.Value.Date;

        if (DateTime.TryParse(filterFromDateText, out var fromDate) && date < fromDate.Date)
        {
            return false;
        }

        if (DateTime.TryParse(filterToDateText, out var toDate) && date > toDate.Date)
        {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    private bool MatchesOnlyCreated(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (!onlyCreatedAssets)
        {
            return true;
        }

        return item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue &&
               item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty;
    }

    private bool MatchesOnlyExtraNotListed(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (!onlyExtraNotListed)
        {
            return true;
        }

        return item.ReportType.Equals("ExtraNotListed", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static int GetPriority(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || IsStatus(item, "RequiresUserClarification"))
        {
            return 1;
        }

        if (!item.MinimumDataCompleted)
        {
            return 2;
        }

        if (IsStatus(item, "MatchedInSystem"))
        {
            return 3;
        }

        if (IsStatus(item, "ApprovedForCreation"))
        {
            return 4;
        }

        if (item.ReportType.Equals("ExtraNotListed", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return 5;
        }

        if (IsStatus(item, "PendingReview") || IsStatus(item, "NotFoundInSystem"))
        {
            return 6;
        }

        if (IsComplete(item))
        {
            return 20;
        }

        if (item.Rejected || IsStatus(item, "Rejected"))
        {
            return 30;
        }

        return 10;
    }

    private static bool IsPending(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        return !IsComplete(item) &&
               !item.Rejected &&
               !IsStatus(item, "Rejected");
    }

    private static bool IsComplete(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        return IsStatus(item, "Reconciled") ||
               item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue && item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty;
    }

    private static bool IsReportType(ReportedItemDto item, string type)
    {
        return item.ReportType.Equals(type, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static bool IsStatus(ReportedItemDto item, string status)
    {
        return item.ReconciliationStatus.Equals(status, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? value, string term)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) &&
               value.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static string Display(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "—";
    }

    private static Guid? GetLifeRecordId(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (item.ToolAssetId.HasValue && item.ToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty)
        {
            return item.ToolAssetId.Value;
        }

        if (item.MatchedToolAssetId.HasValue && item.MatchedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty)
        {
            return item.MatchedToolAssetId.Value;
        }

        if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue && item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty)
        {
            return item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value;
        }

        return null;
    }

    private static string GetReportTypeLabel(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ReportTypeLabel))
        {
            return item.ReportTypeLabel;
        }

        return item.ReportType switch
        {
            "Found" => "Encontrada",
            "NotFound" => "No encontrada",
            "ExtraNotListed" => "Herramienta no listada",
            "Damaged" => "Dańada",
            "ReturnedOrDelivered" => "Devuelta / entregada",
            _ => Display(item.ReportType)
        };
    }

    private static string GetReportTypeClass(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        return item.ReportType switch
        {
            "Found" => "ri-badge found",
            "NotFound" => "ri-badge missing",
            "ExtraNotListed" => "ri-badge extra",
            "Damaged" => "ri-badge damage",
            "ReturnedOrDelivered" => "ri-badge returned",
            _ => "ri-badge"
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusClass(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (item.Rejected || IsStatus(item, "Rejected"))
        {
            return "ri-status danger";
        }

        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || IsStatus(item, "RequiresUserClarification"))
        {
            return "ri-status warn";
        }

        if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue && item.CreatedToolAssetId.Value != Guid.Empty)
        {
            return "ri-status done";
        }

        return item.ReconciliationStatus switch
        {
            "PendingReview" => "ri-status pending",
            "NotFoundInSystem" => "ri-status danger",
            "MatchedInSystem" => "ri-status info",
            "ApprovedForCreation" => "ri-status ok",
            "Reconciled" => "ri-status done",
            _ => "ri-status pending"
        };
    }

    private static string GetRowClass(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        if (IsComplete(item))
        {
            return "ri-row-complete";
        }

        if (item.Rejected || IsStatus(item, "Rejected"))
        {
            return string.Empty;
        }

        return "ri-row-pending";
    }

    private static string GetVisualReconciliationLabel(ReportedItemDto item)
    {
        var status = item.ReconciliationStatus ?? string.Empty;
        var label = item.ReconciliationStatusLabel ?? string.Empty;

        if (item.Rejected || status.Equals("Rejected", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Activo rechazado";
        }

        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || status.Equals("RequiresUserClarification", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Requiere aclaración";
        }

        if (!item.MinimumDataCompleted)
        {
            return "Sin mínimos";
        }

        if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue ||
            status.Equals("Reconciled", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            label.Equals("Conciliada", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            label.Equals("Conciliado", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Completo";
        }

        if (item.ApprovedForCreation ||
            status.Equals("ApprovedForCreation", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Aprobado para creación";
        }

        if (status.Equals("NotFoundInSystem", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Pendiente de creación";
        }

        if (status.Equals("MatchedInSystem", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Pendiente conciliación";
        }

        if (status.Equals("PendingReview", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return "Pendiente de revisión";
        }

        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(label)
            ? (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Pendiente de revisión" : status)
            : label.Replace("Conciliada", "Completo", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                   .Replace("Conciliado", "Completo", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/physical-counts/{Id}");
    }

    private sealed class ParticipantBoard
    {
        public List<ParticipantItem> Participants { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class ParticipantItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string DisplayName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string UserName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItemsBoard
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string CountNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string StatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public ReportedItemsSummary Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public List<ReportedItemDto> Items { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItemsSummary
    {
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public int Found { get; set; }
        public int NotFound { get; set; }
        public int ReturnedOrDelivered { get; set; }
        public int Damaged { get; set; }
        public int DifferentLocation { get; set; }
        public int DifferentResponsible { get; set; }
        public int ExtraNotListed { get; set; }
        public int PendingReview { get; set; }
        public int RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public int ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public int Reconciled { get; set; }
        public int Rejected { get; set; }
        public int MissingMinimumData { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItemDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid? PhysicalCountParticipantId { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantName { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantUserName { get; set; }
        public string ReportType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReportTypeLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }
        public Guid? MatchedToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolName { get; set; }
        public Guid? CreatedToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedCode { get; set; }
        public string ReportedName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? AssetTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? CategoryName { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReportedAt { get; set; }
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ReconciliationObservation { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public bool MinimumDataCompleted { get; set; }
        public string? MissingRequiredData { get; set; }
        public bool ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public bool Rejected { get; set; }
        public string? SuggestedAction { get; set; }
    }
}

                                            Cerrar
                                        </button>

                                            Cancelar
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </article>

@code {
    private List<PhysicalCountItem> counts = new();
    private List<BranchOption> branches = new();
    private CreatePhysicalCountRequest newCount = new();
    private bool isLoading;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private IEnumerable<PhysicalCountItem> FilteredCounts =>
        counts.Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText) ||
                          Contains(x.CountNumber, searchText) ||
                          Contains(x.BranchCode, searchText) ||
                          Contains(x.BranchName, searchText) ||
                          Contains(x.ResponsibleBy, searchText));

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        newCount.ResponsibleBy = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName;
        await LoadBranchesAsync();
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        var api = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");

        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador" : AuthSession.RoleName);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.RoleCode) ? "ADMIN" : AuthSession.RoleCode);
        api.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Navi-Permissions", string.Join(";", AuthSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>()));

        return api;
    }

    private async Task LoadBranchesAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            branches = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchOption>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
        }
        catch
        {
            branches = new();
        }
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            counts = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<PhysicalCountItem>>("api/physical-counts") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar las tomas físicas: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task CreateAsync()
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(newCount.BranchCode))
        {
            errorMessage = "Seleccione una sede.";
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/physical-counts", newCount);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                errorMessage = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "Toma física creada correctamente.";
            newCount = new CreatePhysicalCountRequest
            {
                ResponsibleBy = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AuthSession.UserName) ? "admin" : AuthSession.UserName
            };

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = ex.Message;
        }
    }

    private async Task StartAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchAsync($"api/physical-counts/{id}/start", "Toma física iniciada.");
    }

    private async Task CompleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchAsync($"api/physical-counts/{id}/complete", "Toma física cerrada.");
    }

    private async Task CancelAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchAsync($"api/physical-counts/{id}/cancel", "Toma física cancelada.");
    }

    private async Task PatchAsync(string endpoint, string success)
    {
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();
            var response = await api.PatchAsJsonAsync(endpoint, new
            {
                ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                Notes = success
            });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                errorMessage = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                return;
            }

            successMessage = success;
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = ex.Message;
        }
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? value, string search) =>
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) &&
        value.Contains(search.Trim(), StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value) =>
        value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "—";

    private static string GetStatusClass(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Draft" => "tf-status draft",
        "InProgress" => "tf-status progress",
        "Completed" => "tf-status completed",
        "Reconciled" => "tf-status completed",
        "Cancelled" => "tf-status cancelled",
        _ => "tf-status draft"
    };

    private sealed class PhysicalCountItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string CountNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string StatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleBy { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public int TotalItems { get; set; }
        public int FoundItems { get; set; }
        public int MissingItems { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class BranchOption
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class CreatePhysicalCountRequest
    {
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleBy { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
    }
}

<PermissionGuard Permission="PhysicalCounts.View">
    <div class="reconciliation-page">
        <section class="rec-hero">

                    @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")

                    </a>

            <div class="rec-alert rec-alert-success">@successMessage</div>

            <div class="rec-filter-bottom">

                    <input @bind="searchText" @bind:event="oninput" placeholder="Código, nombre, serial, usuario, categoría, observación..." />
                </label>

                <label class="rec-check">
                    <input type="checkbox" @bind="onlyPending" />
                    Mostrar solo pendientes de decisión
                </label>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="rec-kpi-grid">
            <article>
                <span>Total filtrado</span>
                <strong>@FilteredItems.Count()</strong>
                <small>Registros visibles</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>No listadas</span>
                <strong>@FilteredItems.Count(x => x.ReportType == "ExtraNotListed")</strong>
                <small>Posible creación</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Pendiente creación</span>
                <strong>@FilteredItems.Count(x => IsPendingCreation(x))</strong>
                <small>Aprobar o crear</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Pendiente conciliación</span>
                <strong>@FilteredItems.Count(x => x.ReconciliationStatus == "MatchedInSystem")</strong>
                <small>Revisar trazabilidad</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Aclaración</span>
                <strong>@FilteredItems.Count(x => x.RequiresUserClarification || x.ReconciliationStatus == "RequiresUserClarification")</strong>
                <small>Contactar usuario</small>
            </article>

            <article>
                <span>Completos</span>
                <strong>@FilteredItems.Count(x => x.ReconciliationStatus == "Reconciled")</strong>
                <small>Conciliados</small>
            </article>
        </section>

        <section class="rec-card">
            <div class="rec-section-title">
                <div>
                    <h2>Registros para conciliación</h2>
                    <p>Vista administrativa de decisión. Aquí se revisan diferencias, se solicitan aclaraciones, se aprueba creación, se concilia o se rechaza.</p>
                </div>

                @if (board is not null)
                {
                    <div class="rec-count-context">
                        <strong>@board.CountNumber</strong>
                        <span>@board.BranchCode - @board.BranchName</span>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            @if (isLoading)
            {
                <div class="rec-empty">Cargando información de conciliación...</div>
            }
            else if (!physicalCounts.Any())
            {
                <div class="rec-empty">No existen tomas físicas creadas.</div>
            }
            else if (board is null)
            {
                <div class="rec-empty">Seleccione una toma física para iniciar la conciliación.</div>
            }
            else if (!FilteredItems.Any())
            {
                <div class="rec-empty">No hay registros que coincidan con los filtros seleccionados.</div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="rec-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="rec-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th class="rec-col-type">Tipo</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-code">Código / nombre</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-user">Usuario</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-class">Clasificación</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-location">Ubicación / responsable</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-status">Estado reportado</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-reconciliation">Conciliación</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-minimum">Datos mínimos</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-date">Fecha</th>
                                <th class="rec-col-actions">Acciones</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>

                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in FilteredItems)
                            {
                                <tr class="rec-data-row">
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="@GetReportTypeClass(item)">
                                            @GetReportTypeLabel(item)
                                        </span>
                                        <small>@Display(item.ReportType)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <strong>@Display(item.ToolInternalCode ?? item.ReportedCode ?? item.MatchedToolInternalCode)</strong>
                                        <span>@Display(item.ToolName ?? item.ReportedName ?? item.MatchedToolName)</span>

                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SerialNumber))
                                        {
                                            <small>Serial: @item.SerialNumber</small>
                                        }

                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Brand) || !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Model))
                                        {
                                            <small>@Display(item.Brand) @Display(item.Model)</small>
                                        }

                                        @if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue)
                                        {
                                            <small class="rec-created">Creado en inventario</small>
                                        }
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <strong>@Display(item.ParticipantName ?? item.ResponsibleName)</strong>
                                        <small>@Display(item.ParticipantUserName)</small>
                                        <small>Reportó: @Display(item.ReportedBy)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span>Tipo: @Display(item.AssetTypeName)</span>
                                        <small>Categoría: @Display(item.CategoryName)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span>Sede: @Display(item.BranchCode ?? board.BranchCode)</span>
                                        <small>Ubicación: @Display(item.FoundLocation)</small>
                                        <small>Responsable: @Display(item.ResponsibleName)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span>Físico: @Display(item.PhysicalStatus)</span>
                                        <small>Operativo: @Display(item.OperationalStatus)</small>
                                        <small>@Display(item.Observation)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <span class="@GetReconciliationStatusClass(item)">
                                            @GetReconciliationLabel(item)
                                        </span>
                                        <small>@Display(item.ReconciliationObservation)</small>
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        @if (item.MinimumDataCompleted)
                                        {
                                            <span class="rec-pill-ok">Completos</span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="rec-pill-danger">Sin mínimos</span>
                                            <small>@Display(item.MissingRequiredData)</small>
                                        }
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        @FormatDate(item.ReportedAt)
                                    </td>

                                    <td>
                                        <div class="rec-actions">
                                            @if (CanRequestClarification(item))
                                            {
                                                <button type="button" class="rec-action warn" @onclick="() => RequestClarificationAsync(item.Id)">
                                                    Aclarar
                                                </button>
                                            }

                                            @if (CanResolveClarification(item))
                                            {
                                                <button type="button" class="rec-action neutral" @onclick="() => ResolveClarificationAsync(item.Id)">
                                                    Aclarado
                                                </button>
                                            }

                                            @if (CanApproveCreation(item))
                                            {
                                                <button type="button" class="rec-action ok" @onclick="() => ApproveCreationAsync(item.Id)">
                                                    Aprobar creación
                                                </button>

                                            {
                                                <button type="button" class="rec-action ok-fill" @onclick="() => CreateInventoryAssetAsync(item.Id)">
                                                    Crear activo
                                                </button>
                                            }

                                            {
                                                <button type="button" class="rec-action neutral" @onclick="() => ReconcileAsync(item.Id)">
                                                    Conciliar
                                                </button>
                                            }

                                            @if (CanReject(item))
                                            {
                                                <button type="button" class="rec-action danger" @onclick="() => RejectAsync(item.Id)">
                                                    Rechazar
                                                </button>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>

        </section>
    </div>
</PermissionGuard>

@code {
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;

    private List<PhysicalCountListItem> physicalCounts = new();
    private ReportedItemsBoard? board;

    private string? selectedCountIdText;
    private string? filterBranch;
    private string? filterParticipant;
    private string? filterReportType;
    private string? filterReconciliationStatus;
    private string? filterMinimumData;
    private string? filterFromDateText;
    private string? filterToDateText;
    private string? searchText;
    private bool onlyPending = true;

    private Guid? SelectedCountId =>
        Guid.TryParse(selectedCountIdText, out var id)
            ? id
            : null;

    private IEnumerable<ReportedItem> AllItems =>
        board?.Items ?? Enumerable.Empty<ReportedItem>();

    private IEnumerable<string> BranchOptions =>
        AllItems
            .Select(x => (x.BranchCode ?? board?.BranchCode) ?? string.Empty)
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .OrderBy(x => x);

    private IEnumerable<string> ParticipantOptions =>
        AllItems
            .Select(x => (x.ParticipantName ?? x.ResponsibleName) ?? string.Empty)
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .OrderBy(x => x);

    private IEnumerable<ReportedItem> FilteredItems =>
        AllItems
            .Where(MatchesBranch)
            .Where(MatchesParticipant)
            .Where(MatchesReportType)
            .Where(MatchesReconciliationStatus)
            .Where(MatchesMinimumData)
            .Where(MatchesDateRange)
            .Where(MatchesPending)
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .OrderBy(x => GetPriority(x))
            .ThenByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();

            physicalCounts = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<PhysicalCountListItem>>("api/physical-counts") ?? new();

            physicalCounts = physicalCounts
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.StartedAt ?? x.CreatedAt)
                .ThenByDescending(x => x.CountNumber)
                .ToList();

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedCountIdText) && physicalCounts.Any())
            {
                selectedCountIdText = physicalCounts.First().Id.ToString();
            }

            await LoadBoardAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error cargando conciliación: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task OnSelectedCountChangedAsync()
    {
        board = null;
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;
        await LoadBoardAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadBoardAsync()
    {
        if (!SelectedCountId.HasValue)
        {
            board = null;
            return;
        }

        var api = CreateApiClient();
        board = await api.GetFromJsonAsync<ReportedItemsBoard>($"api/physical-counts/{SelectedCountId.Value}/reported-items-board");
    }

    private HttpClient CreateApiClient()
    {
        return HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");
    }

    private void ClearFilters()
    {
        filterBranch = null;
        filterParticipant = null;
        filterReportType = null;
        filterReconciliationStatus = null;
        filterMinimumData = null;
        filterFromDateText = null;
        filterToDateText = null;
        searchText = null;
        onlyPending = true;
    }

    private bool MatchesBranch(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filterBranch))
        {
            return true;
        }

        return (item.BranchCode ?? board?.BranchCode ?? string.Empty)
            .Equals(filterBranch, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private bool MatchesParticipant(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filterParticipant))
        {
            return true;
        }

        return (item.ParticipantName ?? item.ResponsibleName ?? string.Empty)
            .Equals(filterParticipant, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private bool MatchesReportType(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filterReportType))
        {
            return true;
        }

        return (item.ReportType ?? string.Empty)
            .Equals(filterReportType, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private bool MatchesReconciliationStatus(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filterReconciliationStatus))
        {
            return true;
        }

        return item.ReconciliationStatus
            .Equals(filterReconciliationStatus, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private bool MatchesMinimumData(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return filterMinimumData switch
        {
            "Complete" => item.MinimumDataCompleted,
            "Missing" => !item.MinimumDataCompleted,
            _ => true
        };
    }

    private bool MatchesDateRange(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (!item.ReportedAt.HasValue)
        {
            return true;
        }

        var date = item.ReportedAt.Value.Date;

        if (DateTime.TryParse(filterFromDateText, out var from) && date < from.Date)
        {
            return false;
        }

        if (DateTime.TryParse(filterToDateText, out var to) && date > to.Date)
        {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    private bool MatchesPending(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (!onlyPending)
        {
            return true;
        }

        return item.ReconciliationStatus != "Reconciled" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Rejected";
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var text = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(item.ToolInternalCode, text) ||
               Contains(item.ToolName, text) ||
               Contains(item.ReportedCode, text) ||
               Contains(item.ReportedName, text) ||
               Contains(item.SerialNumber, text) ||
               Contains(item.Brand, text) ||
               Contains(item.Model, text) ||
               Contains(item.ParticipantName, text) ||
               Contains(item.ParticipantUserName, text) ||
               Contains(item.ResponsibleName, text) ||
               Contains(item.AssetTypeName, text) ||
               Contains(item.CategoryName, text) ||
               Contains(item.FoundLocation, text) ||
               Contains(item.Observation, text) ||
               Contains(item.ReconciliationObservation, text);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? value, string text)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) &&
               value.Contains(text, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static int GetPriority(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || item.ReconciliationStatus == "RequiresUserClarification")
        {
            return 1;
        }

        if (item.ReconciliationStatus == "MatchedInSystem")
        {
            return 2;
        }

        if (item.ReconciliationStatus == "ApprovedForCreation")
        {
            return 3;
        }

        if (item.ReportType == "ExtraNotListed")
        {
            return 4;
        }

        if (!item.MinimumDataCompleted)
        {
            return 5;
        }

        if (item.ReconciliationStatus == "PendingReview" || item.ReconciliationStatus == "NotFoundInSystem")
        {
            return 6;
        }

        return 20;
    }

    private bool IsPendingCreation(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReportType == "ExtraNotListed" &&
               !item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Rejected" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Reconciled";
    }

    private static string Display(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "—";
    }

    private static string GetReportTypeLabel(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReportType switch
        {
            "Found" => "Encontrada",
            "NotFound" => "No encontrada",
            "ExtraNotListed" => "No listada",
            "Damaged" => "Dańada",
            "ReturnedOrDelivered" => "Devuelta",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ReportTypeLabel) ? Display(item.ReportType) : item.ReportTypeLabel
        };
    }

    private static string GetReportTypeClass(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReportType switch
        {
            "Found" => "rec-pill-ok",
            "NotFound" => "rec-pill-danger",
            "ExtraNotListed" => "rec-pill-purple",
            "Damaged" => "rec-pill-danger",
            "ReturnedOrDelivered" => "rec-pill-info",
            _ => "rec-pill-neutral"
        };
    }

    private static string GetReconciliationLabel(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue)
        {
            return "Creado en inventario";
        }

        if (item.Rejected || item.ReconciliationStatus == "Rejected")
        {
            return "Rechazado";
        }

        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || item.ReconciliationStatus == "RequiresUserClarification")
        {
            return "Requiere aclaración";
        }

        return item.ReconciliationStatus switch
        {
            "Reconciled" => "Conciliado / completo",
            "ApprovedForCreation" => "Aprobado para creación",
            "MatchedInSystem" => "Pendiente conciliación",
            "NotFoundInSystem" => "Pendiente creación",
            "PendingReview" => "Pendiente revisión",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ReconciliationStatusLabel) ? Display(item.ReconciliationStatus) : item.ReconciliationStatusLabel
        };
    }

    private static string GetReconciliationStatusClass(ReportedItem item)
    {
        if (item.Rejected || item.ReconciliationStatus == "Rejected")
        {
            return "rec-pill-danger";
        }

        if (item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue || item.ReconciliationStatus == "Reconciled")
        {
            return "rec-pill-ok";
        }

        if (item.RequiresUserClarification || item.ReconciliationStatus == "RequiresUserClarification")
        {
            return "rec-pill-warning";
        }

        return item.ReconciliationStatus switch
        {
            "ApprovedForCreation" => "rec-pill-info",
            "MatchedInSystem" => "rec-pill-warning",
            "NotFoundInSystem" => "rec-pill-danger-soft",
            "PendingReview" => "rec-pill-neutral",
            _ => "rec-pill-neutral"
        };
    }

    private static bool CanRequestClarification(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReconciliationStatus != "Rejected" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Reconciled" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "RequiresUserClarification";
    }

    private static bool CanResolveClarification(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.RequiresUserClarification ||
               item.ReconciliationStatus == "RequiresUserClarification";
    }

    private static bool CanApproveCreation(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReportType == "ExtraNotListed" &&
               item.MinimumDataCompleted &&
               !item.ApprovedForCreation &&
               !item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "ApprovedForCreation" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Rejected" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Reconciled";
    }

    private static bool CanCreateInventoryAsset(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReportType == "ExtraNotListed" &&
               item.MinimumDataCompleted &&
               !item.CreatedToolAssetId.HasValue &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus == "ApprovedForCreation";
    }

    private static bool CanReconcile(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReconciliationStatus != "Reconciled" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Rejected";
    }

    private static bool CanReject(ReportedItem item)
    {
        return item.ReconciliationStatus != "Rejected" &&
               item.ReconciliationStatus != "Reconciled";
    }

    private async Task RequestClarificationAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchReportedItemAsync(
            id,
            "request-clarification",
            "Se requiere contactar al usuario para ampliar información del registro reportado.",
            "Registro marcado para aclaración.");
    }

    private async Task ResolveClarificationAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchReportedItemAsync(
            id,
            "resolve-clarification",
            "Aclaración recibida del usuario. Registro disponible nuevamente para revisión.",
            "Registro marcado como aclarado.");
    }

    private async Task ApproveCreationAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchReportedItemAsync(
            id,
            "approve-creation",
            "Registro aprobado para creación en Inventario de AF.",
            "Registro aprobado para creación.");
    }

    private async Task ReconcileAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchReportedItemAsync(
            id,
            "reconcile",
            "Registro conciliado manualmente desde administración.",
            "Registro conciliado correctamente.");
    }

    private async Task RejectAsync(Guid id)
    {
        await PatchReportedItemAsync(
            id,
            "reject",
            "Reporte rechazado desde conciliación.",
            "Registro rechazado.");
    }

    private async Task PatchReportedItemAsync(Guid id, string action, string observation, string success)
    {
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();

            var response = await api.PatchAsJsonAsync(
                $"api/physical-counts/reported-items/{id}/{action}",
                new
                {
                    ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                    Observation = observation
                });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo ejecutar la acción. {(int)response.StatusCode} {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = success;
            await LoadBoardAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error ejecutando acción: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private async Task CreateInventoryAssetAsync(Guid id)
    {
        errorMessage = null;
        successMessage = null;

        try
        {
            var api = CreateApiClient();

            var response = await api.PostAsJsonAsync(
                $"api/physical-counts/reported-items/{id}/create-tool-asset",
                new
                {
                    ActionBy = AuthSession.UserName ?? "admin",
                    CreateMissingCatalogs = true,
                    Observation = "Activo creado en Inventario de AF desde conciliación de toma física."
                });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo crear el activo en Inventario de AF. {(int)response.StatusCode} {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "Activo creado correctamente en Inventario de AF.";
            await LoadBoardAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"Error creando activo: {ex.Message}";
        }
    }

    private sealed class PhysicalCountListItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string? CountNumber { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? Status { get; set; }
        public string? StatusLabel { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CreatedAt { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItemsBoard
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string? CountNumber { get; set; }
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? Status { get; set; }
        public string? StatusLabel { get; set; }
        public List<ReportedItem> Items { get; set; } = new();
        public ReportedItemsSummary Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItemsSummary
    {
        public int Total { get; set; }
        public int Found { get; set; }
        public int NotFound { get; set; }
        public int ReturnedOrDelivered { get; set; }
        public int Damaged { get; set; }
        public int DifferentLocation { get; set; }
        public int DifferentResponsible { get; set; }
        public int ExtraNotListed { get; set; }
        public int PendingReview { get; set; }
        public int RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public int ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public int Reconciled { get; set; }
        public int Rejected { get; set; }
        public int MissingMinimumData { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ReportedItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid PhysicalCountId { get; set; }
        public Guid? PhysicalCountParticipantId { get; set; }

        public string? ParticipantName { get; set; }
        public string? ParticipantUserName { get; set; }

        public string? ReportType { get; set; }
        public string? ReportTypeLabel { get; set; }

        public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }

        public Guid? MatchedToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? MatchedToolName { get; set; }

        public Guid? CreatedToolAssetId { get; set; }

        public string? ReportedCode { get; set; }
        public string? ReportedName { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }

        public string? AssetTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? CategoryName { get; set; }

        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? FoundLocation { get; set; }

        public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }

        public string? PhysicalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? OperationalStatus { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }

        public string? ReportedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReportedAt { get; set; }

        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ReconciliationStatusLabel { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciliationObservation { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresUserClarification { get; set; }
        public bool MinimumDataCompleted { get; set; }
        public string? MissingRequiredData { get; set; }

        public bool ApprovedForCreation { get; set; }
        public bool Rejected { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReconciledAt { get; set; }
        public string? ReconciledBy { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/settings/branches"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Sedes - Configuración</PageTitle>

<section class="settings-entity-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="settings-entity-pill">ORGANIZACIÓN</span>
        <h2>Sedes</h2>
        <p>Administra las sedes operativas donde se ubican herramientas, activos, talleres y almacenes.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-entity-side">
        <div class="settings-entity-status">
            <span>Sedes</span>
            <strong>@branches.Count registradas</strong>
        </div>

        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light settings-entity-back" href="/settings">
            Volver a Configuración
        </a>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="settings-crud-layout">
    <div class="settings-crud-form">
        <h2>@(editingId is null ? "Crear sede" : "Editar sede")</h2>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <DataAnnotationsValidator />

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Código</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Code" placeholder="AGU, MED, BOG" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Nombre</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Name" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Ciudad</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.City" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Dirección</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Address" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Zona</label>
                <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="formModel.ZoneId">
                    <option value="">Seleccione zona</option>
                    @foreach (var zone in zones)
                    {
                        <option value="@zone.Id">@zone.Code - @zone.Name</option>
                    }
                </InputSelect>
            </div>

            <div class="form-check mb-2">
                <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsPilot" />
                <label class="form-check-label">Sede piloto</label>
            </div>

            <div class="form-check mb-3">
                <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsActive" />
                <label class="form-check-label">Activa</label>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
            {
                <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
            }

            <div class="settings-crud-actions">
                <button class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">Guardar</button>
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Limpiar</button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-crud-table">
        <div class="settings-table-header">
            <h2>Sedes registradas</h2>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync">Actualizar</button>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <p>Cargando sedes...</p>
        }
        else
        {
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Código</th>
                        <th>Nombre</th>
                        <th>Ciudad</th>
                        <th>Zona</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var branch in branches)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td><strong>@branch.Code</strong></td>
                            <td>
                                <div>@branch.Name</div>
                                <small class="text-muted">@branch.Address</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>@branch.City</td>
                            <td>@(branch.Zone is null ? "Sin zona" : $"{branch.Zone.Code} - {branch.Zone.Name}")</td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="badge @(branch.IsActive ? "bg-success" : "bg-secondary")">
                                    @(branch.IsActive ? "Activa" : "Inactiva")
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => Edit(branch)">Editar</button>
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(branch.Id)">Eliminar</button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        }
    </div>
</section>

<style>
    .settings-entity-banner {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #050008 0%, #280032 45%, #5c006b 100%);
        color: #ffffff;
        border-radius: 0.85rem;

        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;

        color: #ffffff;

        margin-bottom: 0.6rem;

        font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .settings-entity-side {
        min-width: 185px;

        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: stretch;
        gap: 0.65rem;
    }

    .settings-entity-status {
        display: grid;

        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        border-radius: 0.65rem;
        padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem;
        text-align: right;

        color: #ffffff;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
    }

    .settings-entity-back {
        height: 32px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);

        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    }

    .settings-entity-back:hover {
        color: #4b005c;
        background: #ffffff;
        border-color: #ffffff;

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<BranchDto> branches = new();
    private List<ZoneDto> zones = new();
    private BranchFormModel formModel = new();
    private Guid? editingId;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchDto>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
            zones = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ZoneDto>>("api/settings/zones") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar las sedes: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Code) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Name) ||
            formModel.ZoneId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Código, nombre y zona son obligatorios.");
            return;
        }

        var request = new
        {
            code = formModel.Code,
            name = formModel.Name,
            city = formModel.City,
            address = formModel.Address,
            zoneId = formModel.ZoneId.Value,
            isPilot = formModel.IsPilot,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response = editingId is null
                ? await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/branches", request)
                : await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/branches/{editingId}", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null ? "Sede creada correctamente." : "Sede actualizada correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando sede: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(BranchDto branch)
    {
        editingId = branch.Id;

        formModel = new BranchFormModel
        {
            Code = branch.Code,
            Name = branch.Name,
            City = branch.City,
            Address = branch.Address,
            ZoneId = branch.ZoneId,
            IsPilot = branch.IsPilot,
            IsActive = branch.IsActive
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/branches/{id}?changedBy=admin-web");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Sede eliminada correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando sede: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        formModel = new BranchFormModel();
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class BranchDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? City { get; set; }
        public string? Address { get; set; }
        public Guid ZoneId { get; set; }
        public ZoneDto? Zone { get; set; }
        public bool IsPilot { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ZoneDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class BranchFormModel
    {
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? City { get; set; }
        public string? Address { get; set; }
        public Guid? ZoneId { get; set; }
        public bool IsPilot { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

@page "/settings/causes"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components.Shared

@page "/settings/locations"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Ubicaciones - Configuración</PageTitle>

<section class="settings-entity-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="settings-entity-pill">ORGANIZACIÓN</span>
        <h2>Ubicaciones internas</h2>
        <p>Administra estantes, bahías, zonas internas, puestos técnicos y ubicaciones físicas dentro de sedes, almacenes o talleres.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-entity-side">
        <div class="settings-entity-status">
            <span>Ubicaciones</span>
            <strong>@locations.Count registradas</strong>
        </div>

        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light settings-entity-back" href="/settings">
            Volver a Configuración
        </a>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="settings-crud-layout">
    <div class="settings-crud-form">
        <h2>@(editingId is null ? "Crear ubicación" : "Editar ubicación")</h2>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <DataAnnotationsValidator />

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Código</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Code" placeholder="AGU-EST-A1, AGU-BAHIA-03" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Nombre</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Name" placeholder="Estante A1, Bahía 03, Zona eléctrica" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Sede</label>
                <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="formModel.BranchId">
                    <option value="">Seleccione sede</option>
                    @foreach (var branch in branches)
                    {
                        <option value="@branch.Id">@branch.Code - @branch.Name</option>
                    }
                </InputSelect>
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Descripción</label>
                <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Description" rows="3" placeholder="Ubicación interna dentro de un almacén, taller o zona operativa." />
            </div>

            <div class="form-check mb-3">
                <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsActive" />
                <label class="form-check-label">Activa</label>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
            {
                <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
            }

            <div class="settings-crud-actions">
                <button class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">Guardar</button>
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Limpiar</button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-crud-table">
        <div class="settings-table-header">
            <h2>Ubicaciones registradas</h2>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync">Actualizar</button>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <p>Cargando ubicaciones...</p>
        }
        else if (locations.Count == 0)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-info">No hay ubicaciones registradas.</div>
        }
        else
        {
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Código</th>
                        <th>Nombre</th>
                        <th>Sede</th>
                        <th>Descripción</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var location in locations)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td><strong>@location.Code</strong></td>
                            <td>@location.Name</td>
                            <td>@(location.Branch is null ? "Sin sede" : $"{location.Branch.Code} - {location.Branch.Name}")</td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="settings-description-cell">
                                    @location.Description
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="badge @(location.IsActive ? "bg-success" : "bg-secondary")">
                                    @(location.IsActive ? "Activa" : "Inactiva")
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => Edit(location)">Editar</button>
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(location.Id)">Eliminar</button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        }
    </div>
</section>

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<LocationDto> locations = new();
    private List<BranchDto> branches = new();
    private LocationFormModel formModel = new();
    private Guid? editingId;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            locations = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<LocationDto>>("api/settings/warehouses") ?? new();
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchDto>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar las ubicaciones: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Code) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Name) ||
            formModel.BranchId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Código, nombre y sede son obligatorios.");
            return;
        }

        var request = new
        {
            code = formModel.Code,
            name = formModel.Name,
            description = formModel.Description,
            branchId = formModel.BranchId.Value,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response = editingId is null
                ? await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/warehouses", request)
                : await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/warehouses/{editingId}", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null ? "Ubicación creada correctamente." : "Ubicación actualizada correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando ubicación: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(LocationDto location)
    {
        editingId = location.Id;

        formModel = new LocationFormModel
        {
            Code = location.Code,
            Name = location.Name,
            Description = location.Description,
            BranchId = location.BranchId,
            IsActive = location.IsActive
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/warehouses/{id}?changedBy=admin-web");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Ubicación eliminada correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando ubicación: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        formModel = new LocationFormModel();
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class LocationDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public BranchDto? Branch { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class BranchDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class LocationFormModel
    {
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components.Shared

<PageTitle>Planes de mantenimiento - Configuración</PageTitle>

<SettingsCatalogCrud Title="Planes de mantenimiento"
                     Pill="MANTENIMIENTO"
                     Description="Administra planes, frecuencias, cronogramas y reglas para mantenimiento preventivo, correctivo, inspección y calibración."
                     CountLabel="Planes"
                     Endpoint="api/settings/maintenance-plans" />


============================================================
FILE: C:\Users\yquinto\OneDrive - Navitrans\Escritorio\Documentos\Herramientas\Herramientas&Activos\src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Components\Pages\Modules\SettingsMaintenanceTypes.razor

@page "/settings/maintenance-types"
