@page "/settings/responsibles"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Responsables - Configuración</PageTitle>

<section class="settings-entity-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="settings-entity-pill">RESPONSABLES</span>
        <h2>Responsables</h2>
        <p>Administra técnicos, herramienteros, jefes, coordinadores y responsables asociados a activos.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-entity-side">
        <div class="settings-entity-status">
            <span>Responsables</span>
            <strong>@items.Count registrados</strong>
        </div>

        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light settings-entity-back" href="/settings">
            Volver a Configuración
        </a>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="settings-crud-layout">
    <div class="settings-crud-form">
        <h2>@(editingId is null ? "Crear responsable" : "Editar responsable")</h2>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <DataAnnotationsValidator />

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Código empleado</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.EmployeeCode" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Documento</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.DocumentNumber" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Nombre completo</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.FullName" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Correo</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Email" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Cargo</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Position" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Área</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Area" />
            </div>

            <div class="form-check mb-3">
                <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsActive" />
                <label class="form-check-label">Activo</label>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
            {
                <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
            }

            <div class="settings-crud-actions">
                <button class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">Guardar</button>
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Limpiar</button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-crud-table">
        <div class="settings-table-header">
            <h2>Responsables registrados</h2>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync">Actualizar</button>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <p>Cargando responsables...</p>
        }
        else
        {
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Código</th>
                        <th>Nombre</th>
                        <th>Cargo</th>
                        <th>Área</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var item in items)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td><strong>@item.EmployeeCode</strong></td>
                            <td>
                                <div>@item.FullName</div>
                                <small class="text-muted">@item.Email</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>@item.Position</td>
                            <td>@item.Area</td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="badge @(item.IsActive ? "bg-success" : "bg-secondary")">
                                    @(item.IsActive ? "Activo" : "Inactivo")
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => Edit(item)">Editar</button>
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(item.Id)">Eliminar</button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        }
    </div>
</section>

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<ResponsibleDto> items = new();
    private ResponsibleFormModel formModel = new();
    private Guid? editingId;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            items = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ResponsibleDto>>("api/settings/responsibles") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar los responsables: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.FullName))
        {
            ShowError("El nombre completo es obligatorio.");
            return;
        }

        var request = new
        {
            employeeCode = formModel.EmployeeCode,
            documentNumber = formModel.DocumentNumber,
            fullName = formModel.FullName,
            email = formModel.Email,
            position = formModel.Position,
            area = formModel.Area,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response = editingId is null
                ? await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/responsibles", request)
                : await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/responsibles/{editingId}", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null ? "Responsable creado correctamente." : "Responsable actualizado correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando responsable: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(ResponsibleDto item)
    {
        editingId = item.Id;

        formModel = new ResponsibleFormModel
        {
            EmployeeCode = item.EmployeeCode,
            DocumentNumber = item.DocumentNumber,
            FullName = item.FullName,
            Email = item.Email,
            Position = item.Position,
            Area = item.Area,
            IsActive = item.IsActive
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/responsibles/{id}?changedBy=admin-web");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Responsable eliminado correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando responsable: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        formModel = new ResponsibleFormModel();
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class ResponsibleDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string? EmployeeCode { get; set; }
        public string? DocumentNumber { get; set; }
        public string FullName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Email { get; set; }
        public string? Position { get; set; }
        public string? Area { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ResponsibleFormModel
    {
        public string? EmployeeCode { get; set; }
        public string? DocumentNumber { get; set; }
        public string FullName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Email { get; set; }
        public string? Position { get; set; }
        public string? Area { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

@page "/settings/roles"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Services.Auth
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject WebAuthSessionService AuthSession

<PageTitle>Roles y permisos - Configuración</PageTitle>

<section class="roles-tech-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="roles-tech-pill">CONFIGURACIÓN</span>
        <h2>Roles y permisos</h2>
        <p>Administra perfiles del sistema y define qué módulos puede consultar, crear, editar, eliminar, aprobar o reportar cada rol.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="roles-tech-side">
        <div class="roles-tech-status">
            <span>Roles</span>
            <strong>@roles.Count registrados</strong>
        </div>

        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light roles-back-button" href="/settings">
            Volver a Configuración
        </a>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="settings-crud-layout roles-crud-layout">
    <div class="settings-crud-form roles-form-card">
        <h2>@(editingId is null ? "Crear rol" : "Editar rol")</h2>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <DataAnnotationsValidator />

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Código</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Code" placeholder="ADMIN, TECNICO, AUDITOR" disabled="@(!CanManageRoles)" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Nombre</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Name" placeholder="Administrador, Técnico, Auditor" disabled="@(!CanManageRoles)" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Descripción</label>
                <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Description" rows="3" disabled="@(!CanManageRoles)" />
            </div>

            <div class="form-check mb-3">
                <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsActive" disabled="@(!CanManageRoles)" />
                <label class="form-check-label">Activo</label>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
            {
                <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
            }

            <div class="settings-crud-actions">
                @if (CanManageRoles)
                {
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">Guardar</button>
                }
                else
                {
                    <span class="permission-action-denied">Solo consulta</span>
                }
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Limpiar</button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-crud-table roles-matrix-card">
        <div class="settings-table-header">
            <div>
                <h2>Matriz de permisos</h2>
                <p>Marca los permisos que tendrá el rol seleccionado.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="roles-profile-toolbar">
                <div class="profile-toolbar-left">
                    <span class="toolbar-label">Perfiles rápidos</span>
                    <small>Selecciona una plantilla y luego guarda el rol.</small>
                </div>

                <div class="profile-toolbar-actions">
                    <button class="profile-btn admin" type="button" @onclick="SelectAdminProfile">
                        Admin
                    </button>

                    <button class="profile-btn gerencial" type="button" @onclick="SelectGerencialProfile">
                        Gerencial
                    </button>

                    <button class="profile-btn herramientas" type="button" @onclick="SelectHerramienteroProfile">
                        Herramientero
                    </button>

                    <button class="profile-btn servicios" type="button" @onclick="SelectIngServiciosProfile">
                        Ing. Servicios
                    </button>

                    <button class="profile-btn coordinador" type="button" @onclick="SelectCoordinadorProfile">
                        Coord. Taller
                    </button>

                    <button class="profile-btn tecnico" type="button" @onclick="SelectTecnicoProfile">
                        Técnico
                    </button>

                    <button class="profile-btn clear" type="button" @onclick="ClearPermissions">
                        Quitar permisos
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="permissions-matrix">
            @foreach (var group in permissionGroups)
            {
                <article class="permission-group">
                    <div class="permission-group-header">
                        <span>@group.Area</span>
                        <strong>@group.Title</strong>
                    </div>

                    <div class="permission-list">
                        @foreach (var permission in group.Permissions)
                        {
                            <label class="permission-item">
                                <input type="checkbox"
                                       checked="@IsPermissionSelected(permission.Code)"
                                       @onchange="args => TogglePermission(permission.Code, args.Value)" />

                                <span>
                                    <strong>@permission.Name</strong>
                                    <small>@permission.Code</small>
                                </span>
                            </label>
                        }
                    </div>
                </article>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="roles-table-card">
    <div class="settings-table-header">
        <h2>Roles registrados</h2>
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync">Actualizar</button>
    </div>

    @if (isLoading)
    {
        <p>Cargando roles...</p>
    }
    else if (roles.Count == 0)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-info">No hay roles registrados.</div>
    }
    else
    {
        <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Código</th>
                    <th>Nombre</th>
                    <th>Permisos</th>
                    <th>Estado</th>
                    <th class="text-end">Acciones</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                @foreach (var role in roles)
                {
                    <tr>
                        <td><strong>@role.Code</strong></td>
                        <td>
                            <div>@role.Name</div>
                            <small class="text-muted">@role.Description</small>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            <span class="settings-permissions-text">
                                @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(role.Permissions) ? "Sin permisos" : role.Permissions)
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            <span class="badge @(role.IsActive ? "bg-success" : "bg-secondary")">
                                @(role.IsActive ? "Activo" : "Inactivo")
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td class="text-end">
                            @if (CanManageRoles)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => Edit(role)">Editar</button>
                                    }
                            @if (CanManageRoles)
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(role.Id)">Eliminar</button>
                                    }
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                }
            </tbody>
        </table>
    }
</section>

@code {
    private bool CanManageRoles => AuthSession.HasPermission("Security.Roles");

    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<RoleDto> roles = new();
    private RoleFormModel formModel = new();
    private Guid? editingId;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";
    private HashSet<string> selectedPermissions = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private readonly List<PermissionGroup> permissionGroups = new()
    {
        new PermissionGroup
        {
            Area = "Principal",
            Title = "Dashboard",
            Permissions = new()
            {
                new PermissionItem("Dashboard.View", "Ver dashboard")
            }
        },
        new PermissionGroup

            Area = "Activos fijos",

        },

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            roles = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<RoleDto>>("api/settings/roles") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar los roles: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        message = string.Empty;

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Code) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Name))
        {
            ShowError("Código y nombre son obligatorios.");
            return;
        }

        formModel.Permissions = string.Join(",", selectedPermissions.OrderBy(x => x));

        var request = new
        {
            code = formModel.Code,
            name = formModel.Name,
            description = formModel.Description,
            permissions = formModel.Permissions,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response;

            if (editingId is null)
            {
                response = await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/roles", request);
            }
            else
            {
                response = await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/roles/{editingId}", request);
            }

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                ShowError(error);
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null ? "Rol creado correctamente." : "Rol actualizado correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando rol: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(RoleDto role)
    {
        editingId = role.Id;

        formModel = new RoleFormModel
        {
            Code = role.Code,
            Name = role.Name,
            Description = role.Description,
            Permissions = role.Permissions,
            IsActive = role.IsActive
        };

        selectedPermissions = ParsePermissions(role.Permissions);
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/roles/{id}?changedBy=admin-web");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                ShowError(error);
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Rol eliminado correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando rol: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        formModel = new RoleFormModel();
        selectedPermissions = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private bool IsPermissionSelected(string code)
    {
        return selectedPermissions.Contains(code);
    }

    private void TogglePermission(string code, object? value)
    {
        var isChecked = value is bool boolValue && boolValue;

        if (isChecked)
        {
            selectedPermissions.Add(code);
        }
        else
        {
            selectedPermissions.Remove(code);
        }
    }

    private void ClearPermissions()
    {
        selectedPermissions.Clear();
    }

    private void SelectAdminPermissions()
    {
        SelectAdminProfile();
    }

    private void SelectReadOnlyPermissions()
    {
        SelectGerencialProfile();
    }

    private void SelectOperationalPermissions()
    {
        SelectHerramienteroProfile();
    }

    private void SelectAdminProfile()
    {
        selectedPermissions = permissionGroups
            .SelectMany(x => x.Permissions)
            .Select(x => x.Code)
            .ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private void SelectGerencialProfile()
    {
        SetPermissions(
            "Dashboard.View",

            "Tools.View",
            "AssetAvailability.View",
            "AssetAssignment.View",
            "AssetAssignment.History",

            "TechnicalLifeRecord.View",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.Export",

            "Documents.View",
            "Documents.Download",

            "Maintenance.View",
            "Maintenance.Close",

            "Purchases.View",
            "Purchases.Approve",
            "Purchases.Reject",

            "PhysicalCounts.View",
            "Reports.View"
        );
    }

    private void SelectHerramienteroProfile()
    {
        SetPermissions(
            "Dashboard.View",

            "Tools.View",
            "Tools.Create",
            "Tools.Edit",

            "AssetAvailability.View",
            "AssetAvailability.Edit",

            "AssetAssignment.View",
            "AssetAssignment.Assign",
            "AssetAssignment.Return",
            "AssetAssignment.History",

            "TechnicalLifeRecord.View",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.Edit",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.Export",

            "Documents.View",
            "Documents.Upload",
            "Documents.Download",

            "Maintenance.View",
            "Maintenance.Request",

            "Purchases.View",
            "Purchases.Request",

            "PhysicalCounts.View",
            "PhysicalCounts.Create",

            "Reports.View",

            "Mobile.Access",
            "Mobile.Tools.View",
            "Mobile.Tools.Review",

            "DeliveryAct.Generate",
            "FixedAssets.Disposal.Request"
        );
    }

    private void SelectIngServiciosProfile()
    {
        SetPermissions(
            "Dashboard.View",

            "Tools.View",
            "AssetAvailability.View",
            "AssetAssignment.View",
            "AssetAssignment.History",

            "TechnicalLifeRecord.View",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.Export",

            "Documents.View",
            "Documents.Download",

            "Maintenance.View",
            "Maintenance.Close",

            "Purchases.View",
            "Purchases.Approve",
            "Purchases.Reject",

            "PhysicalCounts.View",
            "Reports.View",

            "Mobile.Access",
            "Mobile.Tools.View",

            "FixedAssets.Disposal.Approve"
        );
    }

    private void SelectCoordinadorProfile()
    {
        SetPermissions(
            "Dashboard.View",

            "Tools.View",
            "Tools.Create",
            "Tools.Edit",

            "AssetAvailability.View",
            "AssetAvailability.Edit",

            "AssetAssignment.View",
            "AssetAssignment.Assign",
            "AssetAssignment.Return",
            "AssetAssignment.History",

            "TechnicalLifeRecord.View",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.Edit",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.Export",

            "Documents.View",
            "Documents.Upload",
            "Documents.Download",
            "Documents.Delete",

            "Maintenance.View",
            "Maintenance.Request",
            "Maintenance.Execute",
            "Maintenance.Close",

            "Purchases.View",
            "Purchases.Request",
            "Purchases.Approve",
            "Purchases.Reject",

            "PhysicalCounts.View",
            "PhysicalCounts.Create",
            "PhysicalCounts.Close",

            "Reports.View",

            "Mobile.Access",
            "Mobile.Tools.View",
            "Mobile.Tools.Review",

            "DeliveryAct.Generate",
            "FixedAssets.Disposal.Request",
            "FixedAssets.Disposal.Approve"
        );
    }

    private void SelectTecnicoProfile()
    {
        SetPermissions(
            "Tools.View",
            "AssetAssignment.History",
            "TechnicalLifeRecord.View",

            "Documents.View",
            "Documents.Upload",

            "Maintenance.View",
            "Maintenance.Request",

            "Mobile.Access",
            "Mobile.Tools.View",
            "Mobile.Tools.Review",
            "Mobile.PreOperational.Report",
            "Mobile.Damage.Report",
            "Mobile.Loans.Request"
        );
    }

    private void SetPermissions(params string[] permissions)
    {
        selectedPermissions = permissions
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static HashSet<string> ParsePermissions(string? value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            return new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        }

        if (value.Equals("ALL", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        }

        return value
            .Split(new[] { ',', ';', '|', '\n', '\r' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
            .ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class RoleDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Permissions { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class RoleFormModel
    {
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Permissions { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }

    private sealed class PermissionGroup
    {
        public string Area { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public List<PermissionItem> Permissions { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed record PermissionItem(string Code, string Name);
}

                     Endpoint="api/settings/statuses" />

@page "/settings/users"
@rendermode InteractiveServer

@using System.Net.Http.Json
@using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Services.Auth

@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject WebAuthSessionService AuthSession

<PageTitle>Usuarios - Configuración</PageTitle>

<section class="users-page">
    <section class="users-hero">
        <div>
            <span class="users-pill">CONFIGURACIÓN</span>
            <h2>Usuarios</h2>
            <p>Crea, edita, activa o bloquea usuarios del sistema, asigna rol, sede y contraseńa de acceso.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="users-hero-side">
            <div class="users-kpi">
                <span>Usuarios registrados</span>
                <strong>@users.Count</strong>
                <small>Total de usuarios</small>
            </div>

            <button class="btn btn-outline-light users-refresh" type="button" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
                @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")
            </button>
        </div>
    </section>

    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
    {
        <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
    }

    <section class="users-grid"><div class="users-left-stack">
        <div class="users-card users-create-card">
            <h3>@(editingId is null ? "Crear usuario" : "Editar usuario")</h3>

            <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
                <DataAnnotationsValidator />

                <label>
                    Documento / identificación <strong class="users-required-star">*</strong>
                    <InputText class="form-control"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.UserName"
                               placeholder="Ingrese número de documento"
                               disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Nombre completo <strong class="users-required-star">*</strong>
                    <InputText class="form-control"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.DisplayName"
                               placeholder="Ingrese nombre completo"
                               disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Correo
                    <InputText class="form-control"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.Email"
                               placeholder="usuario@empresa.com"
                               disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Cargo
                    <InputText class="form-control"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.Position"
                               placeholder="Ingrese cargo"
                               disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Área
                    <InputText class="form-control"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.Area"
                               placeholder="Ingrese área"
                               disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                </label>

                <label>
                    Rol <strong class="users-required-star">*</strong>
                    <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="formModel.AppRoleId" disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)">
                        <option value="">Seleccione rol</option>
                        @foreach (var role in roles)
                        {
                            <option value="@role.Id">@role.Name</option>
                        }
                    </InputSelect>
                </label>

                <label>
                    Sede
                    <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="formModel.BranchId" disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)">
                        <option value="">Todas / Sin sede</option>
                        @foreach (var branch in branches)
                        {
                            <option value="@branch.Id">@branch.Code - @branch.Name</option>
                        }
                    </InputSelect>
                </label>

                <label class="users-switch-row">
                    <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsActive" disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                    <span>Usuario activo en el sistema</span>
                </label>

                <div class="users-actions">
                    @if (CanManageUsers)
                    {
                        <button class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">
                            @(editingId is null ? "Guardar" : "Guardar cambios")
                        </button>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="permission-action-denied">Solo consulta</span>
                    }

                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Limpiar</button>
                </div>
            </EditForm>
        </div>

                    <section class="users-edit-panel users-password-panel-left">
                @if (editingId is null)
                {
                    <h3>Contraseńa de acceso</h3>

                    <div class="users-edit-box">
                        <p>Defina la contraseńa inicial del usuario que se va a crear.</p>

                        <div class="users-password-change-grid">
                            <label>
                                Contraseńa <strong class="users-required-star">*</strong>
                                <InputText class="form-control"
                                           type="password"
                                           @bind-Value="formModel.Password"
                                           placeholder="Ingrese contraseńa"
                                           disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                            </label>

                            <label>
                                Confirmar <strong class="users-required-star">*</strong>
                                <InputText class="form-control"
                                           type="password"
                                           @bind-Value="formModel.ConfirmPassword"
                                           placeholder="Confirme la contraseńa"
                                           disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
                else if (selectedUser is null)
                {
                    <h3>Cambiar contraseńa de acceso</h3>

                    <div class="users-empty">
                        Seleccione un usuario con <strong>Cambiar contraseńa</strong>.
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <h3>Cambiar contraseńa de acceso</h3>

                    <div class="users-selected-card compact">
                        <div>
                            <span>Usuario seleccionado</span>
                            <strong>@selectedUser.DisplayName</strong>
                            <small>Documento: @selectedUser.UserName</small>
                        </div>

                        <span class="users-status @(selectedUser.IsActive ? "active" : "inactive")">
                            @(selectedUser.IsActive ? "Activo" : "Inactivo")
                        </span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="users-edit-box">
                        <p>Este cambio solo modifica la contraseńa. Los datos del usuario se actualizan con <strong>Guardar cambios</strong>.</p>

                        <div class="users-password-change-grid">
                            <label>
                                Nueva contraseńa
                                <input class="form-control"
                                       type="password"
                                       @bind="passwordModel.NewPassword"
                                       placeholder="Ingrese nueva contraseńa"
                                       disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                            </label>

                            <label>
                                Confirmar
                                <input class="form-control"
                                       type="password"
                                       @bind="passwordModel.ConfirmPassword"
                                       placeholder="Confirme la nueva contraseńa"
                                       disabled="@(!CanManageUsers)" />
                            </label>
                        </div>

                        <div class="users-edit-actions password-actions">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Cancelar</button>

                            @if (CanManageUsers)
                            {
                                <button class="btn btn-outline-purple" type="button" @onclick="ChangePasswordAsync">
                                    Cambiar contraseńa
                                </button>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </section>
        </div>

        <div class="users-card users-table-card">
            <div class="users-table-head">
                <h3>Usuarios registrados</h3>

                <input class="form-control users-search"
                       placeholder="Buscar por documento, nombre, correo o rol..."
                       @bind="searchText"
                       @bind:event="oninput" />
            </div>

            @if (isLoading)
            {
                <div class="users-empty">Cargando usuarios...</div>
            }
            else if (!FilteredUsers.Any())
            {
                <div class="users-empty">No hay usuarios registrados.</div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="users-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="table table-hover align-middle users-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Documento</th>
                                <th>Nombre</th>
                                <th>Correo</th>
                                <th>Rol</th>
                                <th>Sede</th>
                                <th>Estado</th>
                                <th class="text-end">Acciones</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var user in FilteredUsers)
                            {
                                <tr class="@(selectedUser?.Id == user.Id ? "users-selected-row" : null)">
                                    <td><strong>@user.UserName</strong></td>
                                    <td>@user.DisplayName</td>
                                    <td>@Display(user.Email)</td>
                                    <td>@Display(user.Role?.Name)</td>
                                    <td>@(user.Branch is null ? "Todas" : $"{user.Branch.Code} - {user.Branch.Name}")</td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="users-status @(user.IsActive ? "active" : "inactive")">
                                            @(user.IsActive ? "Activo" : "Inactivo")
                                        </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="text-end">
                                        @if (CanManageUsers)
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => Edit(user)">Editar</button>
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-purple" @onclick="() => SelectPasswordUser(user)">Cambiar contraseńa</button>
                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(user.Id)">Eliminar</button>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </section>
</section>

@code {
    private bool CanManageUsers => AuthSession.HasPermission("Security.Users");

    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<UserDto> users = new();
    private List<RoleDto> roles = new();
    private List<BranchDto> branches = new();

    private UserFormModel formModel = new();
    private PasswordFormModel passwordModel = new();

    private Guid? editingId;
    private UserDto? selectedUser;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? searchText;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    private IEnumerable<UserDto> FilteredUsers =>
        users.Where(MatchesSearch).OrderBy(x => x.UserName);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            users = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<UserDto>>("api/settings/users") ?? new();
            roles = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<RoleDto>>("api/settings/roles") ?? new();
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchDto>>("api/organization/branches") ?? new();

            if (selectedUser is not null)
            {
                selectedUser = users.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == selectedUser.Id);
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar los datos: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(UserDto user)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var term = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(user.UserName, term) ||
               Contains(user.DisplayName, term) ||
               Contains(user.Email, term) ||
               Contains(user.Role?.Name, term) ||
               Contains(user.Branch?.Code, term) ||
               Contains(user.Branch?.Name, term);
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        message = string.Empty;

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.UserName) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.DisplayName) ||
            formModel.AppRoleId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Documento/identificación, nombre y rol son obligatorios.");
            return;
        }

        var wantsToChangePassword =
            !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Password) ||
            !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.ConfirmPassword);

        if (editingId is null || wantsToChangePassword)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Password) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.ConfirmPassword))
            {
                ShowError(editingId is null
                    ? "Debe ingresar y confirmar la contraseńa de acceso."
                    : "Para cambiar la contraseńa debe ingresar y confirmar la nueva contraseńa.");

                return;
            }

            if (!string.Equals(formModel.Password, formModel.ConfirmPassword, StringComparison.Ordinal))
            {
                ShowError("Las contraseńas no coinciden.");
                return;
            }

            if (formModel.Password.Trim().Length < 4)
            {
                ShowError("La contraseńa debe tener mínimo 4 caracteres.");
                return;
            }
        }

        var request = new
        {
            userName = formModel.UserName,
            displayName = formModel.DisplayName,
            email = formModel.Email,
            position = formModel.Position,
            area = formModel.Area,
            password = editingId is null ? formModel.Password : null,
            appRoleId = formModel.AppRoleId.Value,
            branchId = formModel.BranchId,
            responsiblePersonId = (Guid?)null,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = AuthSession.AuditUser
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response = editingId is null
                ? await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/users", request)
                : await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/users/{editingId}", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            var passwordChanged = false;

            if (editingId is not null && wantsToChangePassword)
            {
                var passwordResponse = await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/users/{editingId}/password", new
                {
                    password = formModel.Password,
                    changedBy = AuthSession.AuditUser
                });

                if (!passwordResponse.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                {
                    ShowError(await passwordResponse.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                    return;
                }

                passwordChanged = true;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null
                ? "Usuario creado correctamente."
                : passwordChanged
                    ? "Usuario y contraseńa actualizados correctamente."
                    : "Usuario actualizado correctamente. La contraseńa no fue modificada.");

            formModel.Password = null;
            formModel.ConfirmPassword = null;

            await LoadAsync();

            if (editingId is null)
            {
                ClearForm();
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando usuario: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private async Task ChangePasswordAsync()
    {
        if (selectedUser is null)
        {
            ShowError("Debe seleccionar un usuario.");
            return;
        }

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(passwordModel.NewPassword) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(passwordModel.ConfirmPassword))
        {
            ShowError("Debe ingresar y confirmar la nueva contraseńa.");
            return;
        }

        if (!string.Equals(passwordModel.NewPassword, passwordModel.ConfirmPassword, StringComparison.Ordinal))
        {
            ShowError("Las contraseńas no coinciden.");
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            var response = await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/users/{selectedUser.Id}/password", new
            {
                password = passwordModel.NewPassword,
                changedBy = AuthSession.AuditUser
            });

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            passwordModel = new();
            ShowSuccess("Contraseńa actualizada correctamente.");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error cambiando contraseńa: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(UserDto user)
    {
        editingId = user.Id;
        selectedUser = user;
        passwordModel = new();

        formModel = new UserFormModel
        {
            UserName = user.UserName,
            DisplayName = user.DisplayName,
            Email = user.Email,
            Position = user.Position,
            Area = user.Area,
            AppRoleId = user.Role?.Id,
            BranchId = user.Branch?.Id,
            IsActive = user.IsActive
        };
    }

    private void SelectPasswordUser(UserDto user)
    {
        Edit(user);
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/users/{id}?changedBy={AuthSession.AuditUser}");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Usuario eliminado correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando usuario: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        selectedUser = null;
        formModel = new UserFormModel();
        passwordModel = new PasswordFormModel();
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? value, string term)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) &&
               value.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static string Display(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;
    }

    private sealed class UserDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string UserName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string DisplayName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Email { get; set; }
        public string? Position { get; set; }
        public string? Area { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
        public RoleDto? Role { get; set; }
        public BranchDto? Branch { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class RoleDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class BranchDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class UserFormModel
    {
        public string UserName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string DisplayName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Email { get; set; }
        public string? Position { get; set; }
        public string? Area { get; set; }
        public string? Password { get; set; }
        public string? ConfirmPassword { get; set; }
        public Guid? AppRoleId { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }

    private sealed class PasswordFormModel
    {
        public string? NewPassword { get; set; }
        public string? ConfirmPassword { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/settings/warehouses"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Almacenes / Talleres - Configuración</PageTitle>

<section class="settings-entity-banner">
    <div>
        <span class="settings-entity-pill">ORGANIZACIÓN</span>
        <h2>Almacenes / Talleres</h2>
        <p>Administra almacenes, talleres, bodegas, patios, oficinas y áreas técnicas asociadas a cada sede.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-entity-side">
        <div class="settings-entity-status">
            <span>Ubicaciones</span>
            <strong>@warehouses.Count registradas</strong>
        </div>

        <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light settings-entity-back" href="/settings">
            Volver a Configuración
        </a>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="settings-crud-layout">
    <div class="settings-crud-form">
        <h2>@(editingId is null ? "Crear almacén / taller" : "Editar almacén / taller")</h2>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <DataAnnotationsValidator />

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Código</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Code" placeholder="AGU-TALLER, AGU-BOD-HERR" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Nombre</label>
                <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Name" placeholder="Taller, Bodega de herramientas" />
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Sede</label>
                <InputSelect class="form-select" @bind-Value="formModel.BranchId">
                    <option value="">Seleccione sede</option>
                    @foreach (var branch in branches)
                    {
                        <option value="@branch.Id">@branch.Code - @branch.Name</option>
                    }
                </InputSelect>
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Descripción</label>
                <InputTextArea class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Description" rows="3" placeholder="Zona de mantenimiento, almacén principal, patio operativo..." />
            </div>

            <div class="form-check mb-3">
                <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsActive" />
                <label class="form-check-label">Activo</label>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
            {
                <div class="@messageClass">@message</div>
            }

            <div class="settings-crud-actions">
                <button class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">Guardar</button>
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" @onclick="ClearForm">Limpiar</button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-crud-table">
        <div class="settings-table-header">
            <h2>Almacenes / Talleres registrados</h2>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync">Actualizar</button>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <p>Cargando almacenes y talleres...</p>
        }
        else if (warehouses.Count == 0)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-info">No hay almacenes o talleres registrados.</div>
        }
        else
        {
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Código</th>
                        <th>Nombre</th>
                        <th>Sede</th>
                        <th>Descripción</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var warehouse in warehouses)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td><strong>@warehouse.Code</strong></td>
                            <td>@warehouse.Name</td>
                            <td>@(warehouse.Branch is null ? "Sin sede" : $"{warehouse.Branch.Code} - {warehouse.Branch.Name}")</td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="settings-description-cell">
                                    @warehouse.Description
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="badge @(warehouse.IsActive ? "bg-success" : "bg-secondary")">
                                    @(warehouse.IsActive ? "Activo" : "Inactivo")
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" @onclick="() => Edit(warehouse)">Editar</button>
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(warehouse.Id)">Eliminar</button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        }
    </div>
</section>

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<WarehouseDto> warehouses = new();
    private List<BranchDto> branches = new();
    private WarehouseFormModel formModel = new();
    private Guid? editingId;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            warehouses = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<WarehouseDto>>("api/settings/warehouses") ?? new();
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchDto>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar los almacenes o talleres: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Code) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Name) ||
            formModel.BranchId is null)
        {
            ShowError("Código, nombre y sede son obligatorios.");
            return;
        }

        var request = new
        {
            code = formModel.Code,
            name = formModel.Name,
            description = formModel.Description,
            branchId = formModel.BranchId.Value,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response = editingId is null
                ? await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/warehouses", request)
                : await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/warehouses/{editingId}", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null ? "Almacén / taller creado correctamente." : "Almacén / taller actualizado correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando almacén / taller: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(WarehouseDto warehouse)
    {
        editingId = warehouse.Id;

        formModel = new WarehouseFormModel
        {
            Code = warehouse.Code,
            Name = warehouse.Name,
            Description = warehouse.Description,
            BranchId = warehouse.BranchId,
            IsActive = warehouse.IsActive
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/warehouses/{id}?changedBy=admin-web");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Almacén / taller eliminado correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando almacén / taller: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        formModel = new WarehouseFormModel();
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class WarehouseDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public Guid BranchId { get; set; }
        public BranchDto? Branch { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class BranchDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class WarehouseFormModel
    {
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

                        <th>Descripción</th>

                                    @zone.Description

                            <td>
                                <span class="badge @(zone.IsActive ? "bg-success" : "bg-secondary")">

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<ZoneDto> zones = new();
    private ZoneFormModel formModel = new();
    private Guid? editingId;
    private bool isLoading;
    private string message = string.Empty;
    private string messageClass = "alert alert-info";

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;
        message = string.Empty;

        try
        {
            zones = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ZoneDto>>("api/settings/zones") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"No se pudieron cargar las zonas: {ex.Message}");
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Code) ||
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Name))
        {
            ShowError("Código y nombre son obligatorios.");
            return;
        }

        var request = new
        {
            code = formModel.Code,
            name = formModel.Name,
            description = formModel.Description,
            isActive = formModel.IsActive,
            changedBy = "admin-web"
        };

        try
        {
            HttpResponseMessage response = editingId is null
                ? await Api.PostAsJsonAsync("api/settings/zones", request)
                : await Api.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/settings/zones/{editingId}", request);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess(editingId is null ? "Zona creada correctamente." : "Zona actualizada correctamente.");
            ClearForm();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error guardando zona: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void Edit(ZoneDto zone)
    {
        editingId = zone.Id;

        formModel = new ZoneFormModel
        {
            Code = zone.Code,
            Name = zone.Name,
            Description = zone.Description,
            IsActive = zone.IsActive
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(Guid id)
    {
        try
        {
            var response = await Api.DeleteAsync($"api/settings/zones/{id}?changedBy=admin-web");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                ShowError(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
                return;
            }

            ShowSuccess("Zona eliminada correctamente.");
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            ShowError($"Error eliminando zona: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private void ClearForm()
    {
        editingId = null;
        formModel = new ZoneFormModel();
    }

    private void ShowSuccess(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-success";
    }

    private void ShowError(string value)
    {
        message = value;
        messageClass = "alert alert-danger";
    }

    private sealed class ZoneDto
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ZoneFormModel
    {
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

@code {
    private HttpClient Api => HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

    private List<ToolItem> tools = new();
    private List<BranchItem> branches = new();

    private bool isLoading;
    private string search = string.Empty;
    private string selectedBranchCode = string.Empty;

    private IEnumerable<ToolItem> FilteredTools =>
        tools
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search) ||
                        x.InternalCode.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        x.Name.Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.SerialNumber ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        (x.FixedAssetCode ?? string.Empty).Contains(search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedBranchCode) || x.BranchCode == selectedBranchCode)
            .OrderBy(x => x.BranchCode)
            .ThenBy(x => x.InternalCode);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        isLoading = true;

        try
        {
            tools = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolItem>>("api/tools") ?? new();
            branches = await Api.GetFromJsonAsync<List<BranchItem>>("api/settings/branches") ?? new();
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "—" : value;
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "Disponible",
        "Assigned" => "Asignada",
        "Loaned" => "Prestada",
        "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
        "Damaged" => "Dańada",
        "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
        "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validación",
        "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
        "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente baja",
        "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
        _ => status
    };

    private static string GetStatusBadge(string status) => status switch
    {
        "Available" => "badge bg-success",
        "Assigned" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
        "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
        "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
        "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
        "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
        "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
        "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
        "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-secondary",
        _ => "badge bg-secondary"
    };

    private sealed class ToolItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }

        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }

        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }

        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }

        public string? LocationName { get; set; }

        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }

        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }

        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }

        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class BranchItem
    {
        public string Code { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

============================================================

namespace Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Services.Auth;

public sealed class NaviPermissionHttpMessageHandler : DelegatingHandler
{
    private readonly WebAuthSessionService _authSession;

    public NaviPermissionHttpMessageHandler(WebAuthSessionService authSession)
    {
        _authSession = authSession;
    }

    protected override Task<HttpResponseMessage> SendAsync(
        HttpRequestMessage request,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-User");
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-Role");
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-Role-Code");
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-Permissions");
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-BranchId");
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonId");
        request.Headers.Remove("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonName");

        var isAuthenticated = _authSession.IsAuthenticated;
        var roleCode = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_authSession.RoleCode)
            ? "ADMIN"
            : _authSession.RoleCode.Trim();

        request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-User", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_authSession.UserName) ? "admin" : _authSession.UserName);
        request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-Role", string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_authSession.RoleName) ? "Administrador NAVI" : _authSession.RoleName);
        request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-Role-Code", roleCode);

        var permissions = (_authSession.Permissions ?? new List<string>())
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToList();

        if (!permissions.Any() || roleCode.Equals("ADMIN", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            permissions = new List<string>
            {
                "ALL",
                "Dashboard.View",
                "Tools.View",
                "Tools.Create",
                "Tools.Edit",
                "Tools.Delete",
                "AssetAvailability.View",
                "AssetAvailability.Edit",
                "AssetAssignment.View",
                "AssetAssignment.Assign",
                "AssetAssignment.Return",
                "AssetAssignment.History",
                "TechnicalLifeRecord.View",
                "TechnicalLifeRecord.Edit",
                "TechnicalLifeRecord.Export",
                "Documents.View",
                "Documents.Upload",
                "Documents.Download",
                "Documents.Delete",
                "Maintenance.View",
                "Maintenance.Request",
                "Maintenance.Execute",
                "Maintenance.Close",
                "Purchases.View",
                "Purchases.Request",
                "Purchases.Approve",
                "Purchases.Reject",
                "PhysicalCounts.View",
                "PhysicalCounts.Create",
                "PhysicalCounts.Close",
                "Reports.View",
                "Settings.View",
                "Settings.Manage",
                "Security.Users",
                "Security.Roles",
                "Mobile.Access",
                "Mobile.Tools.View",
                "Mobile.Tools.Review",
                "Mobile.PreOperational.Report",
                "Mobile.Damage.Report",
                "Mobile.Loans.Request"
            };
        }

        request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-Permissions", string.Join(";", permissions));

        if (_authSession.BranchId.HasValue)
        {
            request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-BranchId", _authSession.BranchId.Value.ToString());
        }

        if (_authSession.ResponsiblePersonId.HasValue)
        {
            request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonId", _authSession.ResponsiblePersonId.Value.ToString());
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_authSession.ResponsiblePersonName))
        {
            request.Headers.Add("X-Navi-ResponsiblePersonName", _authSession.ResponsiblePersonName);
        }

        return base.SendAsync(request, cancellationToken);
    }
}


============================================================
FILE: C:\Users\yquinto\OneDrive - Navitrans\Escritorio\Documentos\Herramientas\Herramientas&Activos\src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Services\Auth\WebAuthSessionService.cs
============================================================

namespace Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Services.Auth;

public sealed class WebAuthSessionService
{
    private readonly HashSet<string> _permissions = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    public bool IsAuthenticated { get; private set; }

    public Guid? UserId { get; private set; }

    public string UserName { get; private set; } = string.Empty;

    public string DisplayName { get; private set; } = string.Empty;

    public string? Email { get; private set; }

    public string? Position { get; private set; }

    public string? Area { get; private set; }

    public Guid? RoleId { get; private set; }

    public string RoleCode { get; private set; } = string.Empty;

    public string RoleName { get; private set; } = string.Empty;

    public Guid? BranchId { get; private set; }

    public string BranchCode { get; private set; } = "TODAS";

    public string BranchName { get; private set; } = "Todas las sedes";

    public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; private set; }

    public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; private set; }

    public IReadOnlyCollection<string> Permissions => _permissions;

    public string AuditUser => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(UserName) ? "admin-web" : UserName;

    public event Action? OnChange;

    public AuthSessionUser? CurrentUser
    {
        get
        {
            if (!IsAuthenticated || UserId is null || RoleId is null)
            {
                return null;
            }

            return new AuthSessionUser
            {
                UserId = UserId.Value,
                UserName = UserName,
                DisplayName = DisplayName,
                Email = Email,
                Position = Position,
                Area = Area,
                RoleId = RoleId.Value,
                RoleCode = RoleCode,
                RoleName = RoleName,
                BranchId = BranchId,
                BranchCode = BranchCode,
                BranchName = BranchName,
                ResponsiblePersonId = ResponsiblePersonId,
                ResponsiblePersonName = ResponsiblePersonName,
                Permissions = _permissions.ToList()
            };
        }
    }

    public void Login(AuthSessionUser user)
    {
        IsAuthenticated = true;

        UserId = user.UserId;
        UserName = user.UserName ?? string.Empty;
        DisplayName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.DisplayName) ? UserName : user.DisplayName!;
        Email = user.Email;
        Position = user.Position;
        Area = user.Area;
        RoleId = user.RoleId;
        RoleCode = user.RoleCode ?? string.Empty;
        RoleName = user.RoleName ?? string.Empty;
        BranchId = user.BranchId;
        BranchCode = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.BranchCode) ? "TODAS" : user.BranchCode!;
        BranchName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.BranchName) ? "Todas las sedes" : user.BranchName!;
        ResponsiblePersonId = user.ResponsiblePersonId;
        ResponsiblePersonName = user.ResponsiblePersonName;

        _permissions.Clear();

        foreach (var permission in user.Permissions ?? new())
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(permission))
            {
                _permissions.Add(permission.Trim());
            }
        }

        NotifyStateChanged();
    }

    public void Logout()
    {
        IsAuthenticated = false;

        UserId = null;
        UserName = string.Empty;
        DisplayName = string.Empty;
        Email = null;
        Position = null;
        Area = null;
        RoleId = null;
        RoleCode = string.Empty;
        RoleName = string.Empty;
        BranchId = null;
        BranchCode = "TODAS";
        BranchName = "Todas las sedes";
        ResponsiblePersonId = null;
        ResponsiblePersonName = null;

        _permissions.Clear();

        NotifyStateChanged();
    }

    public bool HasRole(params string[] roles)
    {
        if (!IsAuthenticated)
        {
            return false;
        }

        return roles.Any(x =>
            string.Equals(x, RoleCode, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            string.Equals(x, RoleName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
    }

    public bool HasPermission(string permission)
    {
        if (!IsAuthenticated || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(permission))
        {
            return false;
        }

        return _permissions.Contains(permission);
    }

    public bool HasAnyPermission(params string[] permissions)
    {
        if (!IsAuthenticated)
        {
            return false;
        }

        return permissions.Any(HasPermission);
    }

    private void NotifyStateChanged()
    {
        OnChange?.Invoke();
    }
}

public sealed class AuthSessionUser
{
    public Guid UserId { get; set; }

    public string? UserName { get; set; }

    public string? DisplayName { get; set; }

    public string? Email { get; set; }

    public string? Position { get; set; }

    public string? Area { get; set; }

    public Guid RoleId { get; set; }

    public string? RoleCode { get; set; }

    public string? RoleName { get; set; }

    public Guid? BranchId { get; set; }

    public string? BranchCode { get; set; }

    public string? BranchName { get; set; }

    public Guid? ResponsiblePersonId { get; set; }

    public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }

    public List<string> Permissions { get; set; } = new();

    public DateTime? LastLoginAt { get; set; }
}

IF DB_ID(N'NaviToolsAssetsDb') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE DATABASE [NaviToolsAssetsDb];
END
GO

USE [NaviToolsAssetsDb];
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Security')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Security');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Organization')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Organization');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Inventory')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Inventory');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'LifeCycle')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA LifeCycle');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Documents')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Documents');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Loans')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Loans');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Maintenance')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Maintenance');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Imports')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Imports');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Sync')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Sync');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Audit')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Audit');
GO

FILE: C:\Users\yquinto\OneDrive - Navitrans\Escritorio\Documentos\Herramientas\Herramientas&Activos\scripts\validate-dashboard.ps1
============================================================

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$apiBase = "http://localhost:5218"

Write-Host "Validando Dashboard NAVI..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host "`n=== SUMMARY ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan
$summary = Invoke-RestMethod "$apiBase/api/dashboard/summary"
$summary | Format-List

Write-Host "`n=== HERRAMIENTAS POR ESTADO ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Invoke-RestMethod "$apiBase/api/dashboard/tools-by-status" |
    Format-Table status, statusLabel, count -AutoSize

Write-Host "`n=== HERRAMIENTAS POR SEDE ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Invoke-RestMethod "$apiBase/api/dashboard/tools-by-branch" |
    Format-Table branchCode, branchName, totalTools, availableTools, loanedTools, inMaintenanceTools, damagedTools -AutoSize

Write-Host "`n=== ALERTAS ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Invoke-RestMethod "$apiBase/api/dashboard/alerts" |
    Format-Table severity, internalCode, message -AutoSize

Write-Host "`n=== ACTIVIDAD RECIENTE ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Invoke-RestMethod "$apiBase/api/dashboard/recent-activity" |
    Select-Object -First 10 |
    Format-Table eventType, title, toolInternalCode, performedBy, eventDate -AutoSize

Write-Host "`nDashboard validado correctamente." -ForegroundColor Green
